chapters.text: Kum som thum lhin kum lha li lhinna, chuche lha, ni nga lhin nia, keima Chebar vadung panga sohchang ho lah a kana um na a chun van anakihongin keiman Pathena thil muthei ho chu kanamui.
Chuche lha, ni nga lhin na, hiche kum chu Jehoi’achin lengpa sohchan kal kum nga lhin kum anahin.
Chalde’a mite gamsunga Chebar vadung panga chun Buzi chapa Ezekiel thempupa henga Pakai thu ahung lhungin, chujongle hikoma chun achunga Pakai khut ana kingam e.

Keiman kaven ahileh, vetan sahlama konin hui le go kithon nasa tah-in ahung kitol in, meilhang lenlah ahungin, akimvel chu avah pem pum jengin, tat lou hel’in meisi ahung pah lah lah jengin chule meisi lah a chun sum-eng vahdum heu hou bangin avah jin ahi.
Chuin hiche lailung tah a kon chun ganhing tobang bang thil li ahungdoh tai. Alimput danu hiti hi ahi: amaho chun mihem mel apu uvin,
ahin khat cheh chun mai li li aneiyun, khat cheh-in lhaving li cheh aneiyun ahi.
Akeng phangu chu angilin, akengto noiyu chu bongnou kengto noi tobang ahi; chule amaho chu sum-eng kilhajol sel bangin a-emlai laiyin ahi.
Alhaving ho noi, apangpeh li noiya chun mihem khut tobang bang aneiyuvin ahi. Hiti chun hicheng li chun mai hijat chuleh lhaving hijat cheh chu aneiyuve.
Alhaving ho chu khat le khat akijop jel cheh-in, akijaldoh teng chuleh kihei louvin, khat cheh chun jangpet pet’in masang lam ngan akijal thei cheh-e.

Amaiyu jong hitobang cheh chu ahin, khat cheh chun amasang lama mihem mai apu cheh-uvin, ali geluvin ajetlam cheh-uva Sakei mai apu cheh-uvin, ali geluvin aveilam cheh-uva bongchal mai apu cheh-uvin, chule aliu chun anung lam uva muvanlai mai apu cheh-uvin ahi.

Amaiyu chu hitobang cheh chu anahi. Chule alhavingu chu achunga akijaldoh cheh-in, ganhing khat cheh chun lhaving ni aneiyin, khat cheh chu achom khat cheh chutoh akijop jel jengin, chule alhaving ni ma chun atahsau akhu chah kheh-in ahi.
Khat cheh chun alungthim che nomna lam cheh a chun jangpet pet’in malam non acheuvin, hita ache tengu chuleh kihei louvin ache pai jeng jiuve.

Ganhing ho lailung tah a chun meiam tobang thil khat ana umin, meisel lom kide bangin ganhing ho lah a chun akinungtol akimatol le len ahi; ameikong chu avah-in, chuleh meikong lah a kon chun kol ahung phedoh jie.
Ganhing ho chu kolphe vah lah lah bang khun hetman lou helin anung amaa achomjap jap jenguve.
Hichun keiman ganhing ho chu kaven ahileh, leiset chunga ganhing ho koma chun kangtalai khat kamun, li ho chu khat cheh a achan diuvin aumin ahi.

Kangtalai ho ahoi dan le akisem dan chu; ahoi danu chu song eng en tobang ahiuvin, ali gela chu hitobang cheh chu ahiuve; chule akisem danu chu avelkol khat kimlai don tah a chu avelkol khatma pang cheh ahin,
akitol tengu chuleh kihei chom louhela gamkai lia chu angatna lam lama kitol jeng thei ahiuve.
Avelkol li ho chun ajol kiveikol anei cheh-un, akiveikol sunga chun avelkam ho chu aneiyuvin, chule akiveikol ho chu akimvel lhung soh keiyin amit jeng amit jeng adimset’uve.
Ganhing ho chu ache tengu leh, akomuva avelkol ho jong chu achejin, ganhing ho chu leiset’a akipatdoh tengu jongleh avelkol ho jong chu akipatdoh ji tauvin ahi.
Lhagao che nomna lam lama chun amaho jong chu ache jiuvin, avelkol ho jong chu amaho chutoh akipatdoh tha ji tauve; ijeh-inem itileh ganhing ho lhagao chu avelkol ho sunga cheng ahi.

Hiche ho chu ache tenguleh hiho jong hi acheuvin, hiche ho chu adin tenguleh hiho jong chu ading jiuvin ahi; hiche ho chu leiset’a akipatdoh tenguleh avelkol ho jong hi amaho chutoh akipatdoh tha jiuvin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh ganhing ho lhagao chu avelkol ho sunga chu cheng ahiye.
Ganhing ho luchanga chun vanthamjol tobang khat akidalin, songval tobangin avalin, aluvum uva akijalsoh-in ahi.
Chule athamjol noiya chun alhavingu chu jangpet pet’in akijal soh keiyin, khat le khat akimongpe cheh-in ahi; ganhing khat cheh chun alhaving nin atahsa akikhu cheh-uvin ahiye.

Chule amaho ache tengu chuleh alhaving gin husau chu keiman twi tamtah husa gin tobang, Hat chungnungin van athin gin tobang, mihonpi husa gin tobang chule sepaite husa gin tobangin kaja jin ahi; amaho chu adin thip beh tengu leh alhavingu chu akhai lha jiuve.
Chuin aluvumuva vanthamjol tobang chunga kon chun o khat ahung gingin ahileh, amaho chu ading thipbeh jenguvin alhavingu chu akhai lha cheh tauve.
Aluvumuva vanthamjol tobang chunga chun Sapphire song tobang, laltouna tobang khat ana umin, chule laltouna tobang chunga anakitousah pa chu mihem lim le melput tobang ahi.

Chule ataibuh a lhah chung lam sea chun alimso dan chu sum-eng en banga engin kamun, akimvela meikonga kitomjol tobang limso dan tobangin jong akilangin ataibuh limso dan a kon noilam sea chun meikong limso tobangin kamun, akimvel chu avah pem pum jengin ahi.

Gojuh nikhoa meilhang lah a thaIpi lim tobang kimudoh tobang khun akimvela avah pem pum chu akimun ahi. Hitobang chu Pakai loupina limse dan ahiye. Keiman hiche hi kamudoh phat’in kakun chah jengin ahileh, thu kisei ogin khat kanajan ahi.
Hichepa chun keima jah a, “Mihem chapa nakeng phang tenin dingin, keiman nang jah a thu kasei ding ahi” eiti.
Aman kei jah a thu asei phat’in kasunga Lhagao ahung lut’in keima kakengphang te nin eidinsah tai; chule keiman kajah a athusei chu ka-ngaiyin ahi.

Hichun aman kajah a, “Mihem chapa, keiman nangma hi Israel mite, doumah mah bol nam mite, keima doumah jeng bolte henga kasol nahi; tuni chan gei hin amaho ahiuvin apu apate ahiuvin keima dounan achon khel khel jeng uvin ahi.
Amiho hi jumlam ja lam helouvin alungtah-uvin ahi; keiman amaho lah a khu kasol nahi, chule nangman amaho jah a khun, ‘Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye,’ nati ding ahi.
Amahon ngaiyu henlang ngaida jeng jongu leh; ajeh chu amaho hi doumah doumah bolji insung mite ahiuvin, amaho lah a hin themgao khat anaum jinge, ti hi kihet nauvinte.

Chule mihem chapa nangman amaho khu kicha hih-in, achemjam u ahin kicha deh hih-in, ling le khao lah jenga umin lang, chule aipi ho chu toupha kha ta jong le chun, amaho thusei khu kichat dan lang, amit vet’uvin jong lungthoi deh hih-in, ajeh chu amaho hi doumah mah bol insung mite chu ahibouvui.
Nangman amaho jah a khu keima thusei ho chubou naseipeh ding ahi, amahon ngaiyu hen lang ngaida jong leh; ajeh chu amaho hi doumah mah a chon insung mite ahiuve.
Mihem chapa, nangman vang najah a kathusei hi ngai phan; hiche doumah mah a chon insung mite bang khun doumah mah-in chon khan nate, nakam kan lang kahet peh peh chu ipi hijong le ne jengin, eiti.
Hichun keiman kaven ahileh, vetan, keima lam ngan khut khat ahung kilhung doh-in, chule vetan akhutlai’a chun lekhajol sutsa khat anaumin ahi;
chuin aman hiche chu ka-angsunga ahin lhamlhan ahile, hiche chu achung le anoiya kisun to gel ahin, chujong leh akisun thucheng ho chu ka-na thu le lunghemna chule hesohna thu jeng ahi.
Hichun aman kajah a, “Mihem chapa, nangma nakipe pen pen chu ipi hijong leh ne jengin; hiche lekhajol hi nen lang chuteng leh chen lang Israel insung mite jah a thu gasei tan,” eiti.
Hijeh chun keima kakam kan ahileh aman neh dingin lekhajol chu eipetai.
Chuleh aman kajah a, “Mihem chapa, keiman kapeh hiche lekhajol hi nen lang oivaset pitan,” eiti. Hijeh chun keiman hiche chu kanen ahileh; kakam sunga chun khoiju lhum’in alhume.
Aman keijah a, “Mihem chapa, Israelte ina chen lang amaho jah a khun keima thuseiho hi gaseitan.
Ijeh-inem itileh nangma paochom tho gamdang miho, apao het hahsa ho henga nakisol ahipoi, Israel insung mite henga nakisol ahi bouve.
Paochom tho gamdang miho, apao het hahsa, athusei hou nangman nahet khen them lou ho henga nakisol ahipoi. Tahbeh mongin hitobang miho lah a chu kasol hile chun amahon nathu angaijoh dingu ahi.
Ahinla Israel insung miten nangma thusei ngai pouvinte; ijeh-inem itileh, kei thu ngaiding athanom pouve; ajeh chu Israel insung mi ho hi abon chauva milouchal cheh le milungtah cheh ahiuve.
Vetan, keiman nang hi amaho maiya namai katahsah tan, nachalpang jong amaho chalpang sangin katahsah jon ahi.

Meituh song sanga songgel atahjoh bangin, keiman nachalpang katahsah jon ahi; amaho khu kicha hih-in, amitvet’u jong khu lung thoi nan neidan; ajeh chu amaho khu doumah mah a chon insung mite ahiuve,” ati.
Hiche kalval jong chun aman keijah a, “Mihem chapa, keiman nahenga kasei ding kathusei chengse hi abonchan nalungthim in kisanin lang nanakhang te nin ngaiyin.
Chujong le nangma chen, namite sohchang ho henga khun gachen lang amaho jah a, ‘Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye,’ gatin; amahon ngaiyu hen lang ngaidau jong leh” ati.
Hichun lhagaovin keima eidom sangin ahileh hiche muna kon chun Pakai loupina ahung kitungdoh-in, keiman jong kanung lama konin ling kihot nasa tah husa gin kajan ahi;
hiche husa gin chu ganhing ho lhaving khat le khat akijap khah tou gin le akomuva kangtalai ho gin anahin, hiche ho gin chu ling kihot nasatah gin banga ging anahi.
Lhagao chun keima eidom sangin eipo mangtai, hichun kalung asa behseh jengin lhase tah-in kachen, chule kachunga ma Pakai khut ahat lheh jengin ahi;
chuti chun Chebar vadung panga Tela’bib khoa cheng sohchang ho henga chun kachen, chule amaho lah a chun ni sagi sungin lungdong tah-in kagatouve.
Ni sagi kichai nungin keima henga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, keiman nang hi Israel dinga kho-ngah dia kakoi nahitan, keima kamsunga kona thu najah jah le nangman amaho hi keiya konin gihsal jing jin.

Keiman migiloupa jah a chu, ‘Nathi tei ding ahi,’ katia ahileh, nangin hichepa chu nagihsal da a, ahinkho huhhingna dinga agiloupa chu alam lhah gilouva kona gihsalna dinga jong thu naseida a ahi leh migiloupa chu athemmona a thiden tei tei ding ahin; ahinla keiman hichepa thisan chu nangma khut’a kahin hol ding ahiye.

Ijem tia nangman agiloupa chu nagihsala amapa chu agitlouna a kona ahung kile kit louva ahileh, chule alam lhah gilouva kona akile hei kit louva ahi leh, hichepa vang chu athemmona a chu thi den ding ahin, nangin vang nahinkho nakihuhhing ding ahinai.

Chujong leh midih khattou adihna a kona akihei manga themmona khat aboldoh tah a ahileh, keiman hichepa ding chun amasanga kipalna khat kadopeh-in ahi, ama chu thi tei tei ding ahi; ipijeh-inem itileh nangman nagihsal loulai jeh-a achonset chu athipi tei tei ding, aman atohdohsa athil dih bol chengse chu khat cha jong kigeldoh kit louhel ding ahitai; amavang hichepa thisan chu keiman nang khut’a kahin del ding ahi.

Hintin midih chu achonset louna dinga nangman nagihsal masah a, hijeh a chu achonset louva ahileh amapa chu hing tei tei ding ahi, ajeh chu aman gihsalna chu ana ngaiyin ahi; hitia chu nangman jong nahinkho nahuhhing ding ahi, ati.“
Hikoma chun kachunga Pakai khut ahung chutan, chule kajah a, “Kipatdoh in lang phaicham langa khun chen, hikoma khu keiman najah a thu kaseipeh ding, nahi,” eiti.

Hijeh chun keijong kakipatdoh-in phaicham lang kajontai; ahin vetan, Chebar vadung panga loupina kanamu tobang bang chun hikoma jong chun Pakai loupina ana dingin ahi; hichun keima kakun chah den jeng tai.
Ahin Lhagao chu kasunga ahung lut’in kakengphang te nin eidinsah tai; hiti chun aman eikihou lim pin kajah a “Chen lang na-insunga kot gakikha khumtan.
Chule vetan, Vo mihem chapa, nachunga khaojang tampi hung kisep lhan tin, hiche hoa chu nangma nakikan chah a, hijeh a chu mipi henga nachedoh thei lou ding ahi,
keiman nalei chu nadanga kabeden sah a, hijeh a chu nangma paomoa naum ding amaho khu nahouset thei lou ding ahi, amaho jong khu doumah mah a chon insung mite ahiuve.

Amavang keiman najah a thu kasei tengleh nakam nalhap peh ing ting, chuteng leh nangman amaho jah a khu, ‘Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye,’ nati ding ahi; koi hile angai nompa chun ngai hen; chujongle koi hileh angai nomlou pan jong ngaida hen; ajeh chu amaho hi doumah mah bol insung mite mong ahiuve.
“Vo mihem chapa, nangman chehtum khat kilah-in lang namasanga koiyin, chutengleh hiche chun Jerusalem khopi lim chu gongin;

hiche douna ding chun akino khumna ding semin lang, hiche khopi chu adouna dingin pal kaiyin, chujongle hiche kidouna ding chun kemsang don; hiche douna dingin ngahmun tampi jong sem’in lang, akimvela chun kulpi suhchahna ding phut’in.

Chule nangman thihpeh lan lang hiche chu nang le khopitoh nakikah a chun thihpalin gentanin; hiche lang chu namai ngat jing jengin lang, khopi del khum nan mang jing jengin, hadou douvin dounan. Hiche hi Israel insung dinga melchihna khat ahi.

Nangman naveilam napangpeh delphan lumin, keiman Israel insung talen kapeh ding chu nangma chunga kaset khum ding nahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche chunga nalup laisea anikho jat dungjuiya amaho talen chu napoh ding ahi.“

Ajeh chu keiman nang hi nikho tamtah katep nahin, nikho jathum le somko alhingin, hiche chu amaho talen kipehna kumjat toh kibang ahiye; phat hichan geiya chu nangman Israel insung talen chu napoh ding ahitai.

Chule phat hichan chu nabulhit teng chuleh aniveina nalupkit ding, napang jetlam nadelpha nalup ding, hichea chu Judah insung talen chu napoh ding ahi; nikho som li nakitep ahin, nikho khat cheh chu kum khat toh kibang ahi.
Chule nangma nabanjang keova, Jerusalem khopi kidel khum lang khu namai na-ngat jing jeng ding, chujongle akhopi douna khu gaothu nasei sei ding ahiye.
Chujongle vetan, keiman nachunga khaolom tampi kaset den ding, nangma kidel khumna nikho jat alhin masang sea alang langa jong nakihei loh theilou hel ding ahi.

“Nangman suhlou chang le sakol chang, bechang ho, bekan chang ho ahin, butun le kolbutun ahin kilah-in lang hicheho chu bel khatseh sunga henglut’in chule hichenga kon chun changlhah semin; nasih a nalup laise, nikho jathum le nikho somko sungsea naneh ding ahi.
Nangman naneh ding anneh chu atena a kitetoh ding, nikhat sunga shekel somni bou na neh a, khatvei bou na neh ding ahi.
Chule twi jeng jong atena a kitetoh bep chu nadon ding, Hin dim khat hop gup’a hop khat seh bou nadona, nikhat sunga khatvei bou nadon ding ahi.
Hiche chu nangman sakol changa kisem changlhah neh banga naneh ding, miho mitmu dinga chu mihem eh a kisem banga nakan ding ahi, ati. “
Chujongle Pakai chun, “Hitobanga hi amaho kadel lutna ding namtin vaipiho lah a Israel chaten achanglhah neh dingu atheng louva aneh dingu ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in keiman jong, “O Pakai Pathen vetan, keiman aitih chanin jong kisuhbohna kanei khapoi, kaneocha lhah tuni chan gei hin imacha ama chama thi hihen lang gamsa thasa hijong leh satheng lou chu kanekha hih laiyin, kakam sunga jong ahung lut kha hih laiye,” kati.
Hichun aman keijah a, “Vetan, keiman changlhah a nakisem dingin mihem eh sangin bong eh napenge,” eiti.

Hiche kalval jong chun aman kajah a, “Mihem chapa neive temin, keiman Jerusalem a changlhah hung konna chu kasuh tan ding ahin, hijeh a chu mihon changlhah atena a akiteuva kicha pum puma aneh dingu ahi; twi jong chu atena a akiteuva lungthoi pum puma adon diu ahi.
Miho chu changlhah beiya aumuva, talen athoh nauva akichai helna dinguva keiman hiche hi kahin bol ding ahi.
“Vo mihem chapa, nangman chemjam hemtah khat kilah-in lang, hichu samvoupa samchem man bangin mangin lang nalujang sam le nanemul vouchaiyin, chule tetoh-in hom khen in.

Chule khopi chu akiumna aphat le anikho ho chu alhin teng samjang talthum lah a tal khat chu khopi lailung tah a chu meiya nahal vam ding, tal thum lah a tal khat ma chu nalah a khopi kimvela chu chemjama nasat tel tel ding, chule tal thum lah a tal khat kit chu hui lhoh dinga nathethang ding, hicheng nung chuleh keiman chemjam chu apaiya kona kasadoh ding ahi.
Chule hicheng a kona chu alhom lamjoh nalah doh a hicheho chu nasangkhol chol monga nakhai ding ahi.
Chujongle hicheng lah kit’ a jong chu nangman them khat nalah doh a meilhum sunga naselut’a meiya nahalvam ding ahi; hicheteng chule mei hung kongdoh in tin, Israel insung jousea hung kadoh ding ahi.
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Hiche hi Jerusalem chu ahin, keiman namtin vaipi jouse lailung tah a kakoiya chule akimvela gamtin cheng khom ahiuve.

Ahinla aman gilou tah-in keima chonna danthu ho dou nan thil aboltan, chule akimvela cheng gamtin miho leh namtin vaipi ho sangin jong doumah mah abolin, kachonna danthu ho don louvin akoiyin, keima chondan ho dungjuiyin achon pouve.

Hijeh chun Pakai Pathenin aseiye: Nangho hi nakimvel’uva namtin vaipi ho sanga nagitlou jeh uleh, keima chondan hoa chon louva, kachonna danthu ho nadon lou jeh-u, chule nakimvel uva um namtin vaipi dang ho chondan a nachon jeh uvin,
Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Neihin vetan, kei mong mong hi nangma douva pang kahi tan; hijeh a chu namtin vaipi jouse mitmu chang tah a nangho thu kahin tan ding ahi.
Chujongle naum chan thet umtah ho jeh a chu keiman kabol khah lou hel thil khat nachunga kabol ding ahin, hitobang thil chu bol jong kabol kit lou hel ding ahiye.

Hichea chu mipaten nakholai sung tah a chu achapateu tahsa ahin neh diu, chule mi chapaten jong apateu tahsa ahin neh diu ahi; hita chu keiman nachunga thu katan ding, ahingdoh amoh umho jong chu hui lhoh mang dinga hui lah a kathethang ding ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, nangman nathilbol deilou tah tah ho le thet umtah tah ho jeh a keima muntheng nasuhboh tah jeh a chu keiman nangma kasat lhah jeng ding, kamit’a jong kamu khel lou hel ding chule lai jong kalainatpi lou hel ding nahi.

Nakhopi lailung tah a chu namite hop thuma hop khat gamna hisea thi gamuva, kellhah jeh a thigam diu, hop thuma hop khatma chu nakimvel’a cheng miho chemjam a lousoh uva, chule hop thuma hop khat kitma chu hui lhoh mang dia hui lah a kathethang jeng ding, anunguva chu chemjam apaiya kona kadodoh khum khum ding ahiuve.

Hitia chu keiman kalunghan chu kabulhit’a, achunguva kalungsatna chu kachuhsah ding, chutengle kalungmon ding ahi; amaho chunga chu kalungsatna kamolso teng chuleh Pakai kiti keima hin katom ngaina a hiche hi kaseidoh ahiye ti hi amahon ahet dingu ahi.“
Hiche kalvala jong chu keiman nangma hi nakimvela cheng namtin vaipi jouse leh najotpa ho mitmu dinga nakeo hela kajam ding, seiset’a naum ding ahi.

Keima, Pakai kitipan kaseisa ahitai, nachunga hamvevua lungsat le lunghan thoa melse tah a thu kahin tan tengleh, nakimvel’a cheng namtin vaipi seiset’a nauma, ahouset’u nato ding, akihilnau leh akidah-uva napan ding ahi.

Keiman thina thei kel nangma douna a thaIpi kap’a kahin kaplut’a, nangho suhmangna dinga kahin kaplut ding, chule nachunga kel kahin pohlut be be teng chuleh keiman nachanglhah konna chu kasuh tan jeng ding ahi.

Nangho dou dinga keiman kel kalhahsah ding, gamsa kahin lha lut ding, hicheho chun nacha nanao asuhgam diu, gamnan nalhun den’a, thisanin nalon khum ding ahi; keiman jong nachunga chemjam kachuhsah ding ahi. Pakai kiti keiman thu kaseitai,” ati.
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Israel molsangho lang ngan kiheiyin lang hicheho douna khun gaothu seiyin,

chule hitin seiyin, Vo Israel molsang ho, Pakai Pathen thusei hi ngaiyun! Pakai Pathenin molsang jouse le thinglhang jouse, hohlam jouse leh phaicham jouse jah a hitin aseiye: Vetan, keima mong mongin nachunguva chemjam kahin lap ding, nangho munsang lai jouse kasuhmang ding ahi.

Chuteng namaicham jouseu ahom keovin hung kijamin tin, chule gimnamtui nalhutnao maicham jouse kivojal ding ahi; na-pathen semthu chengseu masanga chu namiteu kithatsa ho chu kase lhah lhahjeng ding ahi.
Hitia chu keiman Israel mite thilong ho chu apathen lim semthu u masang dunga chu kalupsah a, chule nagu chengseu jong namaicham dungu kimvela kathe thang jeng jung ding ahi.

Hoilai muna cheng hijong leu chun, nakhopi jouseu le munsang lai jouse chu ahomkeova hung um soh ding ahi, chutia chu namaicham jouse chu ahomkeova uma, asesa jeng hung hi ding, napathen lim semthu jouseu kivo keh a kisumang ding, nagimnamtui halnam nau maicham jouse kisat lha ding, hitia chu nathilbol jouseu chu kitheh ngim hel ding ahi.
Chule mi kithatsa ho chu najalah tah-uva hung kijam uvin tin, chutengleh keima Pakai kahi hi nanghon nahetdoh dingu ahiye.
Hijong vangleh keiman nangho themkhat kahing hoi ding nahiuve. Gamtina nakithe cheh tengule nanghon chemjam masanga hingdoh namtin lah a jamlut phabep nanei dingu ahin,

hiche le chun namtin lah a jamlut ho chu sohchauga nakikai lutna chanuva keima neihin geldoh dingu ahi, keiya kona vahmangsa pannabei alungthimu kasuh keh a chule pannabeiya pathen lim semthu ho lama kiheijol jol amit’u kasuh chotpeh tengleh; hiteng chuleh amaho jeng jong amit’u’va thilse abol chengseu le thet umtah tah athilbol chengseu jala kikidah ding ahiuve.
Chule keima hi Pakai kahi chu hedoh-uvin tin, hiche thilse hi achunguva pannabeiya kabol ding ahi tia kasei chu ahilou nahetdoh dingu ahi ati.

Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Nakhut bengin lang, nakengto tat’in chule ‘He kate, Israel insunga thilse bol thet umtah ho pi hi,’ tin seiyin; ijeh-inem itileh amaho chu chemjama lou diu, kela thi diu chule gamna hisea gam ding ahiuve.

Gamla tah a umpa jong chu gamna hisea chu gam ding ahi; chule nailama umpa jong chemjama lou ding, chujongle akidalha akihing hoipa jong chu kela thi ding ahibouve. Hitia chu keiman amaho chunga kalungsatna kahin boldoh ding ahitai.

Chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai kahi chu nahetdoh dingu, hichele chun amiteu akithatsa ho chu amaichamu kimvel dunga apathen lim semthu ho lah a chu kijam thang soh ding, thinglhang vum tina uma, molsang chungvum tina um ding, thingna dum noi jousea uma gangpi thingna lah jousea kijamsoh a, apathen lim semthu lah jouseuva, gimnamtui ahalnamna jouseuva kijamthang soh hel ding ahiuve.

Chutengle keiman amaho douna kakhut kahin lhan ding, agamsung khu kamhel’a ahomkeova kalha ding, achenna jouseu, gammang lah a pat’a Riblah kho geiya keohela kaumsah ding ahi. Chutengle keima hi Pakai kahi tia kasei hi amahon ahetdoh dingu ahi ati.“
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hi tin ati:
“Vo nangma mihem chapa, Pakai Pathenin Israel gamsung thudola thu khat hi tin aseiye: Achaina! Gamsung kimvel ning li sunga hin thu chaina khat ahung lhungtai.

Tun nachunga thu chaina ahung lhungtai, hijeh a chu keiman nachunga kalungsat kabuh lhah ding chule nalam lhah chengse dungjuiya nathu katan a nathilbol thet umtah tah ho jeh a chu nangma talen kapeh ding nahi.

Chujongle kamit vet’a jong kamukhel lou hel ding, chule lainatna jong kanei louhel ding ahi; nalahuva nathilbolu thet umtah chujat aum jeh a chu keiman nachonna bang banga talen kapeh ding nahi. Chutengle keima hi Pakai kahi chu neihin hetdoh dingu ahi.
Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Vetan, thilse khat chunga thilse khat ahung lhung thom jenge!“
Achaina ahungtai, achaina chu ahungtai, nangma douna akichaina dingin; ven ahungtai.
Vo gamsunga chengpa, namanthahna ding phat ahung lhungtai; aphat ahung lhungin, anikho ahung naiye, kisuh nohphah nikho, molsang dunga kipana ogin kithon lou phat chu.

Tua hi keiman nachunga kalungsatna kasun khum ding, nangma douna a kalunghan kahin man ding, chule nachonna dungjuiya nathu katan ding ahi; chule nangma thilbol thet um tah tah ho jeh a chu talen kapeh ding nahi.

Kamit’in jong navethim pong ting, laijong kalainatpi louhel ding ahi; nachonna chengse dungjuiya talen kapeh ding nahi, nalah-a nathilbol thet umtah tah jeh chun. Chutengleh nangho dengpa chu Pakai keima kahi hi nahetdoh dingu ahi.
“Vetan nikho chu ahung lhungtai! Manthahna chu ahung sohdoh tan, jouva thu kitanla pahcha mum bangin amumtan, kiletsahna jong pahcha bangin apah lhatai.

Pumhatna chu gitlouna, kidenna mol lhon khat’in akitungdoh tai; ahaona jouseu leh ninglhing set’a anei jouseu chu khat cha jong kikhen louhel ding ahibouve; alah-uva aminthanga jong umlou ding ahiuve.
Aphat chu ahung lhungtan, nikho ahung naiye. Thil choa jong kipa dau hen lang, thiljoh ho jong chu lunggim dau hen. Ajeh chu lungsatna hi amihonpiu chunga um cheh ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh thiljoh a chun ahinlai sungseuva athiljoh chu ahenga hung kilekit louhel ding ahi. Ajeh chu amihonpiu chunga lungsatna chu um cheh ahibouve; kinungtol kit taponte; min athemmona jeh a ahinkho akihoidoh louhel ding ahitai.
Mihon sumkon amut’uvin mijouse kigosan aumsah cheh tauve; ahinla koimacha galmuna achepoi, ajeh chu amihonpiu chunga keima lungsatna umah ahi.“
Polam a chemjam apangin, asunga gamna hise leh kel alange; loujaova umpa chu chemjama aloujin khopi sunga umpa la kel le gamna hisen athi jitai.
Ijemtia ajamdoh khattou ahingdoh a auma ahileh, ama chu phaicham laiya vakhu molsang chunga umho tobang hi diu, amitakip cheh a ama ama themmona jal a lunghem cheh ding ahiuve.
Khut jouse la athabei gam tan, khupbuh jouse jong twi bangin alhop lhasoh tai.
Amahon khaodip ponin alai akigahuvin, kidah dah-in akhu nal jeng tauvin, amaiyuva jong jumna jeng aumtan, chule alujang samu jong achaisoh tai.

Adangka jouseu jong kholai dunga asep lhauvin, asanau jong khu thilboh tobangin aumtai; Pakai lungsat ni khon adangkau le asanauvin amaho chu ahuhdoh thei tapoi; hicheho chun agilkelu la avasah theipon, agiIpiu jong adimsah theipoi. ljeh-inem itileh hiche chu akipalnau athemmonau chu ahi.

Akijepnau hoi tah tah jong chu pannabei loupisah na dingin amanguvin, hichenga kon chun thet umtah tah pathen lim semthu ho leh deimo tah tah ho chu asemdoh-uvin ahi; hijeh a chu hiche hi keiman amaho dinga thilboh kahisah ding ahi.
Chujongle hiche chu keiman gamdang mite kivahna dinga kapeh ding, leiset’a migilouten akichom dinga thilchom peh a kapeh ding, amahon hiche chu asuhthang diu ahi.
Hiche hoa chu kaki heimang den jeng ding, hitia chu keima muntheng tah chu asuh thanguva, gucha michom ho hunglut’uva asuh thang diu,
chule ahomkeova aumsah dingu ahi. “ljeh-inem itileh agamsung hi thisan soa chonset adimtai tin, akhopi jong hi pumhat jeng adimtai.

Keiman namtin vaipi lah a agilou khohpen ho chu kahin puiya amaho chun ain jouseu alo ding ahi; hitia chu amaho kiletsahna thaneina chu kasuh beiya chule amuntheng jouseu jong suh thanga umsoh ding ahi.
Hesoh na ahunglhun teng leh amahon chamna hol’uvin tin, ahin khat cha la amudoh lou diu ahi.

Thilse khat chunga thilse khat ahung lhung thom jengin, thu kithang le thu kithang akimatjel jenge; amahon themgaopa a konin munei thudol aholuvin, ahinla thempu hoa konin danthu amangthah tan, upa hoa konin jong hilchahna amangthah soh tan ahi.

Lengpa alunghem tan, leng chapaten jong kinepna aneitapouve, chujongle mipiho khut jouse jong tijat ‘in angoisoh tai. Achonna dungjui uva keiman kabol diu, chule amaho thutan dungjui cheh a keiman athuu katan peh ding ahiuve; chutengle keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi, ti ahetdoh dingu ahi.” ahi.
Kumgup lhin kum, lhagup lhinna, chule lha, ni nga lhin nia keima ka insunga katouva Juda mi upa ho kamasanga anatou pet chun kachunga Pakai khut aki-ngamin ahi.
Hichun keiman kaven ahileh, vetan mihem limput tobang pua thil khat anaumin, ataibuh teni noi lai chu meikong ahin, chule ataibuh teni chunglam chu avah seh suh jengin, sum-eng vah bangin avah-e.

Amapa chun mihem khut lim tobang khun akhut ahin lhang doh-in keima kajangsam in eimanin ahi; hichun Lhagaovin van le leiset kah a eidomsang in, Jerusalem chungchang thudola Pathenin muneina vetsah ding chun eipuiyin, sahlam ngat’a kisem indan sung nunga lutna kelkot lampi, mi tom ngaisah jeng thei tom ngaina milim kisemthu kituna a chun eipuilut tai.
Hichun vetan, hikoma chun Israel Pathen loupina anaumin ahi, hiche chu keiman phaicham’a mu kanei tobang bang chu ahiye.

Chujouvin aman kajah a, “Mihem chapa tun sahlam gamkai vetemin,” eiti. Hijeh chun keiman jong sahlam gamkai kaven ahile vetan, maicham kelkot sahlam asung lama lutna a chun tom ngaina dinga milim kisemthu chu kamui.

Hichun aman kajah a, “Mihem chapa, hiche mite hin ipi abol’u namudoh hitam, hikoma Israel insung miten thet umtah tah thil tampi aboluva kamuntheng laiya kona keima gamla tah a hohdal dinga eigotnau khu? Hiche sanga lenjo jo thet umtah tah tampi jong namudoh nah lai ding ahiye,” eiti.
Aman insung lam jotna kotphunga chun eipuilut’in, hichun kaven ahileh vetan, banga chun avanglai khat anaumin ahi.
Chuin aman kajah a, “Mihem chapa banglai chu vitvangin,” eitin hijeh chun kenjong banglai chu kavit’in ahileh, vetan hikoma chun kot khat anaumin ahi.
Hichun aman kajah a, “Chenlang amahon hikoma thet um chungnung thil tamtah aboldoh-u khu gavetan,” eiti.

Hijeh chun keijong kache lut’in kaven ahileh kamudoh tai; bang dunga chun aop’a kithol tho ganhing jat jouse lim, kidah dah um gamsa ho lim, chule Israel insung pathen lim semthu tamtah chu anakisem in ahi.

Chule hicheng masanga chun Israel insung upa mi som sagi adinguvin, alah-uva chun Shaphan chapa Ja-azani’ah jong chu ana dingin ahi. Amitakip chun akhut’a gimnamtui halnamna lhengkong akichoi cheh-uvin, chule gimnamtui kihalna meikhu chu akitungdoh jen jun jenge.

Hichun aman kajah a, “Nangman Israel insunga mi upaten ama ama cheh indan milim kikoina muthim lah a khu ipi pi abolu ham, namu hinam? Ijeh-inem itileh amahon, ‘Pakaiyin eiho eimupouve, agam jong hi Pakaiyin adalhahsa ahitai,’ tin aseiyuve” ati.
Chujongle aman kajah a, “Amaho thilbol hiche sanga thet umjo cheh jong namu nah lai ding ahi,” eiti.
Aman Pakai insunga lutna sahlam kelkot’a chun eipuitou kit’in ahileh vetan, hikoma chun numeihon Tammuz chu akauvin anatouvuve.
Hichun aman kajah a, “Vo mihem chapa, nangman hiche hi namu hitam? Nangman hicheng sanga thet umjo jo jong namudoh ding ahinalaiye,” eiti.

Chujouvin aman Pakai indan sungnunga eipuilut’in ahileh vetan, Pakai in kotbul, hongcha le maicham kikah a chun pasal somni le nga tobang ana um uvin, Pakai houin lam chu anung ngat’uvin, amaiyu nisolam angat’uvin nisolama nisa chu chibai ana bohuvin ahi.

Hichun aman kajah a, “Vo mihem chapa, hiche hi namu hinam? Judah insung min hikoma hitobang thil thet umtah abolu hi thil neocha hiya, hita chu amahon gamsung hi pumhat jeng adimsoh-uva chule keima eiphin lung hang be be jeng diu ham? Vetem uvin, amahon anah homuva thingbah chu akibusoh tauve.

Hiche jeh a chu keiman lungsa tah a kabol ding, kamit“a jong kavet thim louhel ding chule lai jong kalainatpi louhel ding ahi; kana-khanga ging tah-in hung tao jongu leh ataonau ka-ngaipeh lou ding ahi,” ati.
Ama kanabenga oging tah-in ahung pengin hitin ati. “Khopi sugam mite hung kitollut’uvin, ami takip’in manchah kichoi cheh-uvin,” ati.

Hichun vetan, pasal gup sahlam ngat’a kisem kelkot sahnung lang ngan ahunguvin, abonchau chun mi thana manchah akhut’a akichoi cheh-uvin ahi, amaho chutoh tupat ponnem kisil pasal khat ahung kilhonin, akoma chun lekha mol koina kong khat aume. Chuin amaho chu akijot lut’uvin sum-eng maicham koma chun aga ding tauve.
Hichun Israel Pathen loupina chu aki-ngapna Cherubim chunga kon chun hongcha geiyin akitol toutan ahi; chuin aman tupat ponnem kisilpa, akoma lekha mol koina kong neipa chu akouvin ahi.
Amapa jah a chun Pakaiyin, “Khopi hi kholsoh hel in, Jerusalem geiyin, chule asunga thet umtah tah thil kibol ho jeh a gim genthei thoh a peng peng ho chalpanga chun melchihna gaboltan,” ati.
Chule midang ho jah a chun keima jah chang tah-in jong, “Hichepa nung khu juiyuvin lang khopi khu sugam jenguvin; namit’uvin jong vet thim dauvin lang chule laijong lainatpi dauvin;

upa tehse jouse jong thatgam jenguvin, gollhang ho leh nu-ngah ho, naosen ho chule nunao chapang abonchan that gam jenguvin; amavang achunga melchihna kibolsa ho vang chu khat cha jong tongkha hih heluvin. Hiti chu keima muntheng laitah a pat’in bol jenguvin,” ati. Hijeh chun amahon in maiya um upa tehse ho chun apan’uvin athat pan tauve.
Chuphat in amapan ajah-uva, “In chu suboh-uvin lang chule lhong dung jouse chu mithilong dimset jenguvin, Kondoh tauvin,” ati. Hijeh chun amaho akondoh uvin khopi sunga miho chu athatgam tauve.

Chutia amahon mi atha pet tah-u chun keima kachangseh-in eina kihing hoitan ahileh, kamai tola kasu lut jengin kakap’in “Ah, Pakai Pathen, nangman Jerusalem chunga nalungsatna twisun banga nahin sunlhah jeng phat’a hi Israel mite avaldoh amoh chengse jong nasuhgam jeng ding hi tam?” kati.

Hichun aman kajah a, “Israel insung le Judah insung themmona hi anasa behseh jengin ahi; gamsung jong thisan adim jengtan, khopi jong hi jouva thu kitan adimtai; ajeh chu amahon, ‘Pakaiyin agam hi adalhah ahitan, hijeh chun Pakaiyin imacha amupha tapoi,’ atiuve.
Keima dingin vang kamit nin la vethim thei pontin lai jong kalainatpi thei lou ding ahiuve, achung cheh-uva atohman’u kahin del ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin vetan, tupat ponnem kisila, akoma lekhamol koina kong neipa chun thu ahin nung lhut’in hi tin ati. “Nangman neithupeh bang bang chun keiman kaboltai” ati.
Keiman kaven ahileh vetan, cherubim chunga um vanthamjol tobang chunga chun sapphire song lim tobang achunguva chun laltouna tobang khat ahung kilah-in ahi.

Hichun aman tupat ponnem kisilpa jah a chun, “Cherubim noiya chimpei kipei lah a khun che lut jengin, cherubim teni kikah a meial ho khu nakhut teni dimset’in hamdoh-in lang chuteng le hiche ho chu khopi chunga thekhum jengtan” ati. Hichun amapa chu keima mitmu chang tah-in achelut tai.
Mipa chu achelut pet chun cherubim chu in lhang langa ana dingin ahi; chuin meilhang khat’in indan sungnung chu alekhu tai.
Chutah chun Pakai loupina chu cherubim a kon’in in hong cha langa chun achetouvin ahileh, ain chu meilhang adimset’in, chule indan jong chu Pakai loupi vah chu adimset jengin ahi.
Chule cherubim lhaving kithin gin chu Pathen hat chungnungin thu aseipet’a a-ogin bang khun in polam geiyin ahung kijadoh peh-in ahi.
Chujongle aman tupat ponnem kisilpa chu thu apeh a, “Cherubim teni kah a chimpei kipei lah a kona meiam chu lan,” tia aseipeh chun, amapa jong achelut’in akangtalai kipei koma chun aga dingin ahi.

Hichun cherub khat chun cherubim teni kah a meikong lang ngan akhut ahin lhangin, chule mei phabep chu alan hiche tupat ponnem kisilpa khut teni sunga chun akoipeh-in ahileh amapan jong hiche chu akilah-in ache doh tai.
Cherubim chu alhaving ho noiya chun mihem khut tobang khat cheh apu’vin ahi.
Hichun keiman kaven ahileh vetan, cherubim ho koma chun kangtalai li jen anaumin, khat khat chu cherubim khat kom cheh a anaumin ahi; hiche kangtalai ho chu song-eng bangin alhe lah lah-e.
Chule kangtalai li ho chun limput melso kibang bangin aneiyun, kangtalai keng khat chu kangtalai keng khat sunga um danin aume.
Akitol tenguleh kihei deh lou hel’ a sim le mal sah le lhang, lang khat pen pen a chu kitoljeng, akangtalai masa joh-in angatna lam pen pen chu ajot jeng ahi.
Ajol kiveikol ho leh avelkam ho chule akangtalai vel ho chu, akimvel lhung keiyin amit jeng amit jeng adimset’in ahi.
Akangtalai chengse chu keima jah tah-in jong, chimpei peiya kipei thei kangtalai ho tin akiseiye.

Khat cheh chun maichang licheh aneiyuvin, amaichang masapen chu cherub maichang ahin, ani chana chu mihem maichang ahin, thum chana chu Sakei maichang ahin, li lhinna maichang chu muvanlai maichang ahiye.
Hichun cherubim ho chu akaltou tauve. Keiman Chebar vadung panga kanamu ganhing ho chu hiche ho hi ahiuve.

Chuin cherubim ho chu ache phat’uvin kangtalai ho jong chu amaho koma chun akitol tauve; chutengle cherubim ho chun leiset’a kona leng tou dinga alhavingu adopsang phat’uvin kangtalai ho jong chu akomuva konin akihei mangdeh pouve.
Amaho chu adin chah phat’uvin khat ho jong chu amaho toh kilhonin akaltou thauvin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh ganhing ho lhagao chu amaho sunga um ahi.
Hichun Pakai loupina chu hong cha a konin akitoldoh tan cherubim ho chunga chun ading tai.

Chuin cherubim ho chun alhavingu adomsanguvin, keima mitmu chang tah-in akomuva um kangtalai chengse chutoh leiset’a konin akaltouvun achetou tauve; amaho chu Pakai insunga nisolam kelkot’a chun adinguvin ahile Israel Pathen loupina chu achunguva aumtai.
Ganhing hicheng hi keiman Chebar vadung panga Israel Pathen noiya kanamu ho chu ahiuvin, chule amaho chu cherubim ho chu ahiuve, ti keiman kana he tai.
Khat cheh chun maichang li li aneiyuvin, khat cheh chun lhaving li li aneiyun, chule alhavingu noiya chun mihem khut tobang anei cheh-uve.
Amai put danu chu Chebar vadung panga kanamu ho maiso dan mong mong chu ahiuve. Abonchauvin amai ngatna lam cheh a chun jangpet pet’in ache jenguvin ahi.

Lhagaovin eidom sangin Pakai in kelkot nisolam ngat’a kihong laiya chun eilhut tai. Chule vetan, kelkot jotna lampi a kotphung bula chun pasal som nga anaumuve; chule hiche ho lah a chun milal cheh Azzurchapa Ja-azani’ah le Benai’ah chapa Pelati’ah jong kanamun ahi.
Chuin a man kajah a, “Mihem chapa, hiche miho hi thil dihlou lou boldoh a hiche khopi sunga thuguh dihlou tah tah hille ho chu ahiuvin;
amaho chun, ‘In ho sahna ding phat ahung lhung hih laiye, hiche khopi hi khangbel len tah chu ahin, chule eiho hi saphe chu ihiuve’ tin aseiyuve.
Hiche jeh chun amaho douna hin gaothu seiyin; Vo mihemchapa gaothu seiyin” ati.

Chujou chun Pakai Lhagao chu kachunga ahung chun chule kajah a, “Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, tin seiyin” eiti: Vo Israel insung, nanghon hitin nageluve, ajeh chu nangho lunggila hunglut jouse chu keiman abonchan kahesoh keiye.
Nanghon hiche khopi sunga hin mi natha be cheh cheh-uvin, kholai dung jouse namithasau nadipsoh tauve.

Hiche jeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: nanghon mihem nathasau kholai lunga along najam jouseu chu aphe hon dinga um sa ahiuvin, chule hiche khopi hi ahonna ding khangbel chu ahi; ahin nangho chu hiche lah a chu naki-lhah tha diu ahi.
Nang hon chemjam nakichauvin, ahinla keiman nachunguva chemjam kahin chuhsah ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Keiman kholai lunga kona kahin puidohuva, gamchom mite khut’a kapeh doh ding nahiuve, chutia chu nachung uva thu katan ding ahi.
Nangho chemjam a nalou diu, Israel gamgi chin dunga keiman nathu u katan ding ahi; chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai kahi chu nahetdoh dingu ahi.
Hiche khopi hi nangho dinga khangbel hita lou ding, alailunga chu nangho jong saphe kihon ding banga naum lou dingu ahi: keiman Israel gamgi chin dunga nangho thu katan ding ahi;

chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai kahi chu nahetdoh dingu ahi; ijeh inem itileh keima chondan thupeh ho nanot thap’uvin; nakimvel’uva cheng namtin vaipiho chondan dungjuiyin bou nachonjo tauvin ahi,” ati.

Hichun ahitin ahi, keiman gaothu kasei sei laitah-in Benai’ah chapa Pelati’ah chu athitai. Chuphat’in keiman jong kamai tola kasulut’in hakan kakap’in kaseitai, “Kate, Pakai Pathen nangman Israel mite amoh chengse hi nasuh beihel ding hitam?” kati.
Hichun kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, nangma sopi, nasopi mong mong ho, nasoh chanpiho, Israel insung pumpi, abonchauva hi Jerusalam a chengte ahiuvin, ‘hiche gam hi eiho goulo dinga eikipeuvah ahitai’, tin aseiyuvin, ahinla amaho vang Pakaiya konin agamla behseh tauve.

Hijeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye tin seiyin: Keiman amaho hi namtin vaipi jouse lah a gamla tah a katolmanga, gamtina amaho kathe chehsoh hel vangin, amaho umna mun jousea chun keima amaho dingin muntheng in kapang jinge,’ ati.

Hijeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: ‘Keiman nangho namtin vaipi lah a kona kahin pui khoma, nakithe chehnau gamtina kona kakhop khom ding nahiuve, chule Israelte gam chu nangho kapeh ding nahiuve,’ tin aseiye.
Chule hikoma chu amaho ahung lhun tenguleh deilou thil ho leh thet umtah tah thil ho chu apaidoh dingu ahi.

Chujongle keiman amaho chu lungthim khatseh kapeh a chule asunguva lhagao thah khat kakhumpeh ding ahi; chule atahsau lungthim song tobanga tah chu kalahdoh peh a amaho chu tahsa lungthim mai mai bou kapeh ding ahi,
chutia chu keima chondan thu hoa chu achonuva kachonna dan anit’uva chule aboncha chu amanchah theiyuva ahileh amaho kamite hi diu ahin, keima amaho Pathen kahi ding ahi.
Amavang athilbolu deilou tah tah ho le thet um tah tah ho alungthimuva alha ngai jing ho chu keiman atohnau jouse alujanguva kahin khuh khum jeng ding ahi,’ tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye, ati.“
Chujouvin cherubim ho chun alhaving chengseu adomsanguvin, ako’muva chun kangtalai velkol ho chu aumuve; chujongle Israel Pathen loupina chu achunguva akisongin ahi.
Chuin Pakai loupina chu khopi lailunga kon chun akitol touvin khopia kona niso lama um molsang chunga chun adingden tan ahi.
Chuin Lhagaovin keima eidom sangin Chalde’a gamsunga sohchang te henga Pathen Lhagao vanga thil mutheina a chun eipuilut tai. Chujouvin kakoma konin mu kanei chu akitol tou tai.
Chule keiman Pakaiyin eivetsah thil ho jouse chu abonchan sohchang ho chu kaseipeh soh helin ahi.
Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung in hitin:
“Mihem chapa, nangma doumah mah bol insung mite jalah a nachenge, amaho chun mitni la anei ngalun kho amupouve, nakhang ni aneiyun kho aja pouve;

ijeh-inem itileh amaho chu doumah mah bol insung mite ahiuve. Hijeh chun mihem chapa nangma mong mongin sohchang von kivonin lang sunlai tah-in amaho mitmun sohchang dingin che tem in; amitmu chang tah-a chu naumna muna kona munchom dang khat’a sohchang ding banga nache ding ahi. Doumah mah bol insung mite ahivang uva ijem itileh amahon ahetkhen jeng theiyu jong ahi.
Nangman amaho mitmu chang tah a chu sunlai tah a navon, sohchang von chu napohdoh ding; sohchanga che tei tei ding miho banga chu amaho mit mua nangma nilhah tengle sohchang dinga napotdoh ding ahi.
Amitmu uvin pal chu vit vangin lang hiche vangkah a chun potdoh jengin.

Amaho mit mua chu nasohchan von chu nalengkouva naban ding, muthim lah a chu napoh doh ding ahi: gamsung chu namulou helna dinga nangman namai nakitom ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh keiman nangma hi Israel insung dinga melchihna khat’a pang dinga katun nahi, eiti.“

Chutia thu eikipeh bang chun kabol tai. Sun laiyin sohchan von, keiman kaki vonin, nilhah chun kakhut teni tah-in pal chu kavutvang jengin, muthim lah a chun kapotdoh tan, amaho mitmun kavon chu kalengkouva kapui.
Jingkah chun kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Israel insung doumah mah bolji insung mite chun najaha, ‘Nang hi ipibol nahim?’ tia aseijiu hilou ham?
Amaho jah a chun hitin seiyin, ‘Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Hiche thu kisei hi Jerusalema um leng chapa le asunga cheng Israel insung pumpi thudol ahi,’ tin.
Seiyin, ‘Keima hi nangho dinga vetsah khat’a pang kahin, keiman kabol bang banga hi amaho chunga kibol ding ahi; amaho sohchanga kitoluva, soh a kihen ding ahiuve,’ tin.

Chutengle amaho lah a um leng chapa chun asohchan von chu muthim lah a alengkouva akitot’a chutia chu potdoh ding ahi: aman pal chu avivanga ahom sunga chu potdoh ding; gamsung chu amit te nia amukit lou helna dinga amai akitom ding ahi.

Chujongle keiman amapa chu kalen kakhu khuma, kalenpela chu ohden ding ahitan; chutengleh keiman ama chu Babylon lam, Chaldea mite gamsunga kapuilut ding, ahivanga amit’a amulou ding, hikoma chu thiden ding ahitai.
Chule ama panpi dinga akimvela pang jouse, asepaite jouse geiya, keiman hui nunna lam lama kathe mangsoh hel ding; anung nunguva chemjam kasadoh a kadel ding ahi.
Keiman amaho namtin vaipi jouse lah a kano cheh soh hela gamtina kathecheh soh hel phat leh amahon keima hi Pakai kahi chu ahetdoh dingu ahi.

Ahin achelutnau namtin vaipi jouse lah a athil bolu thet umtah tah ho chu aphondoh-uva chule keima hi Pakai kahi chu ahetdoh theina dinguva keiman amaho mi them khat chemjam masangale kelkhoh masanga chule gamna hise masanga kahoidoh ding ahiuve ati.“
Hiche jou chun Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhung kit’in hi tin ati:
“Mihem chapa, nangman naki’hot pum pumin an nen lang, kicha geovin kithing thingin twi donin;

chule gamsung mite thudolin thu seiyin lang, Pakai Pathenin Israel gamsung Jerusalem a chengte chung chang thudola hitin thu aseiye: Amahon kicha geova aneh dingu lunghem tah a an aneh uva twi adon dingu ahi; ijehinem itileh agamsungu chu asunga chengten pumhat’a thil abol jeh-uva asunga um thil jouse kimai ngim hel ding ahi.
Chutia chu chennasa khopi ho jong akeo hela kamhel ding ahi; chutengle gamsung chu ahomkeova um ding ahin; chule nanghon keima hi Pakai kahi chu nei hetdoh dingu ahi, ati.“
Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, nanghon Israel gam thudola thuchih khat naneiyuva, ‘Nikho ho la asao cheh cheh jengin, mu kinei chengse jong pannabei asoh gamtai,’ tia naseiyu chu ipi kitina ba ham?

Hijeh chun amaho jah a seipeh-in lang, ‘Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman hiche thuchih hi kasuhbei ding ahitan, hijeh a chu hiche hi Israelte lah a thuchih a kimang kit lou hel ding ahi,’ ati, tin. Ahin amaho jah a chun hitin seijon, ‘Nikho ho le mu kinei jouse guilhuna ding chu anaitai,’ tin.
Ajeh chu Israel insunga adih louva mu kinei hihen lang, joule nal a Pathen thu kiseina hijongle um lou hel ding ahitai.

Amavang Pakai keiman kasei ding thu chu kasei jeng ding, chule kitongdoh jeng ding ahi. Kidedang dang louhel ding ahi, Vo doumah mah bolji insung mite, nangho nikho laiya keiman kathusei hi katohdoh jeng ding ahi tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye, ati.“
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, vetan Israel insung mite chun ‘Hichepan mu anei chu nikho tamtah jouva, phat sottah nunga hung guilhung ding gaothu asei ahibouve’ tin aseiyuve.
Hiche jeh chun amaho jah a seipeh-in lang, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Kathusei khat cha jong kinomsot talou ding, thu kasei pen pen chu kitongdoh jeng ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye, eiti.“
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Israel themgao ho dounan gaothu seiyin lang, amaho lung cham chama gaothu seidoh ho dounan gaovin lang ajah-uva thu seipeh-in, ‘Pakai thusei ngaiyuvin!’ tin.
Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye. Ohe, ada nahiuve, alungthim dei jenga chona thil imacha mudoh neilou hel themgao ngol ho!
Vo Israel, nathemgao ho khu ingem lah a si-al tobang ahiuve.
Nanghon Pakai nikho ni leh galmuna adinjou theina ding tin aong lai laiya nacheuvin Israel insung dingin pal nagen tapouve.
Amahon jouthu jeng asei tauvin, jou jengin Pathen thu aseiyuve; Pakaiyin amaho asol loupet jongle athuseiyu chu suh bulhit peh dingin akinem uvin, ‘Pakaiyin aseiye’ tin aseiyuve.
Keiman imacha thu kisei kha louva nanghon, ‘Pakaiyin thu aseiye,’ tia naseiyu chu jouva Pathen thu naseiyu hilou hiya, chule joulhepna mu kinei ahi nahetdoh louvu ham? eiti.“
Hiche jeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye; “Nanghon joule nal a thu naseiyuva, ahomkeopi mu naneiyu ahin, hijeh a chu vetan, keima nangho douva pang kahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

Keima khut hi ahomkeo mu neiya chule jouva Pathen thu seijia themgaoho douva hung pang ding ahi; amaho chu kamite kihou somna a lhalou diu, Israel insung minbua jong kijih louva, Israel gamsunga jong hung lut lou ding ahiuve; chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai Pathen kahi chu neihetdoh dingu ahi.
Atahbeh mong mongin lungmonna um louhel chu amahon, ‘Lungmon aume’ atiuvin kamite apui khel soh tauve; ajeh chu hiche mite hin pal aget’uva ahileh themgaoho hin ngunsong loukang anupeh uvin,
ngunsong loukang nupeh ho jah a chun, hiche hi lhu tei tei ding ahi! Go hajuh a hung ju ding, gel nasa tah a hung lha a, huipi le go hung kitho ding ahi;
hiche pal hi ahung lhuh tengleh nangho jah a, ‘Ngunsong loukanga naloikang nau loukang chu hoiya umah hi tam? tia nakidoh lou hel diu ahi.
Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman kalungsatna a konin huipi le go hin toldoh ing ting, kalung hanna chu go tam tah-in hungjun tin, asumang dinga kalungsatna gel len hung lha ding ahi.

Hita chu keiman ngunsong loukanga naloi kangu pal chu kahojal a, tola kaloi lhuh soh ding ahi, hiteng chuleh abuIpi jouse jong akeova kijam ding ahiuve; hiche chu alhuh tengleh alailunga chu nangho namanthah den hel diu ahi; hijeh a chu keima hi Pakai kahi chu nanghon nahetdoh dingu ahi.

Hita chu keiman hiche pal chungle achunga ngunsong loukang loikang miho chunga chu kalungsatna kabuh lhah ding ahi; chutengle keiman nangho jah a, ‘Pal chu aum tapon chule pal loikang miho jong aumtapouve.
Pakai Pathenin lungmon aumpoi, tia anasei pet’a Jerusalem chung chang thudola gaothu anaseiya chule akhopi dinga lungmon nading mu ananeiho themgaoho jong chu aum tapouve,’ tia kasei ding ahi.
“Hitobang chun mihem chapa nangma jong amaho lungcham chama kon gaothu seijia namite chanu ho dounan kihei yin, amaho dounan gaothu seiyin;

chule seiyin, Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Ohe ada ahiuve, mihem lhagao suhmangna dinga, mihem adung sang jouse luvuma ponlu khuh peh a, mijouse kongjanga kivei ding mitpheldoi khao phehpeh numeiho! Nanghon kamite lhagao ho chu sadela nadeluva lhagao dangho chu nangho phatchomna dia nakihinghoi dingu ham?

Nanghon kamite lah a hin sakol chang khutdim khat chu na le changlhah hal khat chu nan neisubohuvin, athilou ding beh miho chu nathat’uvin, ahinglou hel ding miho joh chu nahinghoi tauve; thujou jeng ngainom kamite henga hitin jouthu jeng nasei tauvin ahi.

Hiche jeh chun Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman mihem lhagao matna dinga mitpheldoi khao napheh jouseu chu kadouve, nabanjang uva kona kalhap lhah soh hel ding ahi; sadel banga nadel leu lhagao ho chu keiman vachate banga oh louhel’a kalen mangsah ding ahiuve.“

Napon lukhuh ho jong kaho doh a, nakhut’uva kona kamite kahuhdoh ding, chule nehgam ding bep’a amaho chu nangho khut’a umkit louhel ding ahiuve; chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai kahi chu nahetdoh dingu ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh nanghon joujeng joujeng in midih chu nalung phatmo sah-uvin, keiman ama chu kalung phatmo sah khahpoi; chule nanghon migiloupa chu ahinkho huhhingna dinga, alamlhah gilouva kona ahung kileheikit na dingin nabol pouvin, natilkhou cheh jouve;

hijeh a chu nanghon ahomkeosa mu naneilou diu, Pathen thujou naseiyu jong chu nabol jing lou diu ahitai; keiman kamite chu nangho khut’a kona kahuhdoh ding ahitai. Chutah le nanghon keima hi Pakai kahi chu nahetdoh dingu ahi,” eiti.
Hicliun Israel upaho phabep kahenga ahunguvin kamasanga ahung toutauve.
Chujouvin Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, hiche mite hin alungthim sunguva milimdoi ahouvu hi gil tah-in ageltauvin, athemmo nau kipalna anei dingu chu amasanguva asekhom soh tauvin ahi; keiman amaho hi kaki-holdoh sah nah nah ding ham?

Chuti ahijeh chun amaho jah a khun seiyin lang, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Israel insung mi koi hileh amilimdoi alungthim sunga giltah a gela chule amasanga kipalna ding themmona themgaopa henga hung tei tei nalaiya chu amilim doibol tamtah jeh a chu Pakai kiti keiman katahsa tah a ama chu kahin donbut ding ahi;
hitia milimdoi abol ho jeh a kahenga kona vahmangsa Israel insung mite lungthim chu katuh chah theina ding ahi.

Hijeh chun Israel insung mite jah a seiyin lang, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Nalung khel’uvin lang milimdoi nahou chengseuva konin kihei mangsoh hel’uvin, nathil bol’u thet umtah tah chengse a konin namaiyu heimang soh helun.“

Ijeh inem itileh Israel insung mi koi hijongle, Israel mite lah a khopem le hijongle, keiya kona kitumsedoh jenga, milimdoi ahou ho chu lunggil tah a gel jinga, chule akipalna ding athemmona amaikoh a kilang jinga, chulela ama um chan ding thudol’a keima dohsah dinga themgaopa henga hung jing jia chu, Pakai keiman hichepa chu katahsa tah a kahin donbut ding ahi;

chule keiman hichepa chu kavet lhih jenga, ama chu japi kihoulim nopna le melse tah a seithanga kahin um sah a, kamite Israelte lah a kona kasuh mang hel ding ahi; chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai kahi chu neihin hetdoh dingu ahi.

Ijemtia hiche themgaopa chu jouva akilhep lhah a, jouthu ahin seiya ahileh, Pakai keiman hiche themgaopa chu kanot thap ahitan, hijeh a chu ama douna a kakhut kalap ding, kamite Israel te lah a kona kasuh mang hel ding ahi.
Chutengle amahon atalen’u akipoh cheh diu ahin, themgaopa talen muding leh phunsanpa talen muding chu kibang cheh ding ahi.

Hitia chu Israel insung mite kahenga kona vahmang kit louhel diu, thil asuh khelu khat cha a jong kisuboh kit louhel diu ahi, kamite hidoh kit theina joh a hung um diu, chutengle keima jong amaho Pathen kahi doh kit ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye” ati.
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, gamsung khat’in keima douna a tahsan beihela akiman chah a chonset abol tengleh, keiman hiche gam douna chun kakhut kalhang jin, achanglhah konna mun chu kasu tang jin chutengle gamsunga konin mihem le gancha kasugam jin ahi.
Ijemtin mi hicheng thum, Noah, Daniel chule Job jeng jong hi agamsunga anaum kha jeng jongle, amaho mai mai chu adih nauvin ahinkhou ahuhdoh nah nah diu ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Keiman gamsunga chu gamsa ho kalhatle sah a, hicheho chu asunga nom lhat’uva, aneh ngim heluva, hiche gamsa ho jeh a mihem khat cha avale thei louhel teng;

akisei mithum chu asunga ana umkha jeng jongu leh, keima hing jing kahin, amaho chapate hihen chanute hijongle ahuhdohdeh lou diu, amaho seh seh chubou kihuhdoh intin, gamsung vang ahomkeova kijam ding ahi.
Ahilouva hiche gamsunga chu keiman chemjama gal kahinbol tah a, chule gamsunga chu chemjam kalensah jenga, asunga mihem le gamsa jouse katha gam hel tah jongle,
akisei mi thum ho chu asunga ana um kha jeng jongu leh, keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, amahon chapate jong chanute jong ahuhdoh louhel diu, amaho seh seh chubou kihuhdoh diu ahi.
Ahilouva keiman agamsunga chu gamna hise kalhalut tah a, chule kalungsat kasunkhum jenga asunga mihem le gamsa thatgamin thisan lonsah jeng jong leng,

asunga chun Noah, Daniel chule Job geiyin anaumkha jeng jongle, keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye, amahon chanu chapa ahuhdoh deh lou hel diu ahi; adih jal’uva amaho hinkho seh seh bou akihuhdoh dingu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman akhosunga cheng mihem le ganchaho thagamna dinga thutanna hahsa tah thil li Jerusalem chunga kalhahsah a, chemjam kalan sah a, kel kalhahsah a, gamsa gilouho kalhalut’a, gamna hise kalansah chu itobang tah a nasa hitam!“

Ahinla vetan, chapate chanute puidoh ding khopi sunga chun ahingdoh mihem phabep dalhah a umden ding hihen lang, amaho chu nahenguva hungu hen, nanghon amaho lampi jouse le athilbol chengseu namu hijongleh, keiman Jerusalem chunga thilse kahin buhlhah jeh a chu nalungu dam jeng ding ahi, keiman akhopi sunga kalhunsah thil jouse jeh a chu.

Hicheho chun, alamlhah jouseu le athilbol jouseu namudoh tenguleh, nalung damsah jeng diu ahi; ajeh chu keiman akhopi sunga kathilbol aboncha hi ajeh beiya kabol ahilou nanghon nahetdoh dingo ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, iatileh gammang lah a um thingphung hijat lah a lengpigui bah hi chungnung pen ham?
Hiche lengpi thinga kona chu thil ikhat sem dinga kiladoh mong ji nam? Mihemten hiche thinga kona chu thilkeo ima khaina ding thil khaina thei khat alahdoh jiu hinam?
Vetan, hiche hi meiya tivam ding bep’a kipedoh ahitan, meiyin among langto gel akahvam tengleh akimlai jong chu mei-am in aum bep’in ahi, hichu ipi pena aphatchomna ding umna laiyam?
Vetan, apumpia ahi pet’in jong imachan akimang pon; meiyin akah teng chuleh mei-am jeng ahitah jeh chun ichan geiya himo cheh ding ham, ipi pen tah a kimang theina ding ham!
Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Gammang thingphung lah a lengpi thing meiya tivam ding bep’a kapehdoh banga chu Jerusalema chengte kapedoh ding ahi.

Chutia chu amaho chu kavet lhih jing ding, meilhum sunga kon chun jamdoh kigo jong leu, mei chun akahvam tei tei diu ahi; chule amaho dounaa kakihei teng chuleh nanghon keima hi Pakai kahi chu nahetdoh dingu ahi.
Hitia chu kitahna neilouva thil aboIjeh-uva keiman agamsung chu ahomkeova kajam ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye, ati.“
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Jerusalem chu athilbol thet umtah tah ho hetdoh sah-in lang,
chule seipeh-in, Pakai Pathenin Jerusalem jah a hitin aseiye: Nakipatna le napenna hi Canaan mite gamsung ahi; napa chu Amor mi anahin, amanu jong Hit mi anahi.
Chule napen dan chu, nahungso nikhon nalaigui akitanbong hih-in, chule nathenna dingin twiyin jong nakisil lhapoi, chin nakijut jol pon, chun jong nakichun nampoi.
Mihem mit khat chan jong nalainatpi hih-in dipdampi dingin thil imacha nangma din ahungdoh poi; ajeh chu tollhanga nakisep mangtai, ijeh-inem itile nahungso nikhon nangma kidah tah-in naumin ahiye.
Chule keiman kahin jotpa pet chun nangma nathisan lah a nakisai saiyin, hijeh chun nathisan lah a naum pet’in ken jong najah a, ‘Hingin lang“

loujaova hamphung bangin hung khang touvin,’ kati. Chuin nangma nahung khangtouvin, nahung sangdoh tan, nu-ngah lhingset naphatai; nanoi teni jong ahung kigong doh tan, nasamjang jouse jong akikhan lhit tai; ahivangin nangma natahsa keovin naumin nasagoh keo nahiye.

“Keiman kahinjotpa kit chun kaven ahileh vetan, nangma deichat theiyin nakhangdoh tan, hijeh chun kaponsil kakhu khumin, nasagoh keova naum chu kakhujol peh tai; chule keiman nang chunga tahsanna kaneiyin nang toh kitepna khat kaneitai, hiti chun nangma keiya nahitan ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Chuphat’in twiyin kasil ngimin, nathisan kasop lhan chule thao kanutai.
Keiman pon kikhong pah kasilpeh-in, savun kengchot kasepeh-e; tupat ponnemin katomin, lungpon kasilpeh-in ahi.
Chujouvin kijepna pahcha tampin kajemin, nabanjang te nia chaojang kabupeh-in, nangong ajong sumgui ka-opeh in ahi.
Chule nanah homa sumkol kakhaipeh-in, nabilkol te nia bilha kabapeh-e; chujongle lallukhuh hoitah nalua kakhuh peh-in ahi.

Hiti chun sana le dangkan nakijemsoh tai; naponsil jong tupat ponnem ahin, lungpon le pon kikhongpah ahiye; naneh ding jong changbong tuitah le khoiju toh chule thaobou nanen ahi. Nangma mel kidanga, mel hoiyin nahung khangdoh tan, lenggam khat mong mongin nasoh doh tai.

Chule namtin vaipi jouse lah a namel ahoi behseh jeh-in namin akithangjal jengin ahi, ijeh-inem itile keiman kavonpeh thil loupi chengse jeh chun nangma nachamkim soh jengin ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Ahinla namin than jeh chun nangman namel hoipi chu nakisonpin, notin napang tan, ahung vahle jouse chu noti chonin nachonpi pijengin ahi.“

Naponsil phabep jong naladoh jin nangma ding tumtah chun thanom tah-in muntheng tampi najempah let lut jeng jin, chutengle hiche ho chunga chun noti chonin nachontai; hi tobang chu anasoh khalouhel ahin, soh jong soh kit louhel ding ahiye.
Chujongle nakijepna hoitah tah ho, keiman kapehsa kasana le kadangkaa kon chun naladoh jin nang ding mongin pasal lim tampi nakisemin, hiche ho chutoh noti chonin nachon jin ahi.
Chutengle naponsil kikhongpah ho chu nahoh lhan, hiche ho chu nakhu nan, hiche masanga chun kathaomei le kagimnamtui chu nakoiyin ahi.
Chujongle kachanglhah kapehsa, changbong tuitah le thaotwi chule khoiju nang vahna kaneiji chu hiche ho hin agim nam alung lhaipi diuvin amasanguva natunpeh jin ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Chule keitoh nahinsa nachapate leh nachanute chu napuiyin, amaho chu nehgam dingin muntheng dunga kilhainan namangin ahi. Noti chona nachonna hi thil neocha ham.
nangman kachate nathagama pumgo thilto banga nalodoh jengpi chu!
Hiche thet umtah tah thil nabol ho hileh noti chona nachonna chengsea hin nakhangdon lai nikho, natahsa keova nauma nasagoh keo nahi, nathisan lah a nakisai sai lai chu nageldoh hih hel jengin ahi.
“Nagit louna hichengse hi akichaisoh tengleh, Ohe, Ohe ada nahi! tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Nang ding mongin indan chung nung nakisemin, inning tina munsang nakiseme;
kholai vum tina munsang nakisemin, namel-hoichu kijohnan namang jin, avah le jouse koma nakitoh doh doh jengin, noti chona nachonna chu nabolbe be jengtai.
Nangma Egypt mite, nakinaipi mihuhho chutoh noti chonin nachonjin, keima phin lung hangna dingin noti chona nachonna chu nabolbe cheh cheh jenge.
Hijeh chun vetan, keiman nang dounan khut kalamin, nang chan ding chu kasumangtai, chule nang jeng jong namelmate, Philistinete chanute, nangma umchan jachatpi jing ho, deilam lamin kapedoh tan ahi.
Nachim joulou jeh-in Assyria mite jeng to jong noti chonin nachontai, hiti pi chun amaho chutoh noti chonin nachontan, ahinah vangin nachimjou hih laiye.
Chalde’a gamsunga mite to jong kiveina nabol khomuvin, hiti chun noti chona nachon chu nabol be jing jenge; ahinla hichan gei jong chun nachim deh poi.
Hitobang tah a nathilbol ho, jachat lam helou noti thilbol ho nabol chengse kimuta a, itobang tah a nalungthim hi angaicha geova um jing nalaiya hitam tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin;“
kholai tina indan chungnung nakisem in, in ningkoi lai jousea munsanga nakiseme. Ahivangin nangma noti tobangin naumpoi, ajeh chu thalah man peh ding nadeipoi.
Ajipa khela hetphah lou miho jong jonpi jeng numei, mito jongnu!
Pasal hon noti ho chu thilpeh tampi apengaiyin, nangin vang nadeichat miho chu thilpeh tampi napen, noti chona nachonpi ding, muntina kona naheng hinjon dingin ajol nauvin nehguh napenjon ahi.

Hijeh chun noti chona nachonna ho jenga jong hin numei dang ho sangin nachomhel jengin; koimachan jong noti chona chonpi dingin najui nom poi; nangjoh chun thalah man napeh ahin, min thalah man napepoi; hijeh chun nangma nachomhel jenge.
“Hichejeh chun Vo notinu, Pakai thusei hi ngaiyin;

Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, nakideipi toh noti chona nachonuva najamo akeova akijama, nasagoh keo chu pon khulouva aumjeh le, namilim doi semthu jouse jeh, chule hicheho nahouna nachate thisan jeh chun,

neihin vetan, hichejeh a chu keiman nanop sahpi chengse chu kakhop khomsoh a, nadei jouse leh nadeimo jouse kakhopsoh ding; muntina kona nang dou dinga amaho chu kakhop ding, amahon natahsa gohkeova naumsah-uva, hita chu nasagoh keo lai chu aboncha amudoh thei cheh dingu ahi.
Chutengle keiman kichen dan sukeh numei, thisan sosahnu tobanga nathu katan ding, nachunga lungsatna le thangsetna thisan kalhut khum ding nahi.

Chule nakideipi chengse khut’a kapehdoh ding nahin, amaho chun nangma indan chung nung chu volhu uvin tin, namunsang lai jouse avoh lhah diu, naponsil aboncha aho lhah-uva, nakijepna ahoi lai lai akilah mang diu, chutengle natahsa keole nasagoh keova nadalhah dingu ahi.
Nangma douna sepai honpi ahinpui diu, hiche ho chun songin nasep’uvin tin, chemjama nasattel dingu ahi.
Chule na-in jouse halvam uvin tin, numei tamtah mitmua nachunga thu ahintan diu ahi; keiman noti chona nachon chu kasuh tang ding nangin jong mi thalah man napeh kit louhel ding ahi.
Hita chu keiman nachunga lunghanna nachimset’a kapeh ding nahin, kathangsetna chu nakoma konin kitolmangin tin, keima kathip ding ahitan, lung hang kit taponge.

Ipijeh-inem itile nakhangdon lai nikho ho chu nageldoh tapon, thil hijatpi hin neilunghan sah jengtan ahi; hichejeh chun vetan, keiman nachonna jouse chu nalujanga kakhuh peh ding nahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye. Naum chan thet umtah tah ho chung chona chu jonna nabolbe hilou ham?
Vetan, koi hijongle thuchih seinom jousen nangma chung chang thudola hiche thuchih, ‘Achanu jong anu keh ahi’ kiti hi aman cheh ding ahi.“

Nangma nanu chanu mong nahin, nanun ajipa le achate anadeimo bolin ahi; chutengle nang hi nasopi numei ho sopi pi dia kilom mong mong nahin, amaho chun ajipateu leh achateu anadeimo bol cheh-uvin ahi. Nanu chu Hit mi anahin, napa chu Amor mi anahi.
Chule naunu chu Samar’ia ahin, ama chu achateu toh nang sah lam gamkaiya achenguve; chule nalhanglam gamkaiya achanute toh chengkhom Sodom hi na-naonu ahiye.
Ahin ama ho lamlhah jouse jui dingle athilbolu thet umtah tah ho jom ding khu nalungdei ahipoi; chomkah louvin jong nalamlhah jousea amaho sangin nase cheh jengtan ahi.
Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, na-naonu Sodom le achanuten jong nangle nachanuten nabol tobang lomuvin abol pouve.
Vetan, na-naonu Sodom themmona chu hiche hi ahi; ama le achanuten kiletsahna aneiyuvin, anneh aval aneiyuvin, nopsah nasatah aneiyun, ahivangin vaichate le alengvai te akithopi pouve.
Aolkan alamuvin keima angsunga thet umtah tah thil tampi aboluve; hijeh a chu keiman hiche hi kamudoh phat’a amaho katolmang ahitai.

Samar’ia in jong nangma chonset jat akeh khat jong abol poi; amaho sangin nangman thet umtah tah thil tampi naboljoi, nathilbol thet umtah tah ho jeh chun nasopi teni hi nang sanga dihjon nakimudoh sah jon ahi.

Vetda nachan chu kipoh jengtan, ajeh chu nangin nasopite ni chunga thutanna chu bailam jon nasemdoh tai; nachonsetna ho thet umtah tah a, ama ni sanga, nabolset joh jeh chun, ama ni hi nang sangin adihjon aume. Hijeh chun jah chan lang, vetda nachan chu kipoh jengin, ijeh-inem itile nangin nasopite ni chu them nachansah ahitai.

“Keiman amaho hamphatna chengse, Sodom le achanute hamphatna ahin, chule Samar’ia le achanute hamphatna ahin, semphat peh ing ting, chule amaho lailung tah a chu nang hamphatna jeng jong kasemphat peh ding nahi,
hitia chu vetda nachan nakipoh theiya, chule nathilbol chengse jala chu najahcha ding, amaho dinga jong lungdamna hi ding ahiye.

Nasopite ni vang chu Sodom jong achanute toh masanga agam luiyuva hung kilekit diu, Samar’ia le achanute jong masanga agam luiyuva hung kilekit ding ahiuve; chule nangle nachanute jeng jong masanga nagam luiyuva nahung kilekit diu ahi.
Nanaonu Sodom chu nakiletsah laiya nakamsunga seithang bep’a anaum hilou ham,
nagitlouna akihodoh masanga chu? Tun nang jong ama tobang nahitan, Edom chanute le avela chengte ding, Philistine chanute le akimuvela cheng, notthap’a nabolte dingin, houset ding bep nahitai.
Nangman najon man le nathilbol thet umtah tah ho man chu napoh ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Kihahselna notthap’a kitepna vokehnu, nangman nabol bang banga kabol ding nahi;“
ahivanga nakhangdon laiya nangto kakitepna chu kageldoh ding, chutengle nangto tonsot’a kitepna khat kaphudet ding ahi.

keiman nasopite ni, na-unu le nanaonu anigela chu, nangto kakitepna bang hihih jeng jongleh, kapuidoh a amani chu nachanu tobanga kapehdoh teng chuleh, nangman nalamlhah jouse kigeldoh-in natin najachat ding ahi.
Chutengle nangto kakitepna chu kaphudet ding, hichea chu nangman keima hi Pakai chu kahi nahetdoh ding ahi,
hichele chun geldoh-in natin, nakisuh lung dong ding, keiman nabolset jouse aboncha ka-ngaidam teng chuleh napaodoh ngam louhel ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Israel insung jah a thu tekah khat bolin lang chule thulem khat seiyin,

Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin seiyin: Muvanlai lentah khat alhaving teni lentah tah le alhagu teni jong alet’a len, amul jong jem tamtah a pol khat Lebanon lama ahung lengin Cedar thingleh vuma ahung chutai;
hiche chun alehvum pentah a ajih thah lih leh hung dondoh ho chu achulhan, hiche chu ahinpon, kiveina gamsung khat ahin lhut’in, kivei miho khopi sung khat’a agaphut’in ahi.
Chujouvin agamsunga muchi apon leiphatna a agatun, amuchi chu twi thalhinna koma atun ahi. Hampa jih don bangin atungin ahile,

ahung khangdoh paiyin lengpigui nemcha jamdoh thei khat ahung sohdoh tai, chule abah ho chu ama heng lam ngan ahung jamuvin, abulbal chengse vang chu akitun lutna muna chun aumden jinge. Hiti chun hiche chu lengpigui khat ahung sohdoh-in abah tampi ahinsep doh tan, ahung nalhatai.

Muvanlai lentah khatma alhaving teni alet’a len amul tam cheh khat anaum kit’in; chule vetan, hiche lengpigui chun muvanlai heng lama chun ajung ho chu ajamlut sah-in, chuti chun muvanlai chun twi achapji ji na dingin abah ho jeng jong ama heng lam ngan ajamuve. Akiphulutna kulsunga konin“
aman twi thalhinna leipha laiya chun aphut sonin, hita chu abah tampi ahung jamdoh a, aga ahung tamga theiya chule lengpigui minthang khat ahina ding, ati ahi.

Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin seiyin: Hiche hi hung hinpha ding hinam? Ajung ho abokanga chule abah ho asat lhah a anathah kisem jouse aboncha gopsoh hel jeng talou ding ham? Abulbal dunga kona bodoh jengna dinga chu ban-gol hattah, ahiloule mipi tamtah ngai louhel ding ahi.

Hijeh chun vetan, hiche hi akiphu chon teng chuleh hing thei ding hinam? Niso lam khohuiyin ahin mut tengleh pumgot’a gosoh hel ding, ahung khandohna kulsunga kona go-lha hel jeng ding hilou ham?” ati.
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Doumah mah bolji insung mite jah a chun seipeh tem in. Hiche thil ho hi ipi kiseina ahi nahetdoh tah um tin? Seipeh temin, vetan Babylon lengpa chu Jerusalema ahungin, alengpa le aleng chapate abonchan akaimangin Babylon khopi ahin lhut tai.
Chuin aman leng chilhah khat chu apuiyin amapa chutoh kitepna asemin, kihahsel nan akigah sah tai. Gamsunga mi luchangpen chu aman akai mangin,
hita hi lenggam kisunem ding, kichoisang lou ding, chule akitepna anit jeh a chubou ding thei mai mai ding ahi.

Ahinla aman Babylon lengpa douna dingin Egypt gama palai tampi asolin, Egypt miten sakol tampi le galsat ding sepai tamtah ahinpeh dingin angaitoi. Aman molso jou mong nantem? Hi tobang thil hopi bola mihem chu toldoh jou mong ding hinam? Aman kitepna chu asuh keh a chule toldoh thei ding ham?
Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, thon louhela ama leng chansah lengpa chenna mun, ahahsela anotthap pehpa, amapa toh kitepna asuh keh peh pa gamsung Babylona thi tei tei ding ahi.

Pharaoh lengpan asepaite nasatah le amite loi tamtah chutoh galmuna apanhu louhel diu, khopi delkhumna kemsang tampi akidoa, mihem hinkho tampi suhmangna dinga khopi umna ding pal tampi akikai teng jongleh huponte.
Ipijeh-inem itile aman kihahselna chu not thap’in aboltan, kitepna asukeh tai; hijeh chun vetan, aman akhut alhangin thil hichengpi hi aboldoh tai, ama toldoh louhel ding ahi.
Hichejeh a chu Pakai Pathenin hitia asei ahiye; Keima kahing jingnai, thon louhela aman anot thapsa kihahselna le asuhkehsa kitepna chu ama lujanga phu kalah tei tei ding ahi.
Keiman ama chu ka-len kakhu khuma ka-lenpal’a ohden ding, chutengle Babylon khopia kahin puilut’a, chule keima douna let eina kichupi jeh a chu achunga thu katan ding ahi.

Chutengle asepai lhentum jouse chemjama lou diu, chule ahingdoh chengse jong chu huipi lah a kithe mangsoh ding ahi; hichea chu nanghon Pakai kitipa keima hin kasei ahitai, ti nahetdoh dingu ahi, ati.“

Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: “Keiman katahsa tah a cedar thingleh vuma kona ajih don khat kabodoh ding, chule kadodoh a ajih donthah lih leh alehmong anem laiya ajih khat kasi lhah a, molsang vum asang lai khat’a kaphulut ding ahi;

Israel molsang chungvuma hiche chu kaphu ding, hichun abah tampi asepdoh a, gadoh ding, cedar thing loupi tah hungsoh doh ding ahi; aphung lim noiya chu sa namkim hung cheng diu ahin, abah ho lim noiya jong chu vacha namkim hung busa cheh diu ahiye.

Chuteng le loujaova thing phung jousen keima hi Pakai chu kahiya thingphung sang loinempa kahi chu ahetdoh dingu, chuta chu thingphung nemcha sansahpa, thing hing jong gotsah theiya, thing gosa jong hinsah thei kahi ahet diu ahi. Pakai kitipa keiman kaseidoh ahitan, hiche hi kaboltei ding ahi,” ati.
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Ipi natiule nanghon hiche thuchih hi Israelte gamsung thudola a vela nasei kit’uva, ‘Mipaten lengpithei thuh ananeuvin achateu ahajat lo gamtauve,’ natiu ham?
Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, nanghon hiche thuchih hi Israel sunga namankit louhel dingu ahi.
Ven, hinkho jouse hi keiya ahiuvin mipa hinkho hihen lang achapa hinkho hijongle keiya ahi cheh-e; ahinkhoa chonset bolpa vang chu thitei ding ahi.
Mihem khattou adih aum khah a chule dan lhinga thil abola dih achan khah a ahileh,

ama chun molsang chungvum dunga jong an aneh khah hih hela, ahilou jongle Israel insungin milimdoi asemthuho chu amit te nia jong avetda a, aheng akompa jinu jong asuh thang hih a, ahiloule numei khattou athi neipet’a a jot lutda a,
mihem khat cha jong abolgenthei hih a, asum abatpa henga chu asumpa lah chu alekit’a, guh chat abol khah hih a, agilkelte chu neh ding changlhah alelhah peh a, asagoh keova umte chu ponsil asilpeh a,
akan dinga thil ahomda a, akandoh imacha alah da, themmona thil bolna akhut tuh tang theiya, mihem kah a thu dih tah-a atana,
keima chondan hoa achona, chule kachonna danthu ho nitna dinga achih theiya ahileh, amapa chu adih ahitan, hing tei tei ding ahi; tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Ijem tia ama chun chapa khat ahindoh a, ama chu gucha ahung hiya, thisan sohat mi ahiya,“
hicheng toh ding kisei ho khat cha bol louva auma, molsangvum dunga an anehle lea, aheng akompa jinu asuh thangpeh-a,
vaichate le tahlelte bolgentheiya, guchajia, asumbat lesah kit lou, amit te nia milimdoi kisemthu ho velhi jing, thet umtah tah boldoh,

akan dinga sum phala, sumkan kilah jia, hitobang mi chu hing ding hinam? Hing louhel ding ahi. Aman hitobang thet umtah tah thil ho hi aboltai; ama chu thon louhela thi tei tei ding ahin, athisan ama chung ma ma chuding ahi.
“Amavang hiche mihem chun chapa khattou hing hen lang, achapa chun apa chonsetna chengse chu amudoh tengleh kicha hen hi tobang chun bolda jeng hen,
molsangvum dunga jong an neh bolda hen lang, amit te nin jong Israel insung milimdoi kisemthu ho chu vetda hen, aheng akompa jinu jong suh thangda hen lang,
koima adih louvin bolda hen, sumpa lah da hen, guchat bolda hen, amavang agilkelte an neh pehen lang, asagoh keova umte chu ponsil peleh,

themmona thil bolna din akhut tuh tang thei hen lang, sumkan ahiloule apungdoh kilah da hen lang, keima chondan thu ho chu juijo hen, kachonna dan hoa chun chonjo taleh, hichepa chu apa themmo jala thilou ding, hing tei tei ding ahi.
Ahin apa vang chu pumhat sana sum alah jeh, asopipa achomgam jeh, amite lah a thil phalou anabol jeh-a chu vetan, athemmo jala thi tei tei ding ahi.

Ahinla nanghon, ‘Iti monga mipa themmo jeh-a chu achapa genthei louding ham?’ natiuve. Chapa chun dan lhingset le adih-a thil anahola, keima chondan ho jouse chu ching thei tah a ananit’a ahileh, ama chu hing tei tei ding ahiye.“

Hinkhoa chonsepa chubou thi ding ahi. Chapa chu apa themmo jala genthei lou ding ahi, chapa themmo jala jong mipa genthei louhel ding ahi; midihpa dihna chu ama chungabou umding ahi, chule mi giloupa gitlouna jong ama chunga bou um ding ahiye.

“Ahin mi gilou khattou abolsa achonset chengsea kona chu ahung kilehei kit’a keima chondan ho jouse anit’a, dan lhingset adih chu abola ahileh, amapa chu hing tei tei ding ahi; hichepa chu thi louhel ding ahiye.
Ama douna dinga asuh khel chengse chu khat cha jong kigeldoh kit louhel ding ahi; dih channa anei athilbol jeh a chu hing tei tei ding ahi.
Mi giloupa chu alampia kona kiheidoh a hinna anei ding sanga, athilo chung changa chu keiman kipana kanei beh ham? tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

Chule midih chu adihna kona akihei manga, mi giloupan abolsa thet umtah tah thil abola themmona aboldoh teng leh ama jong chu hing thei ding ham? Aman abolsa adih ho chu khat cha jong kigeldoh peh louhel ding ahi; themmo achanna alep chena le chonset aboljeh a chu thi tei tei ding ahi.
Ahinla nanghon, ‘Pakai lampi hi adihpoi,’ tin naseiyuve. Vo Israel insung mite ngaiyuvin, keima lampi chu dih lou mong ham? Nangho lampi joh chu adih lou hilou ham? “
Midih jeng jong chu adihna kona akihei manga themmona aboldoh teng chuleh, hiche jeh tah a chu thi tei tei ding ahi; aman aboldoh themmona jeh a chu thitei tei ding ahiye.
Chujongle mi giloupa chu abolsa agitlouva kona akihei manga, dan lhingset le adih a thil abola ahileh, ahinkho ahuhhing ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile aman ageltoh a abolsa asuh khel chengsea kona kihei mangah ahitan, ama chu hing tei tei ding, thilou hel ding ding ahitai.
Ahivangin Israel insungin hitin aseiyuvin, ‘Pakai lampi chu adihpoi,’ atiuve. Vo Israel insung keima lampi ho chu dih lou mong ham? Adih lou chu nangho lampi joh hilou ham?

“Hichejeh a chu Vo Israel insung, keiman nangho amitakip ama ama lamlhah dungjui cheh a nathuu katan ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye. Lung kheluvin lang nasuh khel chengseuva konin hung kilekit’uvin, achutiloule themmona chu namanthah nau soh doh ding ahi.
Nanghon keima douna thil suh khel nanei cheng seu chu abonchan nanghoa konin paidoh soh heluvin lang, lungthah semuvin lhagao thah kengun! Ipi dinga namoh thi dingu ham, Vo Israel insung?
Ijeh-inem itile koimacha thi jeh-in keima kakipah hih hele, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, hijeh chun hung kile kit’uvin lang hinnan neiyuvin, ati.“
Nangman Israel leng chapate chung changa lunghemna bolin lang,
chule seiyin: Sakei hijat lah a nanu sakeipi chu itobang hiya, Ama chu sakeigol lailunga kola anoute nunga che ham!
Sakeipin anoute khatpen pen chu ahinvah khangin ahile, Hiche chu keichalgol khat ahung hidoh tai; Chule hiche chu sahing kimatje akithem chuh themin, Mihemte jong abahgam gam jengtai.
Namtin vaipin hiche douna chun pengkul ahinmut’uvin, Amachu akhuh sunguva alha lut’in, Chuin amahon hiche chu thih kol tampi abut’uvin, Egypt gamsung lama ahinkai tauve.
Sakeipin akisudong kahitai ti amua Akinepna abeitai, ti amudoh phat’in, Anoute lah a achom dang khat akilah kit’in, Hiche chu keichalgol khatma sohdoh din avahdoh kit tai.
Hiche chu sakei ho lah a chun akithol le len, Keichalgol lhingset khat ahung sohdoh tai; Chule hiche chu sahing matje akithem chuh themin, Mihemte jong abahgam gam tai.
Hiche chun akuIpi jouseu abulu lu jengin, Akhopi jouseu jong ahomkeovin alhagam tai; Chule ama chu ahung kisen tengle ahusan Agamle asunga cheng jouse atija gamtauvin ahi.
Chuphat’in namtin vaipin Ama lhah lutna dingin mun jousea pelpheng asonguvin, Alenpiu chu achunga ajal khumuva ahileh Ama chu akhuh sunguva aman tauve.

Thih kol tampi abupeh-uvin sapol sunga akhumuvin, Chuin Babylon lengpa henga ahin puilut tauve; Amahon kihenna insunga akailut’un, Israelte molsang chungvum dunga Aogin kithong chu Akijah kit louhelna dingin aboltauve.
Nanu chu lengpileiya lengpigui tobang anahin, Twiyin aban bana ahinson sonsah jin ahi; Twi thalhin jeh chun Abah jong athalhingin gajong agathei lheh-e.
Ajung ahampen tah chu vaipo pa din leng tenggolin apangin, Abah jing lei loi lah a chun akitungdoh vel vol jenge; Asan dan chu abah tampi tah lah a konin jong Ahung kimudoh peh jengin ahi.
Ahinla lunghan jeh-in lengpigui chu akibotdoh tan, Tola akisep lhan, niso lam khohuiyin asemgo tai; Aga jong akilouheo soh heltan, Ajung hampen, adoh sangpen jong agon, meiyin akavamtai.
Tun gammang lah a gamgo lah, leigo lah a Lengpigui chu akiphut’in ahi.

Aguiya konin meikong ahung kongdoh in, Abah jouse le aga akavamsoh tai; Hijeh chun hichea chu agui hamtah aumden tapoi, Vaipopa dinga tenggol jong aumtapoi. Hiche hi lunghemna ahin, ka-na hungsoh doh pai paiya ahitai.
Hiti hin thu asohtai, kum sagi lhin kum, lha nga lhinna, chuche lha, nisom lhinnin Israel upa mi phabep kahenga ahunguvin Pakai henga thudoh nei dingin kamasanga atou tauve.
Hichun Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, Israel upaho kihoulim pin lang chule ajah-uva hitin seiyin, Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye, ‘Nangho nahungu hi keima thudoh ding goa nahiuvam? Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, ‘Nanghon thu neidoh louhel dingu ahi ati,’ tin.
Nangin amaho thu hi natan ding ham, mihem chapa, nangin athuu natan mong mong ding ham? Chuti ahileh amaho hi apu apateu thilbol thet umtah tah ho chu hetsah-in lang,

chule amaho jah a chun seiyin, ‘Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman Israel kalhendoh nin Jacob insung chilhah koma kaki hahsel in, Egypt gama chun amaho henga kei le kei kaki phongin, ahenguva kaki hahsel in, ‘Keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu kahi’ tin kaseiye.

Hiche nikho chun keima akomuva kaki hahsel in, Egypt gama kona kapuidoh a amaho dinga kaholdoh peh sa khoiju le bongnoi lonna gam, gam jouse lah a gam loupi chungnung gama chu kapuilut ding nahiuve,’ kati.

Chujongle amaho jah a chun, ‘Namit’uvin avet nom tah tah thil deilou jouse chu paidoh-uvin lang, nangho jeng jong, Egypt mite milimdoi keisemthu ho hin kisuboh hih heluvin; keima hi Pakai nangho Pathen kahi,’ kati.

Ahivangin amahon keima doumah mah aboluvin, kathusei ana-ngai pouvin ahi; amit’uvin avetnom deilou tah tah thil-ho jong chu anapai doh deh pouvin. Egypt mite milimdoi semthu ho jeng jong chu adalha deh sampouve. Hichun Egypt gam lailunga achunguva kalungsat kasun lhah den jenga, kalunghan kalhut khum jeng ding hitam, tin kageltai.“

Hiche kabol chu keima min khohsahna kabol ahi, hita chu namtin vaipi achen khompi hou, chuche mite mitmu tah a ahenguva kakiphona amaho Egypt gama kona kahin puidohna ho ho henga chu kamin suhboh a aum louna ding kati ahiye.
Hiti chun keiman amaho Egypt gama konin kahin puidoh tan, gamthip gam chu kahin lhutsoh tai.
Keiman amaho kachondan thu ho kapen, hiche ho chu akinit jeh a mihemin hinna anei theina dingin, kachonna dan ho jouse kavetsah tai.
Hiche kalval chun keima hi amaho suthengpa Pakai chu kahi ti ahet theina diuvin, kei le amaho kah a melchihna dingin cholngah nikho jong hi kanapei.
