Ahinla gamthip noi jenga jong chun Israel insung miten keima doumah mah anaboltauve; kachondan thu ho bangin achonpouvin, mihemin anit’a ahintheina ding kachonna dan ho jeng jong asang tapouve, hiti chun keima cholngah nikho jouse jong melse tah-in asuboh tauve. “Chuphat’in amaho chu suh beihelna dinga gamthip noiya achunguva kalungsatna kasun lhah khum jeng ding hitam, tin kanageltai.
Hiche kabol chu keima min khohsahna kabol ahi, hita chu miho mitmu tah a amaho kahin puidohna, hiche miho namtin vaipi mitmua chu kamin suhboh a aumlouna ding kati ahi.
Amavang gamthip noiya chun amaho koma kakihahsel in, kapehsa gamsunga chu kapuilut lou ding nahitauve, khoiju le bongnoi lonna gam, gam jouse lah a gam loupipen gama chu; kati.

Ajeh chu amahon kachondan ho apaitauvin, kachonna danthu ho bangin achon pouve, chujongleh kei cholngah nikho jouse jong asubohgam tauvin ahi, ajeh chu alungthim uvin amilimdoi semthu hou chu alha ngai jing jenge.
Ahijeng vangin kamit te nin kanave thim thimin gamthip noiya chun sujong akisumangpon, beihelin jong kana lha sampon ahi.
“Gamthip noiya keiman achateu jah a chun thu kanaseiyin, ‘Napu napateu chondan thu hoa chun chon hih-uvin, chule achonna dan hou jong nitpeh dauvin, amilimdoi semthu houva jong chun kisuboh hih uvin.
Pakai kitipa keima hi na-Pathenu kahi; Keima chondan thu hoa hin chonjouvin, chule kachonna dan ho nit tupna dingin ching theiyuvin,
chule kei cholngah nikho ho jong sutheng uvin, chuta chu hiche ho hi nangho le kei kah a melchihna khat’a a pan theiya, Pakai na-Pathenu kahi hi nanghon nahetdoh theina dinguvin,’ kati.

Ahinla achateuvin keima doumah jeng anaboluvin, kachondan thu hoa chun anachon pouve, chule kachonna dan ho jong chu mihemin anit’a ahile hinna anei ding ahin, hiche ho jeng jong chu nit tupna dingin aching thei pouvin ahi; kacholngah nikho ho joh chu asuboh tauve. Chuphat’in gamthip noiya chun kalungsatna achunguva sunlhah khum jenga, chule kalunghanna chu achunguva boh khum jeng dingin kageltai.“
Ahivangin kakhut kakih kit’in, kamin khohsahna mai maiyin thil kaboltai; hita chu kamin hi ama ho kahin puidoh pet’a amit tah a anamusa namtin vaipi ho mitmua chu suhboh a aum louna ding kati ahi.
Hiche kalvalin jong gamthip noiya chun keima ahenguva kana-kihahsel in, ama ho chu namtin vaipi lah a kathe thanga, gamtin dapna kanei diu ahi,’ kati;

ijeh-inem itile kachondan hoa achon molsoh pouvin, kachonnadan thu ho jong asang pouve, chule keima cholngah nikho jouse jong asuboh tauve, amitmuvin apu apateu milimdoi semthu ho chu avelhi jing jeng e.
Achungchon in ama ho chu chondan phalou tampi kapen, hinna anei louhel diu chonna dan ho jong kapetai;
athilpeh hou amaho suhbohnan kaneiyin, timul thouva aumna diuvin, acha masapenu chu pumgo thilton ato-sah-in ahi; keima hi Pakai kitipa chu ahi, ti ahetdoh theina diuva hiche hi kabol ahi.

“Hichejeh chun mihem chapa, Israel insung jah a thu seiyin lang, ajah-uva Pakai Pathenin hi tin thu aseiye, tin seipeh in: ‘Hiche chung changa jong hin napu napateu vin eina taitomuvin, joule nal jengin einabol tauve.

Ajeh chu keiman ama ho peh dinga kakihahsel densa gamsunga chu kahin puilut phat’in, thinglhang sang amuphah chanuva kilhaina gantha thilto apeuvin, chule athiltou lung hanna chu ahinchoiyuvin, hikoma chun athil gimnamtuiyu chu athe jalun, chujongle juning alhi jiuvin ahi.
Keiman ajah-uva, ‘Nang ho gache na munsang lai chu ipi kitim?’ kati jeh chun, tuni geiyin hiche min chu Bamah akisah tai.

Hichejeh chun Israel insung jah a seiyin lang Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin seipeh temin: ‘Nang ho naki suhboh uva napu napateu umchan banga chu, athilbolu deilou tah tah nunga chu navamang diu hitam?

Nanghon thilto tampi kabol e, tia nachapateu pumgo kilhaina gantha banga natha tenguleh, tuni gei hin hiche namilimdoi semthu hou hin naki subohji tauvin ahi. Chuti ahile neidoh diuva kilom kahinah-am? Vo Israel insung mite? Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, nanghon keima neidoh louhel dingu ahi.
Nalungthim uva um, aumkha louhel ding lunggel, ‘Eiho jong namtin vaipi ho bang bangin umu hite, gamtina phungtin umchan bangin thing le song houtaute’ tia nagelu chu ipi kitina hitam?“
“Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, ‘Thon louhela khut hamtah le ban kilhung jangkeiya, chule lungsat kisunglha gei gui jenga keima nachunguva leng chang ding ahi.
Keiman mitin lah a konin nachom khomuving ting, khut hamtah le ban kilhung jangkeiya chule lungsatna puma nakithe chehnau gamtina kona kapuikhom ding nahiuve;
chutengle mitin namtinte gamthip noiya chu kapui lut’uva, hikoma chu kimaitoa nathuu katan ding ahi.
Egypt gamsunga gamthip noiya napu napateu thu katanpeh banga chu nangho thu jong katanpeh ding nahiuve. tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Moljol noiya kakijot doh sah diu, ajat jat’a kachesah ding nahiuve.

Nalah-uva doumah bol ho leh keima douna suhkhel tampi nei ho chu kalhen thengsela ama ho chu akho pemnau gamsunga kona kahin puidoh ding, ahivanga Israel gamsunga lut louhel diu ahi. Chutengle keima hi Pakai chu ahi. ti neihetdoh diu ahi.

Vo Israel insung, nangho dingin vang Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: ‘Cheuvin lang, namilimdoi semthuu chu tun jong khonung jongleh gaki limbol tauvin, kathusei na-ngai lou mong mong dingu ahileh; amavang keima mintheng chu nathilpeh chengseu hihen lang na milimdoi semthu hou chu hijongle khatcha chu asuhbohna nanei kit louhel dingu-ahitai.“

“Ijeh-inem itile keima lhang theng chung, Israel molsang chungvuma’tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, ‘hikoma chu Israel insung pumpi le abonchauva agamsunga chu keima kin jeng abol diu ahi; hikoma chu ama ho kakisan ding, nathilpeh chengseu le nalhentum thilto chengseu toh, nathiltou thengsel ho chutoh ka-ngeh khoh ding ahi.

Keiman nangho mitin lah a kakhop doh-uva, nakithe cheh nau gamtina kona kakhopsoh tenguleh agimnamtui lung lhaina thei thilto san banga kasan ding nahiuve; chule namtin vaipi jouse mitmua nalah-uva chu kathenna kaphondoh ding ahi.
Keiman napu napateu peh dinga kakihahselsa gamsung, Israel gamsunga chu kahinpuilut tenguleh, keima hi Pakai chu ahi, ti nahetdoh dingu ahi.
Chutengle nakisuh thangnau lamlhah jouse le nathilbol chengseu chu nageldoh dingu ahi; hichea chu nabolsau thilse chengse nakidah hel jeng diu ahitai.

Vo Israel insung, nangho thil bolset dungjui le nalamlhah gilouvu dungjui hilouva, keima min khohsahna mong monga kabol tenguleh, keima hi Pakai kitipa chu ahi, ti neihetdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye ati.“
Chujouvin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hi tin ati:
“Mihem chapa, lhanglam ngan lang, lhanglam dounan lhangphong tah-in thu seiyin, chule Negeb gamsunga gammang lah’ dounan gaothu seiyin.

Negeb gamsunga gammang gam jah ding chun seipeh-in lang, Pakai thusei ngaiyin: Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, ‘Neihin vetan, nalailunga mei kahal ding, hichun nalailunga keh, thinghing le thinggo akahvam jeng ding, ameikong pah lah lah chu kiphelmit lou ding, lhanglam gamkaiya pat sahlam gamkai geiya amai ngat jouse chu aleogot hel ding ahi.
Chutengle tahsaa hing jousen Pakai kitipa keiman hiche mei hi kahal ahi, ti amudoh cheh diu ahiye; hiche meikong chu kiphelmit louhel ding ahi ati.“
Chuphat’in keiman jong, “Ah, Pakai Pathen, amahon kei hi, ‘Hichepa hin thu tekah jengbou asemdoh doh hi lou ham? tin eisei tauve” kati.
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhung in hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Jerusalem lang ngan lang, chule muntheng jouse dounan lhang phong tah-in thu seiyin; Israel gamsung dounan gaothu seiyin lang
chujongleh Israel gamsung jah a chun seiyin. Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman nangma kadouvin, kachemjam apaiya kona kasadoh a nanga kona midih jong mi gilou jong kasat lhuh jeng ding ahi.
Keiman nanga kona midih jong mi gilou jong kasat lhuh ding ahijeh a chu kachemjam apaiya kona hung kitholdoh a tahsa a hing jouse lhanglam gamkaiya pat sahlam gamkai geiya adou doh peh ding ahi;
chutengle tahsaa hing jousen Pakai kitipa keima hin kachemjam chu apaiya kona kadodoh ahitai, ti ahetdoh diu ahiye; chemjam chu apaiya kinung khum kit louding ahi.
Hijeh chun mihem chapa, nangma lunggimin, miho mitmu hin lhase tap-in, nasatah-in lunggim jengin.

Chule miho chun nang jah a, ‘Ipi dinga hibanga nagim ham?’ tia aseiyuva ahileh, nangman Thu kithang jeh a ahi. Hiche thuthang chu ahung guilhun tengleh lungthim jouse jollhan tin, khut jouse jong ngoisoh ding, lhagao jouse lhadah ding, khupbuh jouse jong twinem banga nem ding ahiuve. Vetan, hichu ahunge, ahung guilhung ding ahitai’ tin,“” eiti. “
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
Mihem chapa, gaothu seiyin lang, Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, tin: Chemjam chu, chemjam chu akinol hemin, Chule akinolval tai;
Mithana dingin akinol hemin, Kolphet banga vallah lah dingin akinolval tai! Ahiloule eihon nom isah jing diu ham? Kachapa, nangman thinga kisem pou pou tenggol chu notthap’in nabol tai.
Hijeh a chu akimanchah theina dinga chemjam chu nol-hem dinga kipedoh ahitai; hiche chu mithahatpa khut’a peh doh dingin akinol-hemin akinolvalsoh tai.

Kap’in lang maovin Mihem chapa, ajeh chu hiche hi kamite douna kibol ahi; hiche hi Israelte leng chapate douna kibol ahi; ama ho chu kamite toh kilhonin chemjam a lou din akipeh doh thatauve. Hijeh chun nakhel bengin.
Ijeh-inem itile hiche hi patepna hilou ding ahi; nangman mol jong chu not thap’a nabol ahitah leh, hiche chun ipi aboljou ding ham?” eitin, Pakai Pathen chun aseiye.

“Mihem chapa, nangman gaothu seiyin lang, nakhut teni bengton lang chemjam chu nivei thum vei sat sah jengin, tha dinga umsa miho thana ding chemjam chu; hiche chemjam hi mi tamtah kithana ding, ama ho umkimsoh jeng chemjam chu ahin,

hijeh a chu alungthimu jollha jeng theiya, mi tamtah akelkot phung dunguva lhulham ding ahiuve, keiman chemjam val leu lou chu kapetai, khaye, hiche hi kolphet bangin akiphetsah tan, mithana dingin akinolval tan ahi.
Nachem hemin angatna lam lam jet le veiya thuh tah tah-in sat jengin.
Keiman jong kakhut bengin ting, kalung natna chu kalungdam jeng ding ahi; Pakai kitipa keiman thu kaseitai, ati.“
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, Babylon lengpa chemjam choite hungna ding chu lampi ni melchih jengin; alampi teni chu gamsung khat’a hung kilhungdoh gel hilhon ding ahiye. Chule melchihna dingin khom khat suijin lang, chutengle hiche khom chu khopi jotna lampi bula chun phut’in;
chule chemjam choite chu Ammon mite Rabbah khoa ahungna diule, Judah gama ahungna diu, kulpi kikai khum Jerusalem khopia ahungna diuvin lampi chu melchih peh-in.
Ijeh inem itile Babylon lengpa chu lamsoma lambula chun ading dentan, phunsan dingin a got; a man athalchang ho chu aloh loh-in, teraphim doi chu asanin, sathin chu asanin avetai.

Akhut jetlama chun aphunsan chu ahung chun, Jerusalem delkhuma, akam akat’a kholhang asapna ding, othongje jua kho asap’a, kelkot jouse vohchimna ding moljol kigoltoh a, kemsang tampi kidodoh a, inting sang tampi sahdoh dingin aphatai.
Ahinla ama ho ding chun jouthua phun kisan danin akilangin, ama ho chu giltah in akihahsel tauvin ahi; hijongle aman athemmonau chu agel dohsah ding, hita chu gal-hinga kimandoh soh thei ding ahiuve.

Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Nanghon nathemmo nau chu geldoh kit dinga nasemdoh tah jeh-uvin, hichea chu nasuhkhel chengseu jong kihohdoh soh ahitai, hita chu nathilbol jouseuva nachonset chengseu ahung kilahdohna dingin; ajeh chu nanghon nageldoh kit’u ahitah jeh-in, hichengsea chu nakimanchah diu ahi.“
Chule nangma, Vo miboh, mi giloupa, Israelte leng chapa, nanikho hung lhungta, achaina talen namatna ding phat hung lhungsa mipa;
Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Delkop chu ladoh-in lang, lallukhuh chu lalhan; thil jouse chu a um ngai bang banga um jing louhel ding ahi; anem chu choisangin lang chule asanga chu sunem in.
Khogem jeng, khogem jeng, khogem jeng kahisah ding; achang ding monga kilompa chu ahung lhun masanga ahalsi jeng cha jong kiholdoh louhel ding ahi; hichepa chubou kapeh ding ahi.

“Vo Mihem chapa, nangman gaothu seiyin lang, Pakai Pathenin Ammon mite chung thu le ama ho housetna ding chun hitin thu aseiye, tin seiyin; seipeh tan, chemjam chu, chemjam chu, mithana dingin akidoh doh tai, vah lah lah-in akinolval in, kolphet banga phetsah dingin aume,
amahon nang dingin muneina alhem jeng amuvin, ajou jouvun phun nasanpeh-uvin ahi, atalen matna diu phat hung lhunga, athina diu nikho hung lhungsa miboh, mi giloute ngonga khai dingin nagouve.
Apaiya nung khum kit’in. Nakisemdohna mun, nakondohna gamsunga chu nathu katanpeh ding nahi.
Chule nachunga kalung himo na kasun lhah khum ding, kalungsatna meikongpi chu nachunga kasemlhah khum jeng ding nahi; chujongle mi nunsete, misumanga themtah ho khut’a kapeh doh ding nahi.
Nangma meiya tithei meithinga napan bep ding, gamlailung tah a chu nathisan long ding, nakigeldoh kit louhel ding nahitai; ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin thu aseitai, atin ahi. “
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, nangman thu natan mong ding ham, hiche thisan lonna khopi chunga hi thu natan ding ham? Chuti ahileh athilbol thet umtah tah ho chu akhopi jah a seidohpeh soh helin.
Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tia naseipeh ding ahi: Akholai lunga thisan sosah khopi chule akisuhbohna dinga milimdoi tampi kisemthu khopi chu amanthahna ding phat hung lhung theiyinte!

Thisan naso jeh chun themmo nachangtan, chule milimdoi tampi nasemdoh ho chun nakisuboh tai; hijeh chun namanthahna ding nahintol nai cheh cheh tan, nang dinga kum kitep phat chu ahung lhungtai. Hichejeh chun nang hi namtin vaipi dinga houset ding bep’in kasemin, gamtin dinga totna ding bep’in kakoitai.
Nakom naicha um ho hihen lang, chule nanga kona gamla um ho hijongle natot thang thang diu ahi, minthanna bei, thunoh dimset khopi.
Vetan, nakhosunga Israel leng chapate chu, atha hatna dungjui cheh-in thisan so dingin akun cheh tauve.“

Mipa le minu jong nakho sunga chun thangset sumin akibol genthei tan, kholjin hungvah le jong chu nakho lailung tah a sum akilahpeh peh nan agenthei lheh tai; nakholaiya chun paloute leh meithai ho chu adih louvin akibolgam tauve.
Nangman keima thil theng ho chu nanot thap soh tan, kacholngah nikho jouse jong nasuboh gamtai.
Nakholai dunga chun mi setna ding jenga thuseiya thisan sosah dingbou gela mihem aumuvin, nakhosunga chun molsang dung tina doi-an nele lea mihem aumuve; nakhosunga mihuh tah tah aumdoh tauve.
Nakho sunga mihon apateu del asut lhah peh-uvin atahsa keovin alhatsah-uvin, nakholaiya chun numei thi neipet chu asujum tauve.
Pasal khat chun aheng akompa jinu toh thet umtah tah chonset aboltan, adang khatman akitimlel manin amounu jeng jong asuthang tai; achom khatma chun apa chanu lhel lhel asopinu asuthang tan ahi.

Nakho sunga chun mihon thisan sosahna dingin nehguh akilahuvin, nangma jengin jong sumkan le apung nakilah jin, pumhat sanin sum nalan naheng nakompa chunga phatchom naholdoh tai; hiti chun keima neisumil heltai, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
“Vetan, nangin lung dih loutah a phatchomna naholdoh jeh le nakholaiya thisan kiso jeh chun kakhut tum teni kajelin ahi.
Nathahat’in athohjou mong ding hina, ahiloule kahinbol nikho chuleh nakhut teni chun athat jou mong ding hinam? Pakai kitipa keiman kasei ahitan, hiche hi kabol tei tei ding ahitai.
Namtin vaipi lah a kadel mahthah ding, gamtina kadel le le jeng ding, nakho sunga nabohna chu kaval mang ding ahi.
Chule nangma jeh a namtin vaipi mitmua nang le nang nakisuhdoh ding, chutengle keima hi Pakai kitipa chu ahi, ti nahetdoh ding ahi, ati.“
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Israel insung hi kei dingin thih-eh bep ahitai; abon chauvin, dangka le sum-eng, langva le thih chule hah, meilhum sunga umsa tobang ahiuvin, thih-eh asohgam tauve.
Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Nabon chauva thih-ehsohgam nanahiu ahitan, hijeh chun neihin vetan, keiman Jerusalem lailunga kakhop khom ding nahiuve.

Mihemin meilhum sunga dangka, sum-eng, thih, hahngeh, langva akoiya mei atikhuma ajol lhahna dinga jap am ding agot banga, nangho hi kalunghan jeh le kalungsatnaa chu kakhop khomuva kalungsat meikong tobang sunga chu kakoiyuva kajol lhah sah ding nahiuve.
Keiman nakhom khomuving ting, kalungsatna meikong tobang chu nachung uva kahin jam ding, alailunga chu najol lhah soh hel diu ahi.
Meilhum sunga dangka ajol lhah banga nangho jong alailunga chu najol lhah diu ahiye: chutengle keima hi Pakai chu ahi, nachunguva kalungsatna hinsun khumpa ahi, ti nahetdoh dingu ahi ati.“
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, agamsung jah a khun seipeh-in, nang hi gamthenglou nahin, lung himo nikhoa gotwi kichap khum banga kichap jing nahi.

Nagam sunga naleng chapate jong hi sakei kisen sen jeng tobang ahiuvin, sahing mana teljeng junga bottel jeng ahiuve; mihem hinkho jeng jong a val lhumtauvin, thil kikhol jouse leh thil mantam tah tah ho jong akilah tauve; agamsunga khun mi tamtah ameithai sahgam tauvin ahi.

Agamsung thempu hon jong keima danthu chu pumhat’a bol agouvin, keima thil theng ho chu asuboh gamtauve; thil athengle moh thil mai mai chu asepkhen chom tapouve, chule thil athengle aboh kikhenna jong ahilpouvin, kacholngah nikho jouse adonda tauve, hijeh chun keima jong ama ho lah a chun eimoh suhboh lo tauvin ahi.
Agamsunga aleng chapate chu kamkeite tobangin, sahing akimat’u abottel tel jenguvin, thisan asouvin, adih louva phatchomna neidohna din mi hinkho asumang mang jenguve.
Athemgao ho jong chu abang bangin akijem uvin, mu neina alhem lhem aboluvin, mi ho dingin ajou jouvun phun asanpeh jiuvin, ‘Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye’ atiuve; Pakaiyin bon thu seikha louhela.

Gamsunga miten pumhat’a sum lahpeh ding jeng abolun, michom gam dingbou aboltauve; mivaichate leh atahlel te chu abol gentheiyuvin, asuhto pi ding beihelin kholjin mia konin pumhat sanin sum ala la jenguvin ahi.
Agam chu kasuh manghel louna ding tin, ama ho lah a chun apal gena tungdoh ding leh agamsung dinga ka-masang akeh laiya pang dingin mi kahol vangin khat cha jong kamudoh deh poi.
Hijeh chun kalung himona kanot khumin, kalungsat meikong tobang chun ama ho kaleogep jengin ahi; achonna lamlhah bang bangin alujang uva kale khuhpeh-in ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye, ati.“
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, numei ni minu khatseh chanu ni aum lhonin ahi;

amani chu Egypt gamsunga notin apang lhonin, anu-ngah til lai lhona pat notia hung pang ahilhon tan, anoi teni lhon min ameh peh-in, aop lhon thengsel jeng jong chu min khut thah lhau nan amang tauve.

Aunu chu amin Oho’lah ahin, anaonu min chu Ohol’ibah ahi. Chuin amani keiya ahung hikha lhon tan, chapa tampi chanu tampi ahing lhontai. Amin lhon chu ahileh. Oho’lah hi Samar’ia kiseina ahin, chule Ohol’ibah chu Jerusalem kiseina ahiye.
Keiya ahipet’in Oho’lah chu notin ana pangin, adeichat Assyria mite chunga analung lut lheh jenge,“

ponsandup’a kivon gal-hang ho ahiuvin, gamvaipo ho leh sepai lamkai ho ahiuvin, abon chauva hideichat thei lomtah tah gollhang hoilai jeng ahiuvin, sakol touthem tah tah ahiuvin sakolte chunga ahung touvun ahi.
Hiche Assyria mi lhentum ho chu noti chona achonna abuh lhah khumin, alung lutna milimdoi kisemthu jouse chutoh akisuboh tan ahi.

Egypt gamsunga aum laiya pat’a anabol jingsa noti chona achonna chu atang thei tapoi; ijeh-inem itile anu-ngah til laiya chu amanu hi pasal jousen analuppia, anoi thengsel jong chu anameh peh-uva, ahuhnau jouse achunga anabuh lhah khumu ahitai.
Hichejeh a chu alung lutna mite, Assyria miho, adeichat miho khut’a kapehdoh ahitai.

Hiche miho hin atahsa gohkeo ajamo ponsil ahohdoh jenguvin, achapate leh achanute aman’uvin, chule ama jeng jong chemjamin asat lih tauve; hijeh chun achunga thutanna akibol phat’in numei ho lah a kihoulim nopna bep’in aumdoh tai.
“Anaonu Ohol’ibah chun hiche hi amudoh tan, ahivangin alung lutna le noti chona achonnaa chun asecheh-in, asopinu sang chun akhoh cheh jon ahi.

Assyria mite chunga alung lut behseh jengin, gamvaipo ho ahin, sepai lamkai ho chung ahin, galvon lhingset’a kivon gal-hang ho chung ahin, sakolte chunga touho chung ahin, abonchauvin ngaichat chat thei gollhang jengcha ahiuve.
Chule ama asuhboh-u kamudoh tai; chujongle ama ni chu achonna lhon thakhat khat ahiye.
Noti chona achonna chu abolbe cheh jengin, banga pasal lim kisem ho chu amudoh-in, Chalde’a mite lim ho asanvalleova kisema,
ataiyuva konggah kigah cheh a, alujanguva kona delkop hung kikhai lhasoh hela, abon chauva pipu banga kimu cheh-uva, Babylon mite milim kisem, apennau gam chu Chalde’a gam ahi.
Hiche ho chu amudoh phat’in alung lut behseh jengin, hijeh chun Chalde’a gamsunga akoudin sottolle mi anasoltai.
Hijeh chun Babylon mite chu kideina jalkhun chunga ahenga ahung lut’uvin, ahuh behseh jeh uvin a manu chu asuthang tauve; asuhthang phat’uvin, ahenga konin ahung kilep’in ahung kilekit tai.
Noti chona achonna chu lhang phong tah a abola, jahmo tah a atahsa goh keova aum phat’in asopinu koma kona kakihei mang bang chun akoma konin kakilep’in kakihei mangtai.
Ahivangin noti chona achonna chu ahabolbe cheh jeng tan, anu-ngah laiya Egypt gamsunga noti chona achonna jong chu ageldoh jin ahi.
chule ajon thanhoina alung lutval jin, ati kisel lai ho jong sangan hoa toh abangtan, abotwi longdoh jong chu sakolte botwi tobang ahiye.
Hiti chun nangman nanu-ngah tillaiya nahuhna, Egypt miten na-oplhang khut thah lhauna aneiyuva, nanoi teni a hung boh tilcha nameh peh jiu chu nalha ngai jing jengtai, ati.“

Hichejeh chun Vo Ohol’ibah. Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye; “Vetan, nahung kilepdoh a nadalhah nadeichat ho chu nangma dou dinga kahin tildoh peh ding, nang dou dinga sah le lhang, jet le veiya kona kahindel khumsah ding nahi;

Babylon mite ahin, Chalde’a mite ahiuvin, Pekod mite le Sho’a mite, chule Ko’a mite ahiuvin, Assyria mite aboncha ahiuvin, akilhon piu chu dei thei tah tah gollhang jeng ho leh gamvaipo ho le alah-uva sepai lamkai ho ahiuvin, pipu ho leh gal-hang ho, abonchauva chu sakol touthem jeng ahiuve.

Ama ho hi kangtalai lampi le sakolkang tampi toh mihonpi tamtah toh sahlam gamkaiya kona nang dou dinga hung kitol ding ahiuve; nangma dou dinga muntina kona hung kitol diu, lum le pho, thih lukhuh kenga hung kon ding ahiuvin, ama ho chu thutanna kapehdoh ding, ama ho thutan ngai dungjuiya nathu atan dingu ahi.

Nachunga kalung himo jing ding ahin, hijeh a chu amahon lunghang tah a nabol diu ahi. Nanah thong le nabilkol teni sat lhauvin tin, chule nanga kona ahingdoh chengse jong chu chemjama lou soh hel ding ahiuve. Nachapate jouse le nachanute abonchan kimat’uvin tin, nanga kona ahingdoh chengse jong chu meiyin akahvam diu ahiye.
Naponsil jouse jong hoh lhauvin tin, nakijepna sum-eng pah hoitah tah ho jong akilah diu ahi.

Hita chu keiman nahuhna le notia napanna, Egypt gama kona natolkonpi chu kasuhbei peh ding, hijeh a chu nakhoda a Egypt mite namit teni jenga jong navel louhelna ding, ama ho chu gel jeng jong nageldoh kit louhelna ding ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Neihin vetan, nangman nahotah mite, nahung kilep manga nadalhahsa mite khut’a chu kale pehdoh ding nahi:

chutengle amahon nahotbol uvin tin, nacholman aboncha akilah diu, natahsa keole nasagoh keoseh a nadalhah diu noti chona nachonna natahsa jong chu akeoseh a, pon khukhum louva adalhah diu ahi. Nahuhna le notia nachonna chun
hiche hi nachunga ahinpoh lut ahitai, ijeh-inem itile nangma namtin vaipi jouse toh noti chonin nachon jin, ama ho milimdoi ho chun nang le nang nakisuboh tai.
Nang jong nasopinu lampia nachetan, hijeh a chu ama don ding khon chu nangma khut’a kapeh ding ahi.
Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: “Nangman nasopinu khon lentah le thuh tah a chu nadon ding, Tamtah adonjou jeh a chu nuisat le seiset’a na um ding ahi;
Nangma ju nakhama nalung gim lheh jeng ding, Nasopinu Semar’ia donna khon chu Kidah dah umtah khon, Akeohela kijamna ahiye;
Nangman hiche chu nadona chule nachop kang ding, Chule nasam nabodoh-a nanoi teni nameh keh ding ahi: Ijeh-inem itile keiman thu kaseitai, Tin Pakai Pathenin aseitai.
Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Nangin neisuhmil hela nanung lam sena neinei ahitan, hichejeh a chu nahuh man le notia napan man nakipoh ding ahiye,” ati.
Pakai chun kajah a thu aseiyin, “Mihem chapa, nangman Oho’lah le Ohol’ibah thu natan ding ham? Chuti ahileh amani jah a khun athilbol lhon thet umtah tah ho chu phondoh peh-in.

Ijeh-inem itile amani mitoh ajong lhonin, akhut teni lhona jong thisan abeh-e; amilimdoi semthu ho lhon chutoh ajong lhonin ahi; amanin keitoh kahinu chapate jeng jong chu milimdoi ho neh ding chun atohdoh jeng lhonin ahi;
Akalval cheh chun amanin kahenga hitin thil abol lhon tai; hiche nikho ma ma chun kamuntheng asuboh lhonin, kacholngah nikho jouse jong asuboh lhontai.
Ajeh chu amilimdoi semthu ho henga kilhaina dinga achapate atha nilhon, hiche nikho ma ma chun kamuntheng suboh dingin ahung lut lhonin ahi. Chule vetan, ka-insunga athilbol lhon chu hiche hi ahiye.

Amanin kholgamla kona pasal ho gakou thu jeng din jong ahenguva sottolle ho anasol jeng lhonin, hijeh chun vetan amaho chu ahungtauve. Ama ho mu dingin nakisiljol selin, namit te nia lou na kinupah-in, pahjem ho chun nakijemin ahi;
chuin jalkhun loupitah chunga chun natouvin, amasanga chun dokhan akidon, achunga keima gimnamtui le thaotwi nakoiye.

Imacha khohsah louhel mipi ogin husa chu akoma akiveiden jengin, gammang noiya konin mihem pasal jukham ho chu ahin puilut tauve; ama ho chun numei ho khut dunga chaojang abupeh-uvin, chule lallukhuh hoitah tah aluchunguva akhuhpeh-uvin ahi.
“Hichun keiman kaseiyin, Pasal ho chu amanu hito noti chona achon tenguleh a ajonga hilou hiuvam?
Ajeh chu amanu henga khun, pasal ho noti numei ho henga agalut banguvin, agalut jiuvin ahi. Hiti chun amaho numei huhtah Oho’lah le Ohol’ibah henga agalut’uvin ahi.

Hijeng jongle midih ho chun amani thu hi mito jong ho thu kitan banga ahintan khum dingu, thisan sohat numei ho thu kitanna banga a tan dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile ama ni hi mijong ahilhonin, akhut teni lhona jong thisan abeh-e, ati.“
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathenin hitin ati: “Amani hi mi tamtah hinpui lut peh-in lang tijat umtah le asesan umdoh sah jengin.
Chule mihonpi chun amani chu songin sep’uvin tin, achemjamuva asattel jeng dingu ahi; achapateu leh achanuteu athagamuva, ain jouseu aboncha ahalvam jeng dingu ahi.
Hitia chu gamsunga huhna kasuh tang ding, chutengle numei jouse kigihsal theiya, nangni bol banga hi huh mana jon abol lou dingu ahi.
Chujongle nangni huh man chu nachung lhona kidel ding, chule milimdoi houva nachonset manu chu nangnin nakipoh ding ahi, hichea chu keima Pakai Pathen chu kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Kumko lhin kum, lhasom lhinna, chuche lha, nisom lhinnin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, tuni nikho, hiche nikho mong mong hi amin jihdoh temin. Babylon lengpan hiche nikho le lea hi Jerusalem anaum khum jeng ahiye.
Chujongle doumah mah bol insung mite jah a chun thu tekah khat seipeh-in lang ajah-uva, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin: Bel khat songdoh-in, bel chu songdoh tan, Asunga chun twi jong sung dimin;
Bel sunga chun sa malpansa chu lhah lut’in lang Sachan phalai lai, amalphe le adahphe jong; Bel sunga chun Agu achang hoilai lai lhah dimset’in,
Kelngoihon lah a ahoipen chu man inlang, Anoiya chun thingtum ho goltoh-in; Sa malpansa chengse chu honin lang, Agu achang jouse chu sou let lut’in honsouvin.

Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Ohe ada nahi, thisan sohat khopi asunga thih-eh behsa sahel, asunga kona thih-eh koh lhalou sahel! Lhentum beihelin alah a kon chun a bat bat’in ladoh temin.“
Ajeh chu akhopin thisan aso chu akholaiya along nalaiye; ajeh chu songpi chung angim lai laiya alonsah-in, leivuiyin achup mangna dingin tola asung lhapoi.
Kalungsatna phulahna dingin keiman akhopi thisan sosah chu akivuh mang louna dingin songpi chung angim lai laiya kakoiye.
Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Ohe ada nahi, thisan sohat khopi! Keiman jong vum the thua kaset thom ding ahi.
Thingtum ahon hona kaset khoma chule mei kachokonga saphe chu phatah a kahon ding, atwi jong kason kanghel ding ahi, chule agu achang jouse jong chu kakahvam sah jeng ding ahiye.
Chujou tengle mei-am lah a kona kaheidoh a kakoidap ding, chutengle sum-eng bel chu hung kan tin, anen jouse jollha soh a chule athih-eh jong chu kavamsoh ding ahi.
Panna beiya keima kisugim kahin, athih-eh sa bet but’a kaiden jeng chu meiyin jong akalhajou deh tapoi.
Anen chu nangma huh chonna nen chu ahiye. Kanasop theng thei nahitan, nanen jousea bohsa nahijeh chun, nachunga kalunghan achim kahsea nakisop theng louhel ding ahitai.

Pakai kitipa Keiman thu kasei ahitan, hung guilhung tei tei ding, hiche hi kaboldoh ding ahi; kakinung lekit lou ding, khen jong kanei louhel ding, kalung kakhel louhel ding ahiye; nache na ho dungjui le nathil bol ho dungjuiya nathu katan ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.
Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, neihin vetmin keiman namit tenia navetnom thil chu khatvei seh seh kajep’a kalah mangpeh ding nahi; hijongle nalunghem lou ding, ka jong naka lou ding chule namit lhi jong hung longlha louhel ding ahi.
Oging louva giltah a hahsa nathoh a, mithi jong nalunghempi lou ding ahi. Nadelkop kikop’in lang, nakengchot teni kichot’in, nakam kisip dan lang, lunghem miho changlhah neh dan, eiti.“
Hijeh chun keiman jingkah chun mipi henga thu kaseiyin ahileh, nilhah lamin kajinu athitai. Thu eikipeh bang chun ajing jingkah chun chutiman kabolin ahi.
Mipin kajah a aseiyuvin, “Hiche thil ho hi kei ho dinga ipi kiseina ham, neiseipeh lou diu ham, nangman hitobanga thil naboIpi hi?” eitiuvin ahi.
Hijeh chun ajah-uvah, “Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

Israel insung mite seipeh tan, Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Neihin vetan, thaneitah a nahoitho nau muntheng, namit te nia navet nomu, nalungthima nalha ngaiyu khu kasuhboh ding ahi; chujongle nachapateu le nachanuteu nadalhah chengseu chu chemjama lousoh ding ahiuve.
Keiman kabol bang banga chu nanghon jong nabol dingu ahi; nakamu nakisip lou diu, chujongle alunghemte changlhah jong, naneh peh lou diu” ahi.

Nalujanguva nadelkot nakikop cheh dingu, nakenguva kengkoh nakibusoh dingu ahi; lung jong nalunghem lou diu, ka jong naka lou dingu, nathemmo nauva chu namoh lung lhahsam gam diu, khat le khat nakilunghem to dingu ahi.

Chule nangho dinga Ezekiel hi melchihna khat’a hung pang ding, ama thilbol bang banga chu nanghon jong nabol dingu ahi; hiche hi ahung guilhun tengle keima hi Pakai Pathen kitipa chu kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi,’ tin aseiye.
“Mihem chapa, nangma henga hi akuIpiu kalahpeh nikho, akipanau le aloupinau kalahpeh nikho, amit’uva avetnomu le adeichat chat’u chule achapateu le achanuteu kalahpeh phat,
hiche nikho chuleh mivah thai khat nahenga hung lhunga athusoh chu ahung seidoh ding ahi.

Hiche nikho chuleh nakam kikam tin mivah thaipa henga chu thu naseidoh thei ding, paomoa naum kit louhel ding ahitai. Hita chu nangma ama ho dinga melchihna khat’a naumdoh ding, chutengle ama hon Pakai kitipa chu keima hi kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi, ati.“
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhung in hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Ammon mite heng lam chu ngan lang, ama ho dounan gaothu seiyin.

Chule Ammon mite chu seipeh-in lang, ‘Ngaiyuvin Pakai Pathen thusei hi: Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, Nanghon keima muntheng akisuboh chung chang, Israel gamsung akidalhah thip chung chang, chule Judah insung mite sohchanga anachepet’uva chu, ‘Aha’ tia naseiyu ahin,“

hichejeh chun neihin vetan, keiman nisolam mite chan dinga kapehdoh ding nahin, ama ho chun nakoma ngahmun tampi asemuva, nalailunga chengden jeng ding ahiuve; chujongle nalousoh neuvin tin, nabongnoi jeng jong adondiu ahi.

Keiman Rabbah kho chu sangongsaote lhat le na dinga hamhing lah jeng kahisah ding, Ammon mite khopi jouse jong kelngoi honte hongsung dinga kasempeh ding ahi. Chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi.
Ijeh inem itile Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Nangman nakhut nabeh a, nakengto teni nata a Israel gamsung douna nalungthim a thilse chujat navop’a kipah thanom nahin,

hichejeh chun, neihin vetan, nangma douna kakhut kalhana, nanghi namtin vaipi hon achomgam dinga kapehdoh ding; mitin lah a nangma kasat lhah ding chule gamtina kamanthah sah a, kasuh mangding nahi. Chutengle keima hi Pakai chu ahi ti neihetdoh ding ahi.
“Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Moab chun, ‘vetan Judah insung jong khu namdang ho tobang bep ahibouve,’ tia asei ahin;
hichejeh a chu keiman Moab hi ajet avei, akhopi ho, agamgi chin lam, gamsung loupina mun ding, Bethjesh’imoth ho Ba’al-me’on, Kiriatha’im, aboncha akeova kajam soh hel ding,
nisolam mite lo dia Moab hi Ammon mite toh kapeh ding, namtin vaipi lah a geldoh a umkit louhel ding ahi;
hitia chu Moab chunga thu kitan ding ahiye. Chutengle keima hi Pakai chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.
Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Vetan Edom chun Judah insung dounan lhingset’in phulah abolin, achunguva phu alah chu melsetah-in aboltai;“

hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hi tin thu aseiye: Keiman Edom douna khut kalhah ding, agamsunga chu mihem le gancha kasuh gama, ahomkeova kakoi ding ahi; Temana pat Dedan geiya chemjama lousoh hel ding ahiuve.
Chule keiman kami Israelte kaman chah a Edom chunga phu kalah ding ahin, keima lunghan dungjuile kalungsat dungjuiya abol dingu ahi; chutengle katompanna ahetdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
“Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Philistine miten lhingset’a phu alah-uva, lungthim gilou tah a achaina beihela kivetda nadia mi suhmangna phulah abolu ahin;

hichejeh tah chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, Neihin vetan, keiman Philistinete douna khut kalap ding, chule Cher’eth mite kasat gama chule twikhanglen pang dunga chengte jong kasuhmang ding ahi.
Keiman achunguva lungsatah-a phu nasatah a kalah ding ahi. Chutengle amahon achunguva phu kalah teng chuleh keima hi Pakai kitipa chu ahi, ti ahetdoh diu ahi. ati.“
Kum somle kum khat lhin kum, lha sunga nikho masapen nin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, Tyre hin Jerusalem chung chang thudola hi, ‘Aha, mitin lutna kelkot akitum bongtai, kei dingin kot lentah-in akihong kadah tai, Jerusalem akeova kijam ahitan, keigam dimset’a mi hung cheng ding ahi,’ tia asei ahitan;
hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Neihin vetan, Vo Tyre, nangma kadou nahiye; twikhanglen in atwidil tamtah ahintol banga khu nangma dou dinga namtin vaipi tamtah kahin tol lut ding ahi.
Hiche ho chun Tyre kulpi abonchan sumangun tin, chule aintingvum jouse jong avoh lhuhsoh diu ahi; agamsunga kona aleiset leipha jouse kakhodoh ding, songlheo keoseh a kajam ding ahi.

Tyre chu twikhanglen lailunga kitol lut’a, len phouna bep’a kimang ding ahi; ijeh inem itile keiman thu kaseitai, tin Pakai Pathen in aseiye; chujongle Tyre chu namtin vaipi kichomgam ding bep’a hung umdoh ding ahi;
chule agamsunga mi chanute, gamlai lunga um ho jeng jong chu chemjama lousoh diu ahi. Chutengle ama hon keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman Tyre hi sahlam gama kona Nebuchadrez’zar, Babylon lengpa, leng jouse lengpa chuleh, sakol tampi toh kangtalai tamtah to, sakol touthem mite leh sepai tamtah kahin lonvuh sah ding ahi.“
Hichepa chun gam lailunga um nachanute aboncha chemjama asat lih ding, nangma delkhumna dinga khopi umna kulpi nakai khuma, kemsang ado ding, chule lum tampi aset thoma inkisa a bahsah jeng ding ahi.
KuIpi vohchimna dingin akhetbuh sem ho chun nakuIpi jouse vochimin tin, chule aheicha hoa chu nakulbuh jouse atuhlhuh jeng ding ahi.

Asakolte chu tam behseh jeng ding, aleivui palkhut’u chun navuh khum hel ding, khopi kitumkehsa sung khat’a mi ahungpet banga khu, ama chu nakelkot dunga ahunglut tengleh, sakol touthem ho le sakol kang ho, chule kangtalai ho kitol husa gina chu nakuIpi jouse jong kithing soh hel ding ahi.
Asakolte chu akenguva nakholai dung jouse achotsah soh ding, chule namite chu chemjama asat lih ding ahi; chutengle nakhompi lhoutah tah ho jong tola lhusoh ding ahi.

Miho chun nahaona chengse thil ho chu akichomgam sih seh-uva nakiveina thil jouse chu anehgam diu, nakuIpi aboncha avoh lhuh-uva chule na-in nomtah tah ho jong chu asuhmang dingu ahi; nasong ho le na-in thing chule naleipha lai jouse chu twi lailunga aselut dingu ahiye.
Chutengle keiman nalasah to kitho tumging gin chu kasuh tanga, naselangdah gin jong chu kinung jah kit louhel ding ahi.
Nangma chu songlheo keo banga kakoi ding, miho lenphouna bep’anauma, nakisapha kit louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu Pakaiyin thu aseitai, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
“Tyre jah a chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Nagamsunga mi akithagama, amachang ho apen pena, nangma jong nalhuh teng chuleh twikhanglen pang dung gam jouse kilingsoh lou ding ham?

Hiche teng chuleh twikhanglena leng chapate abon chauvin alaltouna uva konin hung kumlhauvin tin, aponsandup jouseu aho lhah cheh diu, aponsilu kijempah jouse jong chu aho lhah soh hel dingu ahi; tikihot hot’a pon akisil diu, tol keova tou cheh-uva, phat jousea kitihot jing jeng diu, chule nangma jeh a kindot dot’a um ding ahiuve.

Chujongle nang nakauva, najah a thu asei dingu, ‘Iti dana twikhanglen dunga kona Nangma mangthah jeng nahi hitam! Vo khopi minthang, Twikhanglen chunga dettah a kisadoh; Nang le nakhopi sunga chengte, Gamlailung tina nachunga tijatna koibe chu’
Nangma lhuh gin chun Twikhanglen laiya gambih jouse akilingsoh-e; Nangma kitol mang chun Twikhanglen lailunga gambih ho chu alung thoitai.

Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman nang hi khopi keohel khat’a kajam ding, koimacha chenna louhel khopi ho toh kabahsah a, twithuh kachup mangsah a, twipi nasatah chun nakhunal tengleh,“

kokhuh sunga kumlha ding ho toh kasot lhah tha ding, khanglui laiya mite toh kasot lhah tha ding, leinoi lama kachensah ding, gollui laiya thilse gem lah a kachensah a, kokhuh lutsa mite toh kachen khomsah ding nahi: chutengle chenna nakinei talou ding, chujongle mihing gamsunga chu mun jong nanei louhel ding ahitai.
Keiman nakichaina tijat umtah a kobolpeh a, nakijahdoh kit louhel ding ahi; nakihol le le jongle nakimudoh kit lou ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.
Pakai thusei chu kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, nangman Tyre hi osang tah-in kachamin lang,

chule Tyre jah a chun seipeh tan, twikhanglen lutna lampia kijam, twikhanglen pang dunga cheng mitin lah a kivei mite jah a chun, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye tin; Vo Tyre, nangman, ‘Keima kahoi chamkimsoh-e’ tin naseiye.“
Nagamgi jouse jong twikhanglen lailunga aumin, Nasemdoh hon jong nahoi chamkim sah tauve.
Ama hon nakhun lhong jouse jong chu Senir gama chahthing jenga asuiyu ahin; Kong chunga kitungdoh dinga nasempeh ding chun Lebanon a Cedar thing khat nalahpeh-uvin ahi.
Bashan phaiya gangpi thing ho chun Nakongkhe jouse nasuipeh tauve; Nakong monglam chu twikhanglen pang dunga, Cyprus gama kona kila Meila thing jengin akisemin, Saiha lim bangin akisemtai

Egypt gama kona hung kitol tupat ponnem kijempah chu Nakong tolna ponlap’in apangin, naponlap’in apang jinge; Eli’shah twikhanglen pang dunga hung kon ponlap le Ponsandup chu nakong ponbuh chun a pang jinge.
Sidon le Arvad’a chengte chu Nakong tolin apanguvin ahi; Nalah a chun Zemer gama khut them miho jong Nangma kong lamkaiyin apanguve.

Nalah a chun Gebal gama upate le khut them mi ho aumuvin, Nakong khikah dung chu athoimat’uve; Nalah a chun twikhanglen a kong jouse, Akongtol mite abonchauvin, Nathil joh chengse chu Najohdoh peh dingin aumuvin ahi.
“Nagalsat mite, nasepai ho lah a chun Persia mi jong, Lud mi jong chule Put mi jong apanguve; nang dingin lum le thih lukhuh akhaiyuvin, nang chu loupi jabolna napeuve.

Arvad mite le Helech mite chu akimvela nakuIpi chung dunga apanguvin, chule Gamad mite jong nakuIpi buh dunga chun apanguve; ama hon nakuIpi kimvel chung dunga chun alumu akhaiyuve; hiti chun nasemhoi chamkim tauve.
Thil jouse nahao jeh chun Tarshish kong ho chun kitan ngap nan nanei tauve; nathiljoh ho chuleh dangka, thih, langva, hahngeh ho chu alhet lhet jenguvin ahi.“
Javan, Tubal chule Meshech jeng jong nang toh akivei khomuvin ahi. Nakiveina mihem ho le sumeng khon ho jeng jong akilhet jiuvin ahi.
Beth-togar’mah chun nasakol joh ding ho chuleh galsatna sakolte chule sakol pol ho chutoh thil alhet lhet jeng jin ahi.

Dedan mite jong nangto akivei khomuvin, twikhanglen pang gam jouse jong hi nang dinga atumbeh a kiveina thei ahiuvin, ama hon saiha ho leh ebony thing chu thilto kilhetpi dingin nahinpoh peh jiuvin ahi.

Thil thalhingset’a nanei jeh chun Edom miten jong kangtalai ho kitan ngapna tah-in namang uvin, nathiljoh ding emerald song ho le ponsandup, ponjempah, tupat ponnem, ngakep chang le song mantam to akilhet lhet jiuvin ahi.

Judah le Israel gamsungin jong nangto kiveina abolkhom uvin ahi; ama hon nangma joh ding thil suhlou chang ahin, olive thing ho leh theiga masa ho to, khoiyu, thao, chule bego hicheng chu thilto akilhet lhet jiuvin ahi.
Nangma nahao behseh jeh chun Damascus jong chu kangtalai tang louhelin akijot jot jenguve; Helbon ju, samul ponkang,
chule Uzala kona ju hung kitol chengse chutoh nangma joh thil jouse chu alhet jiuvin ahi; thihval le thingthal thing, chule pumpeng ho chu nakiveina thil ho toh akilhet to ton ahi.
Dedan in jong sakol chunga toupha pon ho chun nahenga kiveina abolin ahi.

Arabia le Kedar leng chapate jouse nadeitah kelngoite le kelngoi chalte chule kelchate najoh khum khum jeng dingin apanguve; hiche ho akichoh nauva nangma hi kangtalai jouse kitan ngapnan namang tauve.
Sheba le Ra’amah gama kivei ho jeng jong chu nangto akivei khomuvin; ama ho chun nathiljoh ji ho chu gimnamtui tuipen tah le song mantam pen tah, chule sana to akilhetpi jiuvin ahi.
Haran ahin, Canneh ahin, Eden le Sheba a kivei mite ahiuvin, Asshur ahin chule Chilmad ahin, abonchan nangto kiveina abol khom cheh-uvin ahi.

Hiche ho hi nang to kivonna hoitah tah le pondum kijempah pah, chule ajem poldel dula kisem lhong pon ho ahin, khaova kigah detkheh jenga dettah a kipheh det cheh ahin; hicheng thil hin nahgto akivei khom cheh-uvin ahi.
Tarshish a kong ho chu nang kiveina thil ho ahinpouvin ahung kitol tol tauve. “Hijeh chun nangma twikhanglen lailunga Nadimset jeng tan nagih lheh tai.
Nakong tolte chun nangma twikhanglen Vuma chun nahin toldoh tauvin ahi; Chuin Twikhanglen kimlaiya chun Nisolam khohuiyin nanuh jaltai.

Nanei jouse, najoh thil jouse, nakiveina thil ho ahin, Nakong sepaite leh nakong lamkaipa ahiuvin, Nakong thoibit ho ahiuvin, najoh thil chole ho ahiuvin, Nalah a um galsat mite aboncha ahiuvin, Najalah a um mihonpi chuto ahin, Namahthah nikhon hicheng pi chu Abonchauvin twikhanglen lailunga Alhalut soh hel tauvin ahi.
Nakong lamkai ho kholhangsap gin chun Gamtin akithing soh helin ahi;
Akong sunguva konin Kongkhe kichoi jouse abonchan ahung kaldoh tauve. Kong sepaite leh twikhanglena kong lamkai ho chu Abonchauvin twikhanglen pam chinna ading tauve.
Chuin amaho chu nang chunga Lhase tah-in akaptauve; Ama ho chun alujanguva leivui akinuvin, Chule vutvam lah a akipehle le tauve.
Nangma jeh-in akeo keovin aumtauvin, Chule khaodip ponin akong akigah tauve; Chujongle nang chung changa lungthim lhase tah le Lungthem tah-in akap’uvin ahi.
Alhaset nauva nangma nakauvin, Nachung changa akap kap jenguve; ‘Twikhanglen lailunga hi koipen tah Tyre kisuhset bang lom loma kisuse kham?

Nangma joh thil ho chu Twikhanglen dunga kona a hung kitol tol tengleh Nangman mitin mitang Abon chauvin navahva jing jin ahi; Nahaona thalhingset le nakiveina thil chun Leiset leng jouse hi nahaosah tai.
Tun la twikhanglen dunga napohjal tan, Twipi thuh tah sunga naumtai; Nakiveina thille nakong sepaite Abon chauvin nangto nalhalut tauve.
Nachung changa hin Twikhanglen pang dunga chengte alung dongtauve; Hijeh chun alengteu akicha behseh jenguvin, Amaiyu jong amolsoh gamtan ahi.
Mitin lah a kivei mi ho chun Nangma naphiset khumuvin; Datmo tah a beihel dingin nahung umdoh tan, Hijeh a chu naumdoh kit louhel ding ahitai,’ atiuve,” ati tin.
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:

Mihem chapa, Tyre lengpa chapa jah a chun Pakai Pathenin hi tin thu aseiye, tin seiyin: Nalungthim kiletsah a, Keima pathen khat kahin, Pathente touna twikhanglen lailunga Katouve,’ tia nasei vang hin, Nangma mihem mai maibou nahin, Pathen chu nahilou ahi; Nangle nang jeng jong pathen chih banga chinga kigel nahin;
Vetan, nangma Daniel sanga ching jo dan nahi, Nang dingin aguh a kisel hetmo thil aumpoi;
Nachihna le nahetkhen theina jeh chun Nangin haona nakimudoh soh tan ahi; Chujongle nathil kholna in dunga chun Sana le dangka nalhoh khom soh tan ahi;
Kiveina thua nachihna anatsat jeh chun Nangman nahaona napunbe sah sah jengin, Nahaona jeh chun nalungthim jong akiletsah tan;
Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: “Nangle nang pathen khat chih a chinga kigel nahin,

Hichejeh chun neihin vetan, Namtin vaipi lah a tijat umpen Hetphah lou gamchom mite chu Keiman kalonvuh sah jeng ding nahi; Chutengle ama ho chun nangma chih mel-hoi douna Achemjamu asadoh cheh dingu Chujongle naloupina chu Asuh thangsoh hel dingu ahitai.
Kokhuh sungah naleh lut’uvin tin, Twikhanglen lailunga Tolthi thi banga Nathi ding ahi.
Nangman nathat ho masanga jong chu ‘Keima pathen khat kahi’ nati jinga, Nangma mihem mai mai hin lang Pathen hilouhel hijongle chun, Nangma mavo ho khut’a chu Nasei jing thei ding ham?
Gamdang mite khut’a chu nangma Cheptanlou mite thi banga nathi ding ahi; Ajeh chu keiman thu kiseitai, Tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.
Hicheng kalvalin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Tyre lengpa chung changa ka le mao bol inlang, ajah a chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin seipeh tan: Nangma hi chamkimna khutjem nahin, Chingtah le mel-hoi chamkim nahi.

Nangma Pathen honsung Eden a naumin, Song mantam jouse jong nale din apanguve; Camelian song, Topaz song, Jasper song, Songdul, Beryl song, song mantam, sapphire song, Songsan, chule Emerald song hicheng chu ahiuvin, Nakigon dan mong mong jong chu sana jenga kigong ahin, Phate cha kijempol sohhel ahiye. Nangma nakisemdoh nikhoa chu hicheng chu gonsa ahitai.
Nangma navengtup ding Thao nusa cherub khat koma kakoi nahi; Nangma Pathen lhang theng chunga nana umin, Mei song lah jenga chun navahle len ahiye.
Nakisemdoh nikhoa pat nangma hi Nalam lhah jousea nolna beihel nahi; Hita chu nasunga Themmona akimudoh kahsen,

Kiveina thil nabulhin behseh jeh chun Nangma pumhat jeng nadimtan, nachonsetai; Hijeh chun Pathen molsanga konin Nangma thilboh bangin kapaidoh tai; Chujongle navengtup’a cherub jeng jong chun nadelmang tai, Molsang tamtah lailunga kon chun.

Na mel-hoi jeh chun nalungthim akilet sah tan, Naloupina ding khohsah nan nachihna chu nasuse tai. Keiman tolse nan kaneiyin, lengte angsunga kasosal tai; Hita chu amit’uva nangma navet vet jengna dinguvin.

Na themmona atam behseh phat’in Adih a nakivei vei vang chun Namuntheng jouse chu nasuboh soh tai; Hijeh chun keiman nalailunga konin Meikong kakondoh sah jengin Mei chun nakahvam ahiye; Chuti chun leiset chunga vutvam kasosah tan, Namupha jouse mitmun vutvam nahitai.
Mipi lah a nahesa jouse jong chu Nachung chang thudola atija soh heltauve; Nakichaina hi tijat umtah khat’in naumdoh tan, Aitih geiya umdoh kit louhel ding nahitai, tin, ati. “
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Sidon lam ngan lang chule Sidon dounan gaothu seiyin

chule Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin seiyin: Vo Sidon, neihin vetan keiman kadou nahi, Chutengle nalailunga chu kaloupina kaphondoh ding ahi. Keiman agamsunga chu thu katana Asunga chu kathenna kaphondoh tengleh Ama hon keima hi Pakai chu kahi Ahetdoh dingu ahi;“

Ijeh-inem itile keiman agamsunga gamna hise kalha lut ding, Akholai sung jousea thisan kalonsah ding ahi; Chujongle asunga chu tolthi kijamsoh ding, Muntina ama douna chemjama kithat chu mi um diu ahi. Chutengle ama hon keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.

“Chule Israel insung chu ama ho thangset suma bolji aheng akomteu lah a ling le khao tobanga, ama ho suse theiya pang lou ding ahitauve. Chutengle keima hi Pakai Pathen kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.

Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman Israel insung chu akithe cheh nau mi tin namtin lah-a kona kakhop khomsoh a, chule kathenna chu alah-uva namtin vaipi mitmua kaphondoh tengle kalhacha Jacob kapehsa agamsung ma ma chu cheng ding ahiuve.“

Hita chu agamsunga long louva cheng diu, in tampi akisah-uva lengpilei tampi akibol diu ahi. Keiman ama ho thangset suma bol, aheng akomteu chunga thutanna kanei teng jongle long louva, mong tah a cheng ding ahiuve. Chutengle ama hon keima hi Pakai kitipa a-Pathenu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Kum som lhin kum, lha som lhinna, chuche lha, nisom le ni lhinnin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung in hi tin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh lam ngan kiheiyin lang chule ama le Egypt gam dounan gaothu seiyin;

houlimin lang Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin seiyin: Neihin vetan, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh, Keiman nang kadou nahi; Avadung lailunga kol jing dragon lentah chun, ‘Hiche kakul pi hi keiya ahin, kasemsa ahiye,’ ati.“

Keiman ka-ngakoi ho hi nakha teni noiya but’ing ting, Navadunga nga jouse alip hoa chu kakikhaiden sah ding; Chutengle na vadung lailunga kona kakhaidoh ding, Navadunga nga jouse alip dunga hung kikhaidoh diu ahi.

Keiman nang chu gamthip laiya kaselhah ding, Nangle navadunga nga jouse nabonchauva kase lhah diu nahi, Nang jong gam talai lah a nakijam den ding, Nakiloh doh a nakivui lou ding ahi; Leiset’a gamsate leh chunga leng vachate neh dinga Kapehdoh nahitai.
“Chutengleh Egypt gama cheng jousen keima hi Pakai chu ahi, ti eihetdoh dingu ahi. Ijeh-inem itile ama ho chu Israel insung mite dingin peng tenggol tobang anahiuve;
ama hon nangma chu nakhut’a natuh khah phat’uvin, nangman nasugim soh-in, alengkouvu nasalhah peh tan, chujongle nachunga ahung kingaiyuva ahileh navo lhun, ataibuh-u kithing thingin nalhan ahi;
hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Neihin vetan, nachunga chemjam kahin lensah ding, nagancha le mihem kasat gamhel ding ahi;
chutengle Egypt gam chu ahomkeo le agong goh-a kijam ding; chutah le mi hon keima hi Pakai chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi. Ipijeh-inem itile, ‘Luipi dung keiya ahin, keima semsa ahi,’ tin naseiye;
hichejeh chun neihin vetan, keiman nang kadouvin, navadung jouse kadouvin, Egypt gamsung hi Migdal a pat Syene chan gei, Ethtiopia gampi langpeh geiya ahomkeo le agonggoh a kaumsah ding ahi.
Mihem kengpeh hihen lang gamsa keng peh hijongle khat chan jong ajotpa louhel ding ahi; kum somli sunga chenna louhela um ding ahi.

Hita chu gam dang dang ahomkeova kijam banga Egypt gam jong ahomkeova kaumsah ding ahi; ahomkeova kadalhahsa khopi jouse lah a chu akhopi ho jong kum somli sunga ahomkeova kijam diu ahi. Keiman Egypt mite chu namtin vaipi lah a kathe thangsoh ding, gamtin gamtang dapnaa kathe chatvaisoh hel ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Kum somli akichai jou tengle Egypt mite chu akithe cheh nau mitin namtin lah a kona kahin khop khom kit ding ahi;“
chule Egypt hamphatna jouse kasemphat peh ding, ama ho penna gam mong mong, Pathros gamsunga chu kahin puilut kit ding ahi; hiche muna chu lenggam neo chabou um ding ahitauve.

Hiche lenggam chu lenggam jouse iah a anempen hi ding, namtin vaipi chunga ama le ama kichoisang jou louhel ding ahitai; hita chu neo chabou kasem ding ahitai, hijeh a chu namtin vaipi chunga vaihom kit louhel ding ahitauve.

Chujongle Israel insung kingaina jong hita louhel ding, ahenga chu kithopi hol dinga ache tengu jongle athemmonau ageldoh jeng jeng diu ahiye. Hichele chun keima hi Pakai Pathen chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Kum som ni le kum sagi lhin kum, lha masapen chuche lha, ni masa nin Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hi tin ati:

“Mihem chapa, Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar chun Tyre dounan asepaite nasa tah-in atil tan, mi jouse lujang abot chaiyuvin, chule mi jouse lengkou anoisan soh tauve; ahivangin ama ahin asepaite ahiuvin Tyre douna athilbol manu ima aga akimudoh deh pouvin ahi.

Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman Egypt gam chu Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar kapehdoh ding ahi; chutengle aman agam haona jouse apoh manga, agam asuhset’a chule achomgam ding ahi; achomdoh ho chu asepaite tohmana apeh ding ahiye.
Keiman atohman dinga Egypt gam hi kapeh ding ahi, ijeh-inem itile ama hon keima dingin na anatonguve, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

Hiche nikho chuleh keiman Israel insunga aki khat kadot doh sah ding, chule ama ho lah a nakam kakeh peh a kapaosah ding nahin, chutengleh ama hon keima hi Pakai kiti pa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi,“” ati.“
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hi tin ati:
“Mihem chapa, gaovin lang thu seiyin, Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin: Ohe, hiche nikho ding hin Kap’in maovuvin!’
Ijeh-inem itile nikho ahung naiye, Pakai nikho chu ahung naiye; Hiche nikho chu muthim lhangkhal kihehna, Namtin vaipi dinga gamna phat hiding ahi.

Egypt chunga chemjam hung langin tin, Ethiopia chunga hesohna hung chu ding, Egypt gamsunga mihem kithat ho alhuh lhamsoh a, Ahaona jouse akipoh mang peh a Chule abuIpi jouse Akisuhjal soh teng chuleh.
Ethiopia le Put ahin, Lud ahin, chule Arabia pumpi ahin, Libya ahin, chujongle apangkhom dinga um gamsunga mipi jouse ahiuvin, abonchauva chu chemjama lousoh hel ding ahiuve.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Egypt mite kithopi chengse abonchauva lhulhamsoh diu, Chule amihatte chu kitalhel ding ahiuve; Migdola pat Syene geiya Agamsunga mite chemjama lousoh ding ahi, Tin Pakai Pathen chun aseiyin ahi.“
Gamsung kidalhasa ho banga, Hiche gam jong hi kidalha thip hel ding, Akhopi jouse jong hi Ahomkeova umsa khopi ho banga um ding ahi.
Hita chu keiman Egypt gam meiya kahala Akithopi jouse kasuh gamsoh tengleh Keima hi Pakai chu kahi Ama hon ahetdoh dingu ahi.

“Hiche nikho chuleh keiya konin, ima khohsah, louhela um Ethiopia mite tijat sah dingin sottolle ho tampi hung kondoh-uvin tin, Egypt mite manthah nikhoa chu ama ho chunga jong hesohna hung lhung ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile vetan ahungtai!
Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Keiman Babylon lengpa Nebuchadrez’zar khut kaman a Egypt gam haona chu kasuh beihel ding ahi.“

Ama le amite akilhonpi ho, Namtin vaipi dinga kichat um chung nungte chu Agamsung sumang dinga Kapuilut ding ahiuve; Ama ho chun Egypt mite douna chemjam adodoh cheh diu, Gamsung chu tolthi adipset dingu ahi.

Chutengle keiman luipi dung twi kansah ing ting, Agam hi mi giloute khut’a kajoh mang ding ahi; Keiman agamsung le asunga um thil jouse chunga hi Gamchom mite khut kaman a gamna kahin lhut ding ahi; Pakai kitipa keiman Hiche chu kasei ahitai;

“Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman Memphis a um Milimdoi kisemthu ho leh Pathen lim kisemthu ho chu Kasuh beisoh hel ding ahin; Egypt gamsunga leng chapate khat cha kakhen lou ding, Hitia chu Egypt gamsunga kichatna kalensah ding ahi.
Pathros chu ahomkeova kakoiya, Zo’an chu meiya kahal ding; Chutengle No kho Chunga thu katan ding ahi.
Chujongle Sin kho chunga kalungsat kabuh khum ding, Egypt kulpi le No khoa mitin mitang kasat gam ding ahi.
Chutengle Egypt chu meiya kahala, Sin khopi jong chun gim genthei nasatah athoh ding ahi; No khopi chu kitumkeh a AkuIpi aboncha kivolhu soh ding ahi.
Aven le Pibe’seth khoa gollhang jouse Chemjama lousoh ding ahiuvin; Chutengle numei jouse chu Abonchauva sohchanga che ding ahiuve.

Keiman Egypt vaihomna kavoh keh tengleh Tehaph’nehes a jong kho jinga mu thim ding, Chule amihatte jong mangthah soh diu, Agam jeng jong meilhangin atom ding, Chutengle achanute Abonchauva sohchanga che ding ahiuve.
Hita chu keiman Egypt chunga thu katan ding, Chutengle keima hi Pakai chu kahi ahetdoh diu ahi, ati.“
Kum somle kum khat lhin kum lha masapen, chuche lha, ni sagi lhin nin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hi tin ati:
“Mihem chapa, keiman Egypt lengpa Pharaoh banjang kaheh bong tai; hijeh chun vetan, akhut chu ahatdoh kit theiya chemjam alapthei kitna dingin akitomjol pehpon, maha tom nan jong akitom peh poi.

Hijeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman Egypt lengpa Pharaoh chu kadouve, hijeh a chu abanjang teni kaheboh peh ding, abanjang thahat nalai le akiheh bongsa agoma kaheboh ding: hita chu akhut’a kona chemjam kalhah mangsah ding ahi.
Chule Egypt mite chu namtin vaipi jouse lah a kathe cheh soh a. gam tin gamtanga kathe thangsoh ding ahiuve.

Chutengle Babylon lengpa ban-gol tha kahat sah ding, kachemjam chu ama khut’a kakoi ding ahi; Egypt lengpa banjang teni vang chu kaheboh peh ding, ama chu Babylon lengpa masanga thina theiya kimavosa mihem banga peng peng jeng ding ahiye.

Babylon lengpa ban-gol tha kahat sah ding, Pharaoh banjang teni vang lha lhop ding ahi; chutengle ama hon keima hi Pakai chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi. Keiman kachemjam chu Babylon lengpa kapeh tengleh aman Egypt gam douna anei ding;
chujongle keiman Egypt mite namtin vaipi lah a kathe cheh soh hela, gamtin gamtanga kathe thangsoh hel ding ahiuve; chutah le ama hon keima hi Pakai chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi, ati.“
Kum som le kum khat lhin kum lha thum lhinna chuche lha, ni masapen nin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
Mihem chapa, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh le amite jouse jah a seipeh tan: Nalet dan hi nangma Koipento nakibah ding hitam?
Vetan, nangma hi Lebanon a cedar tobang kahisah ding, Nabah hoitah tah le nado phatah tah um ding, Chule asana sang nahiya Meilhang lah a nalehvum kitung doh ding ahi.

Hiche chu twiyin achapnou jing ding, Luipi dungin jong akhantou sah sah jenga, Athing kiphuna kimvela jong chu Vadung alon kimvel sah ding, Gammang lah a thing lah jousea jong Vachadung tampi alon khumsah ding ahi.
Hijeh chun hiche thing chu asangin, Gammang thing lah jousea asang pene; Aboh ho jong alen theiyin, A bah jouse jong asao theiye, Ajung khona mun jousea Twi thalhingset’a aum jeh ahi.
Chunga leng vachaten Aboh lah a chun bu akisah-uvin, Abah lim noi dunga chun Gamlah a gamsaten anoute ahinpui lut lut’uve; Chujongle alim dam noiya chun Nam minthang jouse acheng tauve.
A thing alet dan le abahho a sao thei jeh chun Ahoilheh jengin ahi: Ajeh chu ajung jouse hi Twi phatna lah tah a Jamlut ahiuve.

Pathen honsunga cedar thinghon jong tetjou pontin, Chahthing ho jong chun a bah ho atet jou lou diu ahi: Abah ho to tekah dingin Theipi thing ho jeng jong imacha ahipouve: Pathen hon sunga thing phung khat cha jong Ahoidan hiche tobanga hoiyah aumpoi.
Abah chujat chun athing phung chu kajemhoiyin, Pathen honsung Eden a keh thing phung jousen Hiche thing phung chu Athangset piuvin ahiye.
“Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Hiche thing phung chu sangtah a ahung kitundoh a chule alehvum chun meilhang lah aphah hel jeh chun asana konin alungthim sung akiletsah tai;
hijeh a chu keiman hiche hi namtin vaipi lah a athahatpen pa khut’a kapehdoh ding, aman agitlouna dungjui banga abolset ding ahiye; hiche hi kapaidohsa ahitai.

Gamchom mite, namtin vaipi lah a tijat um chungnung ten asat lhuh diu chule adalhah diu ahi. Molsang laijouse le phaicham lai jousea abah ho chu kijam thangsoh ding, chule aboh jouse jong chu gamsunga twilonna mun jousea hebohsa umthangsoh a, chutengle leiset’a mitin mitang alim noiya kijotdoh-uva adalhahsoh dingu ahi.
Athing hon gem lah a hi chunga leng vachate hung cheng diu, chujongle abah gem lah a chu gamlah a gamsa jouse hung kikhom ding ahiuve.

Hiche hi twipanga thing phung khat cha jong asan behseh louna ding, alehvumin jong meilhang lah aphah jeng louna ding, chujongle twi donkha thing phung khat beh jong hiche ho chan geiya asan thei louna ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile hiche ho hi abonchauva thina kipesa, leiset noiya athi thei mihemte, khula lutsa ho to kilhonsuh dinga kikoisa ahitauve.

Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: hiche hi noimi gama achesuh tengleh keiman leiset jeng jong ama lunghempi dinga kasol ding, twipi jeng jong katin kih a, hijeh a chu twi tampi kiting kih ding ahi; keiman Lebanon chu lung gimna ponsil kasil peh ding, jaova thing phung jousen hiche hi alunglhah pi dingu ahi.“

Hiche thingphung alhuh a, keiman khula lutsa ho chutoh noimi gama kaselut tha teng leh agin husa a chu namtin vaipi kaho lhul soh ding ahiuve: chule Eden a thingphung jouse, twi donjing ho chengse abonchauva leiset noilama lungmon kipe ding ahiuve.
Ama ho jong chu hiche tohin noimi gama, chemjama kithatsa chengse toh kilhonsuh ding ahiuve: athing lim noiya anachengsa, namtin vaipi lah a mite chu abonchauva mangthah ding ahiuve.

Eden a thingphung ho lah a hoiche pen chutoh nakilo mong ham? Nang jeng jong leiset noilam a Eden a thingphung ho chutoh nakiloi lut tha ding ahi: cheptan louho lah a chu nakijama, chemjama kithatsa ho chutoh nalup khom ding ahi. “Hiche hi Pharaoh le amite abonchauva kiseina ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.
Kum som le kum ni lhin kum lha som le lha ni lhin nan, chuche lha, ni masa nin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

Mihem chapa, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh chung changa kap’in lang chule ajah a seipeh tan: Nangle nang namtin vaipi lah a hin Keichal bangin nakigel jin, Ahinla twikhanglen lailunga Dragon tobangin naumtai: Vadung jousea konin nakisen jah jin, Nakeng phang te nin twi nasaiyin Atwi lonna vadungjouse Abonchan nasuneh soh hel tai.
Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman mipi tamtah toh Kalen kakhu khum ding nahin, Chutengle kalen sunga chu kakaidoh ding nahi.
Chule keiman nangma tola kaselhah ding, Tollhanga kapaidoh ding nahi; Chunga leng vachate nachunga kachensah ding, Chule gamsa jouse vahna kanei ding nahiye.
Natahsa chu molsang dung jousea kathe thangsoh ding, Nathilong chu phaicham lai jouse kadipset ding ahi.
Gamsung chu molsang dung jouse geiya Nathisan kikho jen juna kachap kot soh hel ding, Twilonna jouse jong Nadimsoh hel ding ahi.
Nangma kapaidoh teng chuleh Van mun jouse kakhujol soh ding, Chule ahsi jouse jong thimsoh a Nisa jeng jong meilhanga katomjol ding, Lhathah jeng jong Hungvah lou ding ahi.
Van laiya vah loupi tah tah ho chu Nachunga kathimsah ding, Chuta chu nagamsung pumpia Muthim kajinsah ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
“Keiman nahet khah louhel gamtina namtin vaipi lah a sohchanga kakai mang tengleh, mitin lungthim tijatna kabol ding nahi.

Nachung changa mihem tamtah katijat sah ding, nangma jeh a alengteu jong hungkihot lhulsoh ding, keiman amasanguva kachemjam kavaipeiya; nangma nalhuh ni ni leh, ama ho jeng jong akihinso theina ding angaito nauva kitihot hot jeng ding ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Babylon lengpa chemjam chu nachunga hung chu ding ahi.

Keiman namite hi ahon ajanga mi thahat te namtin vaipi jouse lah a tijat um chung nungte, hiche ho chemjama chu kathisah soh hel ding ahiuve. Ama ho chun Egypt kiletsahna imachalou aso diu, Chutengle amite ahon ajanga mangthah ding ahiuve. “
Keiman twipi panga gamsa jouse kasuh gam ding, Mihem kengto gina kicha kit lou diu, Sahem kengto gin husa jengin jong Akichatsah louhel ding ahi.
Chutengle keiman atwi jouse kalhit chim ding, avadung jouse jong Thaotwi lon banga Kalonsah ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Keiman Egypt gam chu ahomkeova kakoiya Agamsunga um jouse chu akichom ngimhela, Agamsunga cheng jouse kaden tengleh, Ama hon keima hi Pakai chu kahi ahetdoh diu ahi.
Hiche ka-na hi ka-la ki-oi ding ahin, namtin vaipi chanuten ka-la aoi cheh dingu ahi; Egypt le amite ahon ajang chunga ka-la aoi dingu ahiye, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.
Kum som le kum ni lhin kum lha masapen chuche lha, nisom le ni nga lhin nin kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Egypt mite ahon ajang pi khu ka-pi maopin lang chule abon chauvin, ama ahin namtin vaipi lah a nam loupi tah te chanu jouse khutoh, khula lutsa mithi ho toh leiset noilama sol lhan:
’Nangma sanga hoijo ding koi ham? Kumsuh-in lang chep tanloute to lumkhom tan,’ tin.
Ama ho chu chemjama kisat telsa miho lah a lhulham diu, ama le amite ahon ajang chutoh kijam khom diu ahi.

Haosa thahat tah tah ho chun ama ho chung chang thu houlimna anei diu, noimi gam lailung geiya ama ho panpite leh ama ho thu aseiyuva, ‘Hiche ho hi ahung kumlhauvin, cheptanlou chemjama kithatsa ho hitoh alum khom khom jenguve,’ ati diu ahi.
Hikoma chun Assyria jong a um in. asepaite ahiuvin. akimvela chun alhankhuh-u adimset jengin. abonchauva chu thasa cheh, chemjama kithatsa ahiuve;“

hiche lhankhuh jouse chu kokhuh sung lampeh a akisemin, asepaite jong chu ama lhankhuh kimvela chun aume; abonchauva chu thasa cheh, chemjama kithatsa ahiuvin, ama ho hin mihing gamsunga tijatna alhut soh-u ahitai.

“Hikoma chun Elam jong aumin, chule amite ahon ajang pi chu alhankhuh kim vela akigoluve; abonchauva chu thasa cheh, chemjama kithatsa, cheptan louva leiset noilama kumsuh a, mihing gamsunga tijatna thu lensah ho chu ahiuvin, ama ho hi ajah cha pum pumin khula lutsa te chutoh akilhonsuh tauvin ahi.

Ama hon ama le amite, ahon ajang pi chu, mithi lah a jalkhun adopeh-uvin, ama kimvela chun ama ho lhankhuh jeng akigole abonchauva cheptanlou jeng chemjama kithatsa cheh ahiuve; hijeh chun ama ho chung changa tijatna chu mihing gamsunga akilhutsoh tai, chule ama ho ajah cha pum pumin khul a lutsate chutoh akilhonsuh-uvin, mihem akithatsate lah a akikoi tauve.

Meshech le Tubal jong kikoma chun aum lhonin, amite ahon ajangin aumuvin, alhan khuh-u jong ama ni kimvela akigolsoh helin, abonchauva chu cheptanlou jeng, chemjama kithatsa cheh ahiuve; hijeh chun hiche ho hin mihing gamsunga tijatna alhutsoh tauvin ahi.“

Chule amani chu gollui laiya mihatte athisa ho agalsatna manchah jouse kipoh a noimi gama kumsuh ho, achemjamu kilukhap cheh a lum, agu achang lah-uva kijamden ho chutoh alumkhom lhonpoi; ajeh chu mihatte chung changa tijatna chu mihing gamsunga anaumsa ahi.
Hita chu nang jong naki sugoiya cheptan loute, chemjama kithatsa ho lah a chu nalup den ding ahi.

“Hikoma chun Edom jong aumin, alengpa le aleng chapate jong ahiuvin, ama ho jong chu athahat jeh-uvin chemjama kithatsa ho chutoh akijam khom tauve; hiti chun cheptanlou ho, khula lutsa mite chutoh alumkhom uvin ahi.

Niso lama leng chapate jong abon chauvin hikoma chun aumuvin, abonchauva chu Sidon mite jouse chutoh ahiuvin, athahat jeh-uva tijatna aboldoh-u chun ama ho ajumsoa mithisa ho chutoh kijotsuh ahitauve; cheptanlou ho chemjama kithatsa te chutoh akijam khomuvin, khula lutsate chutoh ajah cha pum pumin akijotsuh tauve.“
“Pharaoh chun hiche hi amudoh tengleh amite ahon ajang ding ngaitona ama le ama kilhamon ding ahi. Pharaoh le asepaite chemjama kithat chengse chu, tin Pakai Pathen in aseiye.

Ijeh-inem itile keiman mihing gamsunga tijatna kalhutsoh tai; hijeh a chu ama hi cheptanlou ho, chemjama kithatsate, Pharaoh le amite ahon ajang chutoh lumkhom ding ahiuve, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye ati.“
Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung in hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, namite henga chun thu seiyin ajah-uva hitin seipeh tan. Keiman gamsung khat sunga chemjam kahin lensah a, agam mite chun alah-uva pasal khat alhendoh-uva ama chu kho ngah a apansah-uva.
hichepa chun gamsunga chemjam ahung kilap amudoh teng sumkon amut’a chule agam mite ahil masah tengleh,
ijemtia mihem khattouvin sumkon gin aja nasa akiseipeh chu ija angaisah louva ahileh chemjam chu hung kilamin tin, hichepa chu kikai mang ding, athisan chu ama chung ma ma chu ding ahi.
Aman sumkon gin ajah a ahivanga hohsalna chu anahsah louva ahileh ama thisan chu ama chungma ma chuding ahi. Amavang hohsalna chu ana khohsah hen lang hileh ahinkho akihuhhing tei ding ahiye.

Ahin, kho ngahpa chun gamsunga chemjam ahung kilap chu muhen lang, sumkon mutging louvin umhen, mipi chu hohsal louvin umkha tahen, chutengle chemjam chu hung kipan hen miho lah a khat pen pen chu kikaimang jeng taleh, hiche akikai mangpa chu ama themmo jeh a kikaimang ahinan, ahivanga keiman athisan phu chu kho ngahpa khut’a kadel ding ahi.
Hijeh a chu mihem chapa, keiman nang hi Israel insung dinga kho-ngah a kapansah nahi; keima kamsunga kona thu kisei najah tih tih leh nangman keiya kona ama ho chu nagihsal ding ahi.“

Keiman mi gilou jah a chu, ‘Vo mi giloupa, nangma nathi tei tei ding ahi’ katia chule nangman hiche mi giloupa chu agitlouna kona ahung kihei mangna dinga gihsalna thu naseida a ahileh, hichepa chu athemmona a thiden tei tei ding ahitan, athijeh a chu athisan phu nangma khut’a kahindel ding ahi.

Ahinla nangman hiche mipa chu agitlouna lampia kona ahung kihei mangna dinga nagihsal nah a, ahi vanga alampi gilouva kona ahung kihei mang louva ahileh, hiche mipa chu athemmona thi tei tei ding ahin, nangin vang nahinkho naki huhhing tei ding nahiye.

“Mihem chapa; nangman Israel insung mite jah a seipeh-in lang, nanghon hi tin naseiyuve,’ tin: ‘Keiho kasuh khelna chengseu le kachonsetna chengseu kachunguva achun, hiche ho jeh a chu abei paiya kahiu ahitan, iti kahinjou nah lai dingu ham?’ natiuve, tin.

Ajah-uva seipeh loiyin, Pakai Pathenin keima kahing jinge, tin aseiyin, Keiman mi gilou thina chung changa kipana kanei ahipoi, mi giloupa chu alampi gilouva kona ahung kihei doh ding chubou kadei ahi; hijeh chun nalampi gilou uva konin kinung hei loiyun, kinunghei loiyun, ajeh chu ipi dinga mohseh a nathi dingu ham Vo Israel insung mite?

Chule mihem chapa, nangman namite jah a seipeh-in, midihpa chun suhkhel anei teng leh adihnan ama ahuhdoh deh lou ding ahi, mi giloupa chu agitlouna a kona akiheimang tengle kipal lhuhna anei lou tobang chu hilou ding, midih chu achonset tengleh adihna vanga chu hing thei deh louhel ding ahi.

Keiman midihpa jah a chu hing tei tei ding nahi, tia kaseipeh vangin, aman adihna chu akisonpia thil bolkhel aneiya ahileh athil dih bol ho chu khat cha jong kigeldoh peh louhel ding ahi; aman bolkhel anei athemmona jeh a amapa thon moa thi tei tei ding ahi.
Achujongle keiman mi gilou jah a chu, ‘Nangma nathi tei tei ding ahi, kati vangin, ama chu achonsetna konin kihei mang hen lang chule danthu bukim thei thil le adih chu boljo hen lang,

mi gilou chun bat a alah chu ditdoh hen, guhchatna athil lah chu nungpeh jeng hen, hinkhoa chondan thudolin chonjo hen lang, themmona thei thil bolda taleh, hichepa chu hing tei tei ding, thi louhel ding ahitai.
Hiche mipan chonsetna abolsa chengse chu ama setna dinga khat cha beh kigeldoh peh louhel ding; aman danthu bukipna thil le adih chu aboljoh ahitan, hing tei tei ding ahiye.
Ahinla namiten, ‘Pakai lampi hi adih poi,’ tin aseiyuve; adih lou chula ama ho lampi ahibouvin.“
Midihpa chu adihna a kona akihei manga thil dihlou abola athemmo tengle, hichejeh a chu thi tei tei ding ahi.
Achule mi giloupa chu agitlouna a kona akihei manga danthu bulhin theina le thildih abol tengleh hichejeh a chu hing tei tei ding ahi.
Ahinla nanghon, ‘Pakai lampi hi adih poi,’ tin naseiyuve. Vo Israel insung mite, keiman nangho nabonchauva ama ama lamlhah dungjui cheh a nathu u katan ding ahi,” ati.
Keiho kasohchan nau kum som le kum ni lhin kum lha som lhinna chuche lha, ni nga lhin nin Jerusalema kona hung jamdoh mi khat kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati, “Khopi chu achimtai,” ati.

Ahimongin jong hiche ahung jamdoh pa hung lhun masang nilhah lam chun kachunga Pakai khut ahung kingamin, chule hichepa chu jingkah a keima heng ahung lhun phat’in Pakaiyin kakam eikeh peh-in ahileh kakam kan, paomon kaumtapoi.
Hichun kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, Israel gamsunga ahomkeova kijamsa muntina cheng miten hitin asei sei jenguve, ‘Abraham chu michang khatseh seh anahin, agam pumpin analon, keiho mi tampi kahiuvin, hiche gam keiho lo ding mong monga eikipeuvah ahiye,’ atiuve.

Hichejeh chun ama ho jah a khun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin seipeh-in: Nang hon sa chu athisan pumin naneuvin, chule nakhodah jiuvin namilimdoi semthu chengseu chu nave veuvin, chutengle thisan nasou jiuvin ahi; hitipia hi agam nalo thei dingu ham?
Nanghon chemjam nakipat cheh-uvin, naheng nakompa jinu nasuthang uvin, thet umtah tah chonna naneiyun, hiti pia chu agam hi nalo thei mong diu hinam?

Hiti hin ajah-uva seipeh-in, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Kei kahing jinge, hiche ahomkeova umsa muntina chengte khu chemjama lou tei tei ding ahiuve; chujongle loujaova umpa jeng jong chu gamsate neh dinga kapehdoh ding; chule kulpi sung dunga um ho leh songko dunga um ho jeng jong chu gamna hisea thigam ding ahiuve.
Keiman agam hi ahomkeo le alhengsa kakoi ding, chutengle agamsung kiletsahna thahatna chu bei soh ding, Israel molsang jouse dalhah thip hela um diu, koima chan jong ajotpa louhel ding ahiye.
Hiche teng chuleh amahon keima hi Pakai kitipa kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi, keiman athil bolu thet umtah tah ho jeh a agam hi ahomkeo le alheng hela kakoi phat teng chuleh.

Mihem chapa, namite nangma chung chang thudola inbang dung tin le kotpi phung jousea aki houlim uvin, khat’in khat jah a, agol apai jah a, ‘Hunguvin, Pakaiya koma thu hung kisei hi ngai temuvin,’ atiuve.“

Chule ama ho chu nahenga mipi hung ngai bangin ahunguvin, keima mite bangin namasanga ahung tou uve; chujongle nangman nasei chu angaiyuvin, hiche chu bola abolpouve; ijeh-inem itile akamuvin angailutna tamtah aphonguvin, alungthim uvin ama ho phatchomna ding jengbou agel e.
Hijeh chun vetan, nangma hi ama ho vet din o-ngei tah tah a dongma la sa a, tumging saitoh nabang bep’e; ajeh chu ama hon nathusei ajanauvin nasei chu abolpouve.
Hiche hi ahung guilhun tengle, hung guilhung tei ding ahi! Hichetah chuleh alah-uva themgao khat anaum jing jeng ahi, ti ahetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung in hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, Israel kelngoi chingte dounan gaovin lang, kelngoi ching ho jah mong monga chun seipeh tan, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye tin lang: ‘He! Israel kelngoi chinga panga nangho le nangho kivah vah jeng mite! Kelngoi ching mite chun kelngoi joh chu avah ding hilou ham?
Nanghon athao lai lai nakithan naneuvin, kelngoimul pon chu nakisiluvin, kelngoi thaocha cha nakithauvin, akelngoite vah louhelin naum gamtauve.

Ahopmo chula nahatsah pouvin, ana jong naboldam pouvin, akengbai jong natompeh pouve; avahmang nagahoi lut deh pouvin, amangsa chu nahol pouvin, pumhat jeng le hutot jengin kelngoite chu achunguva thu naneiyuve.
Chuta chu kelngoi ching tahbeh mong koima aum lou phat’in abonchan akithe cheh soh tauve: kelngoite chu abonchan gamsate nehgam ding bep’in aum tauve.

Kelngoite chu akithe chehsoh-uvin, molsang tin le lhang sang dung jousea avah thangsoh tauve; hiti chun kelngoite leiset pumpi chunga akithe chansoh-uvin, koimacha aholdoh dingule aman khom dingu aumtapoi.
Hichejeh chun nangho kelngoi chinga pang jousen Pakai thusei hi ngaiyuvin: “

Keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, kelngoi ching thei koimacha aumlou jeh a kakelngoite gamsa nehgam ding bep’a auma, abonchauva chu gamsahang jouse neh le chah a pang ding ahitauvin; kakelngoi chingten la keima kelngoite chu holdoh dingin agopouvin, akelngoi chingte chu ama hole ama ho joh akivah vah louvin, keima kelngoite chu vah louvin aumsah gamtauve;
hichejeh chun kelngoi chinga pang mite nanghon Pakai thusei hiche hi ngaiyuvin:

Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye, neihin vetan, keiman kelngoi chingte chu kadou ahiuve; kakelngoite chu ama ho khut’a kahin ngeh ding, akelngoi achinu jong kahaisah ding ahi; hita chu kelngoi chingte ama ho le ama ho kivah kit louhel ding ahitauve. Keiman ama ho kamsunga kona kakelngoite kalahpeh a, ama ho dinga neh le chah a pang thei louhel ding ahitauve.
“Ijeh-inem itile Pakai Pathenin aseiye, Neihin vetan, keima mong mongin kakelngoite chu kahola kaga holdoh ding ahi.

Kelngoi chingpan akelngoite phabep akithe cheh tengle akelngoi akihol bukim banga chu keiman jong kakelngoite chu kaholdoh ding hita chu meilhang ajina muthim lhangkhal akiheh nikhoa akithe cheh nau mun tina kona kelngoite chu kagaholdoh soh kei ding ahi.

Hita chu ama ho chu mitin mitang lah a kona kagapuidoh a, gamtina kona kakhop khomsoh ding, agamsung uva kahin puilut ding ahiuve; chutengle abonchauva Israel molsang dung jouse leh twinah dung jousea chule gamsunga mihem chenna muntina kavahva set dingu ahi.

Abonchauva hamhing phalai laiya kavah ding, Israel molsang molvum asang lai jouse chu ama ho dinga neh thei hamhing jeng keh ding; chukoma hamhing nehna gam nom tah a chu ama ho kol uva, Israel molsang dung hamhing phatna lah tah a chu lhale ding ahiuve.
Keima mong mong hi kakelngoite chinga kapan ding, kelngoite chu kakolsah ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

Keiman amangsa holdoh ing ting, ache mangsa kanung puiding, akeng baiya akeng kachempeh a, ahatmo jong chu kahatsah ding, chule athaole athahat lai jong chu kachintup jinga, abonchauva chu adih lam cheh a kavahva jing jeng ding ahi.
Nang ho dingin Vo kakelngoi honte, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye: Neihin vetan, keiman kelngoi le kelngoi kah a jong kelngoi chalte le kelchalte kah a jong thu katan ding ahi.“

Nang ho dinga hamhing phalai lai neh a chujou tengle amoh chengse nakengtouva kachil ngimuva, twi chim lai lai nadonuva chule amoh chengse nakengto nasaineh jiu chu phaset jeng hilouva na-ngaitou ham?
Keima kelngoite chun nangho chil thangsa chu aneh-uva chule nanghon nakengtouva nasaineh sau twi chu adon dingu ham?
“Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin ama ho jah a hitin aseiye: Neihin vetan, keima mong mongin kelngoi thao le kelngoi asagong kah a thu katan ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile athahat ho chun jet le veiya naneh touvin, ahatmo ho chu nakin napih-uvin, hiti chun abonchauva gamtina nanocheh masang seuvin naboluvin ahi;
Keiman kakelngoi hon chu kahuhhinga, gamsa nehgam ding bep’a umkit louhel ding ahiuve; chule kelngoi le kelngoi kah jenga jong thu katanpeh ding ahi.
Chutengle abonchauva chunga chu kelngoi ching khatseh, kalhacha David chu kapansah ding, aman abonchauva avah ding ahi; abonchauva chu avah a chule achinguva pang ding ahiye.
Chuta chu keima Pakai kiti pa hi a-Pathenu kahi ding, kalhacha David chu ama ho lah a leng chapa a pang ding ahi; keima Pakai kitipan hiche thu kasei ahitai.

Keiman ama ho hito chamna ding kitepna khat kasemdoh a, gamsunga kona gamsa hang jouse kasuhmang ding, hita chu abonchauva gammang lah a chu lung mong tah a chenguva, thing lah jenga jong kol ding ahiuve.“

Chujongle keiman ama ho ahiuvin, akimvel dunguva thinglhang gam ahin, phatthei bohna kahisah peh ding; ama ho dinga kum kiheichin seh le gohong kajuhsah jing ding, hiche ho chu phattheina gohong hi ding ahi.

Chule loujaova thingphung ho jong hung gan tin, leiset jeng jong aga hung pung theiya hijeh a chu abonchauva agamsunguva lung monga um ding ahiuve; keiman anamkolu kaheboh a chule ama ho soh vula vulte khut’a kona kahuhdoh phat leh keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.
Ama ho chu namtin vaipi dinga nehgam ding bep’a um talou diu, gam sahangten jong a bahgam loudiu ahi; abonchauva lung mong tah a chenguva, koimachan jong akichat tijatsah louhel ding ahiuve.
Chujou tengle keiman ama ho chu muchi phatah tah kapeh ding, hijeh a chu gamsunga kel a thigam louhel ding ahitauve, chujongle namtin vaipi seiset athoh kit louhel diu ahitai.
Chutengle ama hon Pakai kitipa keima hi a-Pathenu kahin, ama ho kaumpi jinge, chule Israel insung mite hi keima mite ahiuve, ti ahetdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Hijeh chun nangho kakelngoite, kahamhing lah a kivah kelngoite nahiuvin, keima na-Pathenu kahi, tin Pakai Pathen in aseiye” ati.
Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung in hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Se’ir molsang lam khu namai ngat’in lang chutengle amolsang dounan gaovin.

amolsangjah a thu seiyin lang Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin: Neihin vetemin, Se’ir molsang nang hi keiman kadou nahi, hijeh a chu keiman nang douna kakhut kalhana chule ahomkeo le alheng lhona kajam ding nahi.
Nakhopi jouse jong alheng lhona kajama, ahomkeova naum ding ahi; chutah le keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi nahetdoh ding ahiye.
Ipijeh-inem itile nangman nahotbol jing jengin Israel mite chu ahamset pettah uleh atalen mat’u achaina lamtah chun chemjam hemhatpi chutoh naton, napedoh tai;

hichejeh chun keima kahing jinge, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, keiman thisan katildoh a, thisan chun nanung nung adel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile thisana themmo chang nahin, hijeh a chu thisanin nanung nung adel ding ahi.
Keiman Se’ir molsang chu alheng lhon le ahomkeova kajam ding, chule hichea hung lut lea apotle jouse chu kasatgam ding ahi.
