Keiman namolsang jouse chu tolthi kadipset ding, athinglhang jouse, naphaicham dung tin le nahoh lam dung jouse jong chu chemjama kisatlih tolthi kadipset ding ahi.
Keiman aitih chan geiya jong nahomkeova kajam ding, chule nakhopi jouse jong chenna kinei louhel ding ahi. Chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi.
Nangman, ‘Nam minthang cheh hiche teni hileh hiche gamsung teni hi kei ding, hiche teni hi keihon chenna kaneiyuva kalokhum dingu ahi’ tia, Pakai hikom tah-a anaum pet a nasei ahin,“

hichejeh tah chun Pakai Pathenin keima kahing jinge, tin aseiyin; keiman jong ama ho nahot jeh a nalunghan le nathangset dungjui banga ama ho nabol bang banga chu nangma kabol ding nahi; chule nathu katan tengle ama ho lah a kei le kei kakiphon doh ding ahi.

Chujongle nangman Pakai kitipa hin Israel molsang jouse douna taitomna thu naseiya, hita nati, ‘Hiche molsang ho hi ahomkeova kijamsoh a eiho kivahna dinga eikipeuvah ahi,’ tia. nasei chu kaja jing jenge, ti nahetdoh ding ahi.
Chujongle nakam sungin kei dounan nakichoisang jin, keima dounan thu naseibe be jengin ahi; hiche thu chu keiman kajai.
Hijeh chun Pakai Pathenin hi tin aseiye: Leiset pumpi kipana dinga keiman nangma hi ahomkeova kajam ding nahi.

Israel insung mite gamsung ahomkeova anaum pet’a nangman nakipapi banga chu nang jong chutobangma chu kabol ding nahi; Se’ir molsang, nangma ahomkeova naum ding, Edom pumpi le asunga umjouse aboncha ahomkeova um ding ahi. Chutengle ama hon keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.
“Mihem chapa, nangman Israel molsang jouse chung changa gaothu seiyin lang, chule Vo Israel molsang jouse, Pakai thusei hi ngaiyuvin, tin seipeh-in.
Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Ipijeh-inem itile melmaten nangho chung changa, ‘He ha, gollui laiya munsang jouse keiho kachangtauve,’ tia aseiyu ahin,

hichejeh chun gaovin lang Pakai Pathenin hitin∑aseiye, tin seipeh-in: Ipijeh-inem itile ama hon ahomkeova nakoiyuva, jet le vei sah le lhanga kona naneh chinto jeng jeh-uva namtin vaipi adang jouse dinga umkha nahiu ahitan, hijeh a jong chu mitin dinga kihoulim nopna le amelse sea kihou lhihna nahiu ahitai;

hichejeh chun Vo Israel molsang ho, Pakai Pathen thusei hi ngaiyuvin: Pakai Pathenin molsang jouse le thinglhang jouse, hohlam dung jouse leh phaicham dungjouse, ahomkeo le alheng lhona kijamsa khopi jouse, akimvela cheng namtin vaipi jouse nuisat bep dinga um jouse jah a chun hitin thu seiyin;

chuti ahijeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Keima kalunghang behseh jengin thangse tah-in namtin vaipi douna le Edom mite keima gamsunga ama ho le ama ho kipedoh jenguva, lungthim pumpi kipah thanoma chenna nei ho chuleh agama mi adelmang theiyuva ama hon agam chu achomgam theina dinguva noise tah a thusei ho dounan thu kaseiye.

Hichejeh hin Israel gamsung dounan gaovin lang chule molsang jouse le thinglhang gam dung, hohlam dung le phaicham dung jouse jah a chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin seipeh-in: Neihin vetan, keima kalung asa behseh jengin thangset sumin thu kaseiye, ajeh chu namtin vaipi housetna nathoh thoh jenguvin ahi;
chuti ahijeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Nakimvel uva cheng namtin vaipin jong housetna athoh khah na dinguva keiman kahahselsa ahitauve.
Ahin Israel molsang jouse, nangho vang hung nalhauvin natin, kamite Israelte dinga nahung gapat dingu ahitai, ajeh chu kamite inlam jona hung kilevah ding ahitauve.“
Ijeh-inem itile neihin vetan, kei nangho dinga um kahin, nahenguva hung kiheiying ting, min louva nakibol diu, muchi tuna nakinei dingu ahi;

chule keiman nachunguva cheng ding mihem kapunsah ding, Israel insung pumpi, abonchauva kapunsah ding ahiuve; khopi jouse jong chenna kinei ding, ahomkeova alheng lhona kijamsa muntin jouse kithah sahphat soh ding ahi;

chutengle nachunga cheng ding mihem le gamsa kapunsah a, ama ho punguva chule achi anam phathei ding ahiuve; masang laiya naum banguva chu keiman nangho hi chenna theiya kasemdoh ding, chujongle masang laiya sanga gamchenga kabolphat ding nahiuve. Chutengle nanghon keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi.

Keiman nangho chunga hi mihemte kavale sah ding, kamite Israelte jeng jong hungvah le ding ahiuve; ama ho chun chen muna aneiyuva, nangho hi ama ho chen mun nahi diu, chujongle ama ho chu cha le nao beiya nalha louhel dingu ahitai.
Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Ipijeh-inem itile mihemten nangho jah a aseiyuvin, ‘Gam leiset kiti nangman mihemte nabah gamin, nang dinga nanam mite jouse chu cha le nao beiyin nakoitai,’ atiuve;
hijeh a chu nangman mihemte nabahgam kit louhel ding, chule nang dinga nanam mite jouse jong chu cha le nao beiya nakoi louhel ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye;

chujongle keiman namtin vaipi housetna chu nangma kajahsah kit louhel ding, nangin jong mitin namtin vetda chu nathoh khah kit louhel ding ahitai, namite vaipi jong chu nakipal lhuhsah louhel ding ahitai, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye” ati.
Pakai thusei kahenga ahung lhungin hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Israelte agamsung mong monga achen pet’uvin agam chu athilbol anatoh chengseuvin ana Suboh tauve; achon umchanu chu keima angsunga numei athi neipet’a aboh tobang khun aboh jenguve.
Hijeh chun keiman gamsunga thisan aso jeh-uvin kalungsatna achunguva twisih bangin kasung lhan, gamsung suhbohna aneiyu milimdoi asemthu chengseu jeh jong chun kalungsat khumin ahi.
Abonchauvin namtin vaipi lah thenan kaneiyin, gam tina kathe thangsoh tauve; achon umchan dungjuile athilbol chengseu dungjuiya athu u katan peh ahi.

Hichan gei jong chun namtin vaipi lah a ahung phat’uvin, achenna chanuvah keima mintheng asuboh nalaiyuve, hichea chun midangin ama ho chung chang thudola hin, hiche mite hi Pakai mite ahiuvin, ahinla ama ho hi Pakai gamsunga kona potdoh tei tei ding ahitauve,’ tin aseiyuve.“
Hijeng jongle Israel mite alutna chanuva namtin vaipi suhboh ding bep’a aumsah jiu kamintheng chu khohsahna kaneiye.

Hijeh hin Israel insung mite jah a chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye tin seipeh-in: ‘Vo Israel insung, keiman hiche kabolgot hi nangho khohsah man ahipoi, nanghon nachenna chanuva namtin vaipi lah a nasuhboh jiu keima Mintheng khohsah mana kabol ding ahibouve.

Namtin vaipi lah a suhbohsa um keima min loupi tah, nanghon mi jouse lah a nasuhboh jiu chu, athen dan kaphondoh ding ahi; nangho jeh a keiman amitmuva kathendan kaphondoh tengle namtin vaipin jong keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itile keiman nangho hi namtin vaipi jousea kona kapuidoh a, gamtina kona kakhop khom diu, chutengle nangho gamsung mong monga kahin puilut ding nahiuve.
Keiman nachunguva twitheng kachap khumuva, nabohna chengseuva kona nangho kakisop thengsoh diu, namilimdoi semthu chengseuva kona jong kasiltheng ding nahiuve.
Lungchang thah beh khat kapeh-uva, nasunguva lhagao thah beh kakhumpeh diu, natahsauva kona songtum tobang lung chang chu kakaldoh a, tahsa nema nem lungchang kakhum peh ding nahiuve.
Chutengle nasunguva kalhagao kakhumpeh a, keima chondan thu ho chu kajuisah diu, kachonna dan ho chu kitup tah a kanitsah ding nahiuve.
Keiman napu napateu kapehsa gamsunga chun nangho chenguvin natin, chutengle nangho chu kamite nahiuva, keima hi na-Pathenu kahi ding ahi.
Chule nabohna chengseuva konin keiman nahuhdoh-uving ting, chujongle chang le mim kakou khom a, neng jeng junga kakoi ding, nachunguva kel kalhah sah louhel ding ahi.
“Thing gale lousoh thalhingset’a kasosah ding, hijeh a chu namtin vaipi lah a kel hahsa nathoh kit louhel dingu ahi.

Chutah le nachon nau phalou jouse le nathilbol u aphalou chengse nageldoh-uva, nathemmona jouseu le nathilbol u thet umtah tah ho jeh a chu nangho le nangho jeng jong naki kidahuva nakilohso khum jeng dingu ahiye.
Hiche hi kihet cheh-uvin; hiche kabol ding hi nangho khohsah jala kabol ding ahipoi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye. Vo Israel insung mite, nachon nau aphat lou jeh hin jah chauvin lang lung donguvin.
Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Keiman nathemmona chengseuva kona kasop theng nikho chuleh khopi jouse jong chenna thei kahisah a chule ahomkeova kijamsa muntin jong chu kisathah kit ding ahi.“
Chutengle ahomkeova umsa gamsung jong louva, kibol a, ajotpa jousen amusoh keiya ahomkeova kijam jam jeng khela louva kiboljo ding ahi.

Hichele chun mihon, ‘Ahomkeova lumsa hiche gam hi Eden honsung tobang ahitai, chule alheng alhona kijamsa ahomkeosa, khopi gemsa jouse pi hi tun chen nan akineiyin, kulpi akikaikhum soh tai,’ tia asei dingu ahi.

Chutengle nakimveluva kidalha namtin vaipi jousen keima Pakai kitipa hin hiche khopi gemsa ho hi kasah phat kit’a, ahom keova um gamsunga muchi kathah tulut kit ahi, ti ahetdoh dingu ahi; Pakai kitipa keiman kaseisa ahitan, hiche hi kabol tei ding ahitai.
“Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Keiman Israel insung mite chun hiche jong hi neibolpeh-un tia angeh na dinguva kasol ding ahi: amiteu chu kelngoi hon banga apunjal theina diu akisei diu ahi.

Kilhaina gantha a kimang ding kelngoi hon tobang ahiuva, Jerusalema aphat neiya kut kibol teng kelngoi hon kitollut tobang ahina dingu; hita chu akeoseh a kijamsa khopi jouse chu mihemte ahon hona akitol lut’uva adimsetna dingu ahi. Chutengle keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi, ati.“
Kachunga Pakai khut ahung chun, chule aman Pakai lhagaova konin eipuidoh tan, phaicham lailung khat’a eitousah tai; hiche lai chu mihem gu le chang jeng ana dimset’e.
Hiti chun aman gu le chang lah jenga chun eipuile len ahileh, vetan, phaicham sung dimset chu gu le chang atama tam anaumin ahi; chule vetemin, aboncha chun agotah lheng cheh ahitai.
Hichun aman kajah a thu aseiyin, “Mihem chapa, hiche gu le chang ho pi hi hing theiyin tem?” eitin ahileh, keiman jong, “Vo Pakai Pathen nangman nahenai,” kati.
Chuin aman jong keijah a. ‘“Hiche gu le chang ho jah ding hin gaovin lang, chule hiche ho jah a hin, Vo gu le chang gosa ho Pakai thusei hi ngaiyuvin.
Hiche gu le chang gosa ho henga hin Pakai Pathenin hin thu aseiye: Vetan, keiman nasunguva haitheina hu kalha lut’a nangho nahung hindoh dingu ahi.

Nachunguva thagui nalhunpeh uving ting, voujanga katom dingu, chule vun kasempeh kit’uva, kakhumjol diu, chutah le nasunguva haitheina hu kakhum peh uva mihing nasodoh dingu ahi; chutengle keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi, nanghon nahetdoh dingu ahiye,” ati.

Hijeh chun keiman thu eikipeh dungjuiyin gaothu kasei tai; ahin keiman gaothu kaseipet chun o khat ana gingin, vetan ana aotel tul jengin ahileh, gu le chang ho chu agu le agu kitona cheh a ahung kitomat soh keiyuvin ahi.

Hichun ken jong kaven ahileh, vetan, gubuh ho chung dunga chun thaguiyin jong ahintom in, achunga voujang ahung kisemdoh in, chuin abonchan vun in atomjolsoh tai; ahivangin asunguva haitheina hu aumhih laiye.

Chutah chun aman kei jah a thu aseiyin, “Gao temin, haitheina hu jah a chun gaovin, mihem chapa, chule haitheina hujah a chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin seipeh-in: Vo haitheina hu kolkimvel ning lia konin hung kitolin lang, hiche tolthisa ho hi hin haikhum temin, chutengle hiche ho hin hinna anei theina dinguvin,” ati.

Hijeh chun aman thu eipeh bang bangin keima kagaovin ahileh asunguva chun haitheina hu ahung lut’in, hiche ho chu ahingdoh tauve, chule akenguva ahung dindoh soh keiyuva ahileh sepai hon tamtah alhingtauve.

Hichun aman kajah a aseiyin, “Mihem chapa, hicheng gu le chang chengse hi Israel insung pumpi ahiuve. Vetan, ama hon, ‘Keiho vang kagu kachang jouseu agosoh tan, kakinepnau jong abeisoh tai, chule kei ho akiveltol hel kahiuve,’ tin aseitauve.

Hichejeh chun gaovin lang ajah-uva Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin seipeh-in: Vetan, keiman nangho lhankhuh kotsin jouse kahondoh a, Vo kamite, nalhankhuh dunguva kona katho doh ding nahiuve; chutah le Israel gamsunga inlam jona kapuiding nahiuvin ahi.
Vo kamite, keiman nalhankhuh chengseu kahondoh a chule nangho jeng jong nalhankhuh dunguva kona kathodoh tenguleh keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi.

Chutengle keiman nasunguva kalhagao khuming ting, nangho nahindoh soh dingu, chule nangho hi nagamsung mong monguva kakoi ding nahiuve; hichele chun Pakai kitipa keima hin thu kaseiya chule bol jong kabol ahitai, ti nahetdoh dingu ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.
Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung in hitin ati:

“Mihem chapa, tenggol khat kilah-in lang chule hiche tenggol chunga chun, ‘Judah le akiloipi Israel chate ding,’ tin sunin; chujou tengleh tenggol chombeh khat kilah kit’in lang achunga chun, ‘Hiche E’phaim tenggol hi Joseph le amato kiloikhom Israel insung pumpi ding ahi,’ tin sunin;
chule atenggol teni chu nangma khut mong monga tenggol khatseh asodoh theina dingin jopmat’in.
Hichea chu namiten najah a, ‘Ipi itina dinga nangman hiche hi nabol ham neihil chenuvin,’ tia asei tenguleh;

ajah-uvah, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin seipeh-in: Vetan, Keiman E’phraim khut’a um Joseph tenggol le Israel phung mite Joseph to kiloikhom chengse chu kalahdoh ding koncha ahitai; keiman achunga chu ama ho Judah tenggol chutoh kajopmat’a, hita chu ama ho keima khut mong monga pumkhat sohdoh thei ding ahiuve.
Chule ama ho mitmua achunga lekhajem nasut’a tenggol teni nakhut’a nakichoi tengleh,

ajah-uvah Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin: Vetan, keiman Israel chate chu achelutnau namtin vaipi jousea kona kapui khom a, jet le vei sah le lhanga kona kadonkhom ding, chutengleh ama ho gamsung mong monga kahin puilut ding ahiuve;

chujongle Israelte molsang chung dunga chu keiman ama ho nam khat lhinga katundoh ding, achunguva chu leng khat’in lengvai apoh ding ahin; hichele chun ama ho nam ni, jat ni hita louva, lenggam nia jong kihomkhen lou ding ahitauve.

Hiche kalsea chu ama ho le ama ho jeng jong amilimdoi semthu chengseu hihen lang, deilou tah tah thil abol jiu ho hijongleh, ahilou jongle, suhkhel thil tampi aneihou chu hijongle, kisuhbohna anei louhel dingu ahiye; keiman ama ho chu chonsetna anei jiu akiseiset nau jenga jong kahuhdoh ding, abonchauva kasuh theng ding ahiuve; chutengle ama ho kamite hiuvin tin keima jong a-Pathenu kahi ding ahi.

Kalhacha David chu ama ho chunga leng chang ding, hita chu abonchauva kelngoi ching mi khatseh seh anei diu ahi. Ama bon kachonna danthu ho ajuiyuva, kachondan chengse jong ching thei tah a anit jing dingu ahi.“

Ama ho chu kalhacha Jacob kapehsa, napu napateu chenna gamsunga chu cheng diu; ama ho ahiuvin, achateu, ahin, chule atuteu ahin atonsot atonsot geiya chengden jing ding ahiuvin, chua chu kalhacha David chu atonsot geiya alamkai uva pang ding ahi.

Ama ho toh keiman chamna dinga kitepna kasemdoh ding, hiche kitepna chu atonsot geiya kakitepnau hiding ahi; chutengle keiman ama ho chu phatthei kaboh a kapunsah ding, atonsot geiya dinga alailung tah-uva kamuntheng katundoh ding ahi.
Kachen mun ama hoto kilhon jing ding, keima a-Pathenu kahiya, chule ama ho kamite hi ding ahiuve.
Chuta chu ajalah tah-uva keima muntheng akitundoh a atonsot geiya aumden tengleh, namtin vaipi jousen jong keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahiya Israel suthenga pangpa kahi hi ahetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Kahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung in hitin ati:
“Mihem chapa, Magog gama Meshech le Tubal haosa Gog lam ngan kiheiyin lang adounan gaovin,
chule Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin seiyin: Vo Gog, Meshech le Tubal haosapu, neihin vetemin, keiman nang kadou nahi;

chule keiman nangma kanole lea nakhalhang tenia thih koiya kakoi ding, nangma nahin nasepaite abonchau ahin, sakolte le sakol touthem ho ahiuvin, aboncha galvona kivon jouse toh ahin, mihon tamtah lum le pho thoa chemjam mangthei jouse toh kakaidoh tha ding;
Persia ahin, Cush ahin, chule Put jong ama ho toh ahung kilhonin, abonchauvin pho le thih lukhuh a tho cheh-uve;
Gomer le asepai honte ahiuvin, Beth-togar’mah jong chu sah lam gam mong lampeh a konin asepaite ahonpin ahin kilhonpin ahi, chule hiti chun mipi tamtah-in nangma nalhonpi.
Kigon lang kigosan umin, nangle navela kikhom sepaite chu ama ho vetup din panguvin. “

Nikho sotpi jou tengleh nangma jong nakisimtoh ding, kumlhun lam tengleh nangma jong gal nunga kisemthahsa gamsung, namtin vaipi lah a kona Israel molsang dunga mipi hung khomna gamsung, aitih a jong alheng lhona anakijamsa jing gamsung, amite jeng jong namtin vaipi lah a kidong khomuva, tua mongtah a cheng, abonchauva hiche gamsung chutoh kidou ding nahi.
Nangin manon natin, huise banga nahung kitola, meilhangin gamsung atom tobang nahi ding, nangle nasepaite aboncha nahiuva, chujongle mipi tamtah-in jong nakilhonpi ding ahi.
“Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Hiche nikhoa chu nalung sunga lunggel tampi hung lut ding, chutengle nangman thilgon phalou nagon ding,

chule hita nasei ding, ‘Keima kulpi kikai khum lou khoneo neo dou dingin kontou vinge; hiche mongtah a thipbeh cha cheng mite khu gadel khum tange, ama ho khat chan jong kulpi akaipouvin kelkot jong aneipouve, kelkotgol jong agolpouve,’ tin nate;

hita chu thilkeo kichomdoh a, chomdohsa thilkeo ho kipoh mangding, ahomkeo le alheng alhola kijamsa muntin, tua chenna kinei kit ho chu nadel khuma, namtin vaipia kona kidong khom mite gancha le thilkeo haotah tah, leiset lailung tah a chengte chu nadelkhum ding ahi.

Sheba le Dedan chule Tarshish a kivei mite leh akhoneo dung jousen nangma jah a, ‘Nangma thilkeo kichoma nahung ham? Nasepaite hi chomdohsa thilkeo po dingle dangka sana po mang ding, gancha jouse le thilkeo jouse po ding, thilkeo tamtah kichomdoh dinga nakhop khom ham ong?’ tia asei diu ahi.

Hichejeh chun mihem chapa, nangman gaovin lang chule Gog jah a chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin seipeh-in: Hiche nikho le chun kamite Israel chu mong tah a hung khosa diu, nangma vang nang le nang lung mongmoa naum ding.“
chule sahlam gam ning chong lampeh a kona nahunga, nangle naumpi mipi tamtah toh nahung kilhon ding, abonchauva chu sakol chung jenga hung touvuva, galsat thaneitah cheh toh nahung kilhon ding ahi;

hita chu kamite Israel dou dinga nahung kon touva, meilhangin gamsung akhu jing tobanga nahung kon ding ahi. Ninu nung lamleh keiman nangma hi kagamsung doubol dinga kahin puilut ding nahin, chutengleh Vo Gog, namtin vaipi jouse hin nang jala keima eihetdoh diu, ken jong ama ho mitmua kathenna kaphondoh ding ahi.

“Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Nang hi masang laiya kalhacha Israel themgaohoa kona thu kana seijia, ama hon anikho laiyuva khonung tengleh ama ho dou dinga kapuilut ding nahi, tia kanaseisah ji chu nangma hi nahim?
Ahinla Pakai Pathenin aseiyin, Gog chu Israel gamsunga galbol dinga ahung kondoh nikho leh kalunghang ding ahi.
Ajeh chu keiman katom ngaina le kalungsat deoje ju jeh hin kaphongdoh-e. Hiche nikho le chun Israel gamsunga nasa tah a ling kihot ding ahi;

twikhanglen a nga jouse ahin, chunga leng vachate ahiuvin, gamlah a gamsa ho ahin, tola kithol tho ganhing jouse ahiuvin, chule leiset chunga cheng mihem jouse ahiuva ka-angsunga kihot lingsoh hel diu, molsang jouse jong kihotnem soh keiya, songkol jouse jong chimlha soh ding, kulpi jouse jong tol a lhumat soh hel ding ahi.
Hita chu keiman Gog doudinga tijat umtah tah thiljouse kakou khomsoh ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye; mitinin asopipa douna dinga chemjam alap cheh ding ahi.

Gamna hise kalansah a chule thisan longa Gog thu katan ding ahi; amale asepaite, chule alhonpi mipi jouse chunga go kajuhsah a, hohtwi kalon khumsah a, gel kalhah khumsah ding, meikongle kath kalhah khumsah ding ahi.
Hita chu keiman kaletje le kathenje kavetsah a, namtin vaipi mitmua kei le kei ka kiphondoh ding ahi. chutengle mihon keima hi Pakai chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.
Mihem chapa, nangman Gog dounan gaovin lang, chule Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, tin aseiyin: Neihin vetan, Vo Gog, Meshech le Tubal leng chapate lah a alalpenpa, keiman nang kadouva;“
kanole kanolea, masang lama kadel ding, sahlam gam mong lampeh a kona kahin puidoh a, Israel molsang jouse douna galbol dinga kapui ding nahi;
chutah le nakhut veilama nathalpi kabeh lhah peh a, nakhut jet lama nathal chang jouse aboncha kalhah mangsah ding ahi.

Chule Israel molsang chunga chu nang jong nasepaite jong chule nakoma um mipi ahin, nabon chauva nalhuh lhamsoh diu; chunga leng vacha sahing neithei jouse vahna kanei ding, gamsahang jouse kaneh sah ding nahiuve.
Gam ong laiya chu nalhuh ding ahi, ajeh chu keiman kaseisa ahitai, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Chujongle Magog le twikhanglen pang dunga lungmong tah a chengte chunga mei kahal ding, chutengle keima hi Pakai chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.

“Keiman kami Israelte lailunga kamintheng hi kaphondoh ding, kamintheng chu mi kasuhboh sah kit louhel ding ahi; chutah le namtin vaipi hin keima hi Pakai chu kahiya Israel Mithengpa kahi hi ahetdoh dingu ahi.
Vetan, ahung guilhunga ahitan, akipolut koncha ahitai, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye. Hiche nikho chu ahi keiman kaseisa chu.

Chutengle Israel khopi dunga cheng jouse chedoh-uvin tin, gal manchah chengse chu meiya atiuva ahalvam diu, lum jouse pho jouse, thalpi jouse le thalchang jouse, teng tohem jouse le tengpeh hem jouse aboncha meiya atiuva kum sagi sunga ahalvam dingu ahiye;“

hijeh a chu ama hon gamlah a thing ti ding jong akipoh lou diu, gammang lah a thing jeng jong akichen lou dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile agal manchah jouseu chu meiya akiti ti jeng diu ahi; ama ho chomgam miho chu ama hon ale chomgam diu chule athilkeo jouseu analahpeh te chu athilkeovu alahpeh dingu ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

“Hiche nikho le chun keiman Israel gamsunga twikhanglen niso lam, kholjin mite kititna phaicham chu Gog buikhuh mun dinga kapehdoh ding, kholjin mite lampi kiting kih ding ahi, ajeh chu Gog le amipi abonchauva hikoma chu kivui cheh diu ahiye; hijeh a chu hiche lai chu Hamon-gog kiti ding ahi.
Agamsung suh thengna dinga Israel insung miten lha sagi sunga avui gunset dingu ahi.
Gamsung mijousen ama ho chu avui gunset ding, chule keiman kaloupina kaphondoh nikhoa hiche abolu chu ama ho kijabolna dinga ajat ni jen geiya kisimpeh ding ahiuve, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

Chujongle agamsung suh thengna dinga chu ama hon mi alhendoh-uva, tang louhela gamsung akholsah-uva amoh chengse jong avuisah sah jeng dingu ahi; lha sagi kichai tengleh ama hon mithi aholpat dingu ahi.

Chuta chu gamsung akholuva mi khat touvin mihem gubuh khattou amudoh a ahileh, hichea chu aman melchihna ikhat khat aphupeh ding, thivui hon Hamon-gog phaichama chu avuidoh masang seuva um jing ding ahi.
Hikoma chun Mamo’nah kiti khopi khat jong aume. Hita hi ama hon gamsung chu asuhtheng dingu ahiye.

Mihem chapa, nang din Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: chunga leng vacha sahing jouse le gamlah a gamsahang jouse jah a seipeh-in, ‘Hung kikou khomuvin lang gamtin gamtanga konin keiman nangho dinga kilhaina gantha kut kabolpeh nauva hin hunguvin, Israel chung dung jousea kilhaina gantha kut nasatah akibole; hichea chu nanghon sa nanehuva chule thisan nadon dingu ahi.“

Nanghon mihatte tahsa naneh-uva leiset leng chapate thisan nadon diu, kelngoichalte le kelngoite tahsa le thisan naneh-uva nadon diu, bongchal hoa ahin, abonchauva hi Bashan phaiya kivah thaochet cheh ahiuve.
Hita chu keiman kagonpeh kilhaina gantha kut’a chu navaset kahseuva athao lai lai naneh-uva, nakhamset kah seuva athisan nadon don jeng dingu ahi.
Nabonchauva keima dokhang chunga chu sakolsa le achunguva toute sa ahin, mihatte le galsat hatte tahsa naneh vaset dingu ahi,’ tin seipeh tan, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
“Keiman namtin vaipi lah a chu kaloupina katundoh a chule namtin vaipin abon chauva kathutan chu amusoh keidiu, achunguva kalhah kakhut jeng jong amudoh dingu ahi.
Hiche nikhoa pat’a chu Israel insung miten keima hi Pakai kitipa a-Pathenu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi.

Chujongle namtin vaipi hin Israel insung mite hi athemmo jeh-uva soh-changa anache ahiuve, ti ahetdoh diu ahi; ipijeh-inem itile, keima jou le nala einabol uva, hijeh a chu keiman kakihei mangsan jenga, aki doupiteu khut’a kapeh doh a chule abonchauva chemjama lousoh hel ahiuve.
Keiman ama ho chu athenlou dungjui leh achonkhelna jouseu dungjuiya kabola, abonchauva kakihei mangsan jeng anahi.

Hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Tua hi keiman Jacob dinga hamphatna kathahsem peh ding, chule Israel insung pumpi chunga hepina kanei ding ahi; chujongle keima mintheng dinga hi katompan ding ahiye.“
Chule ama ho jong agamsung uva koimacha ahoh kicha diu beihela mong tah a achen tenguleh, masanga keima douna jou le nal thujenga ana chon nau ajachatnau jouseu asuhmil dingu ahi,
keiman ama ho chu mitin vaipia kona kakhop khoma amelmateu gamsunga kona kahin lepuilut kit teng, chujongle namtin vaipi tamtah mitmua ama ho jeh a kathenna kaphondoh ajachat asuhmil diu ahi.

Hichele chun keima hi Pakai a-Pathenu kahijeh a ama ho namtin vaipi jouse lah a sohchanga kanasola, chua agamsungma mauva kahin khop khomkit ahi, ti ahetdoh dingu ahi. Alah uva mihem khat cha jeng jong namtin vaipi lah a kadalhah louhel ding;
chujongle ama hoa kona kamai jong kahei mang kit louhel ding ahitai, keiman Israel insung mite chunga kalhagao kabuh lhah phatle chun, tin, Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.

Kasohchan nungu kum som ni le kum nga lhin kum, chuche kum kipat til kum bul lam, chuche lha, nisom lhin ni, khopi galin alah kal kum som le kum li lhin kum, hiche nikhole le chun keima chunga Pakai khut ahung chun,
chuin aman Israel gamsunga Pathena kona thilmu tamtah vetsah dingin eipuiyin, molsang tah khat chungvuma eitousah-in, kagal lama chun khopi tobang lim gonsa khat hi anaumin ahi.
Aman hikoma eipuilut phat chun vetan, pasal khat amelput dan chu sum-eng tobang jeng, akhut’a chu chaojang thiltena khat kichoi anaumin, amapa chu kelkot lampia anadingin ahi.

Chuin hiche mipa chun kajah a, “Mihem chapa, namit te nin ven lang, nanakhang te nin ngaiyin, chule keiman kavetsah ding chengse hi nalunggil tah-in gelin, ajeh chu keiman hiche kavetsah theina dinga hikoma nahung kipuilut ahiye; namu jouse chu Israel insung mite seipeh-in,” ati.

Hichun vetemin, houin pam kimvela chun kulpi khat anaumin, chule mipan akhut’a akichoi thiltena chu asao dan tong gup alhingin, thiltena khat khat chu tong khat alhingin, khutchong te ten asaove; hiti chun kulpi bang chu alet dan a ten ahileh thiltena khat alhingset’in, asan dan jong chu thiltena khat alhingin ahi.
Chuin amapa chu kelkot lampi langa chun avahlut’in, niso lam angan, akalbi dunga chun akaltou touvin, kelkot hongcha chu aten ahileh thiltena khat alhum mangin ahi;
chule alangtoa adan teni chu thiltena khat asaovin, thiltena khatma alene; chule indan teni kikah aong lai chu tong nga ahin; hongcha kelkot mai asunglam atopna gei chu thiltena khat alhingin ahi.
Chujouvin aman kelkot lampi amailam chu abonchan aten ahileh tong get alhinge;
akelkot joIpi ho chu tong ni ni alhingin, chule kelkot mailam chu asung nung lama aumin ahi.
Chule niso lam kelkot jetle veiya chun indan danthum aumin, indan jouse chu alet aneo akibang chehuve; chule jetle veiya akelkot jolpi ho jong chu alet aneo akibangsap cheh-uvin ahi.
Chuin kelkot availam lutna lai chu aten ahileh tong som alhingin, chule kelkot chu availam apumpia atea ahileh tong som le tong thum alhinge.
Jetle veiya indan kikah a chun tho akikaiyin, ajetle aveiya tong khat cheh alhinge; chujongle jetle veiya indan teni chu ajet aveiya tong gup gup alhingin ahi.
Hichun aman alang khat lama indan nung lama pat’in alang khat indan nung lam geiyin kelkot chu aten ahileh, akotpi khat’a pat akotpi khat gei chun aletdan tong som ni le tong nga alhinge.
Chuin hongcha jong aten ahileh tong som ni alhingin, chule kelkot lampi hongcha kimvel chengse chu thutanna muna kimang ahi.
Kelkot maiya pat kelkot hongcha sung nunglam lutna aning chong gei chu tong som nga alhinge.

Chule kelkot lampi chun akimvela bangkot aneipeh-in, indan teni sung lama ajolpi teni lam ngan ajumjep jep’in, chutobangma chun hongcha kimvela jong chun bangkot tampi akigol pheiyin, chujongle ajolpi teni chunga chun tum thing jeng apangin ahi.
Chujouvin aman polama thutanna indana chun eipuidoh-in; hichun vetan, hikoma chun thutanna indan kimvela indan tampi le keng lampi anaumin, keng lampi masanga chun indan somthum jen anaumin ahi.
Chule keng lampi chu kelkot dung chan chan chun akilhung peh-in ahi; hiche keng lampi hi lampi noinungjo chu ahiye.

Hichun aman kelkot noinungjo amai asung nung lama pat thutanna indan sung nungjo, polam amai sungnung gei chu asao dan aten ahileh tong jakhat alhinge. Chujouvin ama chu niso lam jonin kamasanga achen,
niso lam ngat’a kisem kelkot chu polam thutanna chutoh kijopmat pai pai ahiye. Aman hiche chu adung le avai aten ahi.

Jetle veiya indan ho, alang langa chu indan danthum thum um ahin, ajolpi ho le ahongcha jong chu alet aneo dan kelkot masapen a toh kibang cheh ahiuve; adunglam chu tong som nga alhingin, availam chu tong som ni le tong nga alhing e.

Chujongle abangkot ho ahiuvin, ahongcha ahin, tum thing kimang ho chu ahin, abonchan niso lam ngat’a kisem kelkot’a pang ho chutoh alet aneo kibang cheh ahiuve; chule kalbi kal sagi akikhap touvin, hongcha chu asungah aumin ahi.

Chutengle sahlam ngat’a kisem kelkot to kigalsaipi chu, niso lam ngat’a kisem bang bangin, insung nung lama thutanna indan jotna kelkot ahiye; kelkot khat’ a pat’in kelkot khat geiyin aten ahileh tong jakhat alhinge.
Chujouvin aman lhanglam jonin eipuiyin ahileh, vetan lhang lama jong chun kelkot khatma anaumin ahi; chuin aman ajolpi chengse le ahongcha chu aten, hicheng jong chu adang tebep bep chu ahi cheh-uve.
Adang danga bangkot tampi aum bangin asung kimvela chun bangkot tampi le hongcha aumin; adung lam chu tong som nga alhingin, chule availam chu tong som ni le tong nga alhinge.
Kalbi kal sagi akikhap tou touvin, chule asunga chun hongcha ana umin ahi; chujongle alhungpi teni chunga chun tum thing apangin; ajet aveiya khat cheh apangin ahi.
Chutengle thutanna indan sungnung lhang lama jong chun kelkot khatma anaume; aman hiche chu aten ahileh, kelkot khat’a pat kelkot khat geiya chu lhanglam nga ate ahin, tong jakhat alhinge.
Hichun amapan lhanglam kelkot’a konin thutanna indan sung nunga chun eipuilut’in, lhanglam kelkot chu aten ahileh, hiche kelkot jong chu kelkot dang tebep bepma anahi.

Ajetle aveiya indan ho ahin, ajolpi cheng ahin, ahongcha ahin abonchan dang adang ho tebep bep chu ahiye; chule asunga chun akimvelin bangkot tampi aumin, ahongcha jong anaumin ahi; adung lam chu tong som nga alhingin, availam chu tong som ni le tong nga alhinge.
Chujongle akimvel lhung keiyin hongcha akihoiyin, tong som ni le tong nga jen asaovin, tong nga alen e.
Ahongcha chun polam thutanna indan chu angat’in, ajolpi teni chunga chunga chun tum thing apang cheh-in chule akalbi chu kal get’in akikhap touvin ahi.
Chujouvin amapan niso lam thutanna indan sung nung lama eipuiyin, akelkot chua ten ahileh, hiche jong chu adang ho toh alet aneo thakhatma ahi.

Ajet aveiya indan ho ahin, ajolpi teni ahin, ahongcha jeng jong chu alet aneo adang ho tobang bangma chu ahi cheh-uve; chule asunga chun akimvelin bangkot tampi aumin, hongcha jong aume; adung lam tong som nga alhingin, availam chu tong som ni le tong nga alhinge.
Ahongchan polam thutanna indan chu angan, chule ajolpi teni chunga chun tum thing jeng apangin alang langa khat cheh apangin ahi; chujongle akalbi lampi chu kal get’in akikhap touvin ahi.
Chujouvin amapan sahlam kelkot’a eipuiyin, kelkot chu aten ahileh, hiche jong chu kelkot dang ho tebep bepma ahi.

Ajetle aveiya indan ho ahiuvin, ajolpi teni ahin, chule ahongcha ahin, adang ho tebep bep chu ahi; akimvela chun bangkot tampi aumin, adung lam tong som nga alhingin, availam tong som ni le tong nga alhinge.
Ahongchan polam thutanna indan chu angan, chule ajolpi teni chunga chun tum thingjeng apangin, alang alanga khat cheh apange; chujongle kalbi lampi chu kal get’in akikhap touvin ahi.
Kelkot hongcha sunga chun indan khat aumin, kotpi khat jong aumin ahi, hikoma chu pumgo thilto ding kisop theng jia ahi.
Chule kelkot hongcha sunga chun dokhang ni alang langa aumin, hiche ho chunga chu pumgo thilto hihen lang chonset thilto hitah ta chule themmona thilto hileh, kithatji ahi.
Sahlam kelkot’a lutna hongcha polama chun dokhan ni aumin, chule alangkhat kelkot hongcha lama jong chu dokhan nima aumin ahi.
Asunga dokhan li aumin, kelkot polama dokhan li ma aumin, dokhan get jen ahiuvin, hicheng chunga chu kilhaina gantha ding jouse kithat ding hijah ahi.

Chujongle songa kikheng dokhan li aumin, hiche ho chu chonset thilto sa tha na ding ahi, tong khat le tong keh khat asaovin, tong khat le tong keh alenin, tong khat asangin, achunguva chu pumgo thilto le kilhaina gantha kitha na ding manchah jouse kikoi ding ahi.
Chule banjang channa sao thihkoi tampi asunga chu kikhai ahiuvin; chujongle dokhan chengse chunga chu gancha kitoh dohsa saphe kikoi ding ahiye.

Chujouvin aman thutanna indan sung nunga chun eipui lut’in, thutanna indan sung nunga chun indan dan ni aumin, khat sahlam kelkot’a uma lhang lam angat ahin, khatma chu lhang lam kelkot’a umah ahin, sahlam angat’e.
Chuin amapan kajah a, ‘Hiche indan lhanglam ngat’a kisempa hi houin vaipoa pang thempu ho ding ahin,

chule sahlam nga kisem indan hi maicham vaipoa pang thempu ho ding ahi; hiche ho hi Zadok chapate ahiuvin, Levi chapate lah a ama ho bou hin Pakai heng anailut theiyuva chule Pakai kin abol thei dingu ahi,’ ati.
Hichun amapan thutanna indan chu a ten ahileh, adung tong jakhat alhingin, avai tong jakhatma alhingin, aning li neiya kisem ahin, chule houin maiya chun maicham aumin ahi.

Chuin amapan houin hongcha lama eipuiyin, hongcha jolpi teni chu aten ahileh, alang langa chu tong nga nga alhinge; chule kelkot chu availam tong som le tong li alhingin, kelkot jetle veiya pal kigen teni chu tong thum thum alhing cheh lhone.

Hongcha chu adung lam tong som ni alhingin, availam tong som le tong ni alhinge chutengle hilama chun kalbi kal somin akikhap touvin, chule ajet aveiya ajolpi teni koma chun akhom lampi akiphut’in ahi.
Chujouvin amapan houin lailunga eipui lut’in, ajolpi ho chu aten ahileh ajet aveiya ajolpi teni aletdan chu availam tong gup gup alhingin ahi.

Chule akilutna chu availam tong som alhingin, chuche lutna ajet aveiya pal kigen teni chu alang langa tong nga nga alhingin ahi; houin lailung chu aten ahileh, adung tong som li alhingin, availam tong som ni alhinge.
Chuin ama indan sung nunga alut’in, alutna a ajolpi teni chu aten ahileh, tong ni alhing cheh-e; chule akilutna chu tong gup alhingin, akilutna ajet aveiya pal kigen teni chu tong sagi alhing cheh-e.

Chuin indan chu adung lam aten ahileh tong som ni alhingin, availam jong tong som ni ma alhinge, hiche hi houin lailung simtha lou ahiye. Hichun aman kajah a, ‘Hikom hi muntheng chung nung ahi,’ tin aseiye.
Hichun aman houin bang chu aten ahileh asadan chu tong gup alhingin, ajet aveiya indan houin kimvel dunga ho chu tong li li alhinguve.

Hiche inpanga indan kisem ho chu danthum thum kitonson ahin, khat chunga khat kisason son ahi, hita chu dan som thum lhing ahiuve. Chule inpanga indan kisemdoh chengse dousonna dinga chu akidoson tampi houin kimvel lhung keiya umah ahin, hiche ho chun inpanga indan chengse chu adousona, hita chu houin bang chun indan chengse chu adoukhah lou ahi.

Chule inpanga indan ho indan khat’a kona indan khat aphah tengle len cheh cheh a, akidoson ho let dungjuiya chu houin kimvel lhung keiya kikeh jep jep ahi; houin bang panga chu kalbi lampi khat kilhung touva, hita chu indan noinung pena pat indan chung nungpen geiya min indan lailha chu ajotpa kaltou thei ahiye.
Houin kimvela thusei mun kidosang jong aumin, chule inpanga indan chengse abulpi kisem ho chu thiltena lhingset tong gup gup alhingsoh keiye.
Inpanga indan kisem ho inbang chu asadan tong nga alhinge; chule atumbeh a uma thusei mun kidosang lai chu tong nga alhingin ahi. Houina thusei mun kidosang lai le
thutanna mun indan kikah lai chu availam houin kimvel soh helin tong som ni alhinge.

Chule inpanga indan kisem ho ding kotpi chengse chu atumbeh a thusei mun kidosang chunga chu kihong ahiuvin, kotpi khat chun sahlam angan, kotpi khatman lhanglam angan ahi; atumbeh a kidodoh chengse chu availam akimvelin tong nga alhinge.
Houin mailam nilhum lam ngat’a kisa in chu aletdan tong som sagi ahin, ainbang chu asadan akimvelin tong nga alhingin, chule adunglam chu tong som ko asaove.
Hichun aman houin chua ten ahileh asaodan tong jakhat alhingin, ahongcha le ain chu ainbang pumpin tong jakhatma asaove;
chujongle houin niso lam inmai lai le hongcha chu availam tong jakhat alhinge.
Aman nilhum lama um hongcha le ajetle aveiya inbang teni lam ngan inpi chu adung lam aten ahileh tong jakhat alhinge. Houin kimlai le indan sung nung chule polam hongcha chu

abon chauva amai neiya kisem cheh ahin, athum uvin bangkot anei cheh-uvin, sotlhah jong akihoi cheh e; hongcha to kimaito lai houin chu thingpeh jenga kitomjol ahin, akimvel lhunga kitoma, alhonga pat bangkot dung geiya kitoutomdoh peh ahiye.
Kotpi vuma aonghom kihoi lai gei, indan sung nung geipeh, polam geiya kitomdoh peh ahiye. Chutengle indan sung nung kimvela inbang chengse houin kimlai chu kijempah cheh ahin,
cherubim le tum thing lim tobang ahin, cherub khat le cherub khat kikah a chu tum thing khat cheh kijempeh ahi; cherub khat cheh chun mai ni cheh aneiyin;
Lang khat’a tum thingphung lam nga mihem mai ahin, alang khat’a tum thingphung chom khat lam ngat’a chu keipi nou mai tobang ahi. Hiche ho chu houin pumpi kimvel lhung keiya kijemsoh hela ahiye.
Alhonga pat’a kotpi chung vuma cherubim ho le tum thingphung kisemna chan geiya chu ainbanga kijemsoh hela ahi.
Houin kimlai lunga kotpi khom ho chu aning le neiya kisui ahi; chule muntheng maiya chu thil khat aumin,

thinga kisem maicham tobang khat ahin, tong thum asangin, tong ni asaovin, tong ni alen e; aning kitona chengse le akitunna ho chule abang chengse chu aboncha thing jeng thing jeng ahi. Amapa chun kajah a, “Hiche hi Pakai angsunga kido dokhan chu ahi,” eitipeh-e.
Houin kimlai lung le muntheng lai chun kotpi nigel gel anei lhone.
Akotpi chengse chu tho ni nia kisema, kotpi khat’a chu anungloi lut ding athagui ni ni kihen cheh ahi.
Houin kimlai lunga kotpi chengsea jong chu inbang dunga kisem tobang cherubim ho le tum thingphung lim ho chu kisem cheh ahi; chutengle polama hongcha maiya chu thinglim kisong ahiye.
Chujongle jet le veiya hongcha lampi jetle veiya inbang te nia chu bangkot sotlhah tampi kisema chule tum thing tampi umah ahi.
Aman thutanna indan sung nung sahlam jonin eipuidoh-in, houin hongcha le sah lama in pi toh kigalsai, indan dunga chun eipuilut tai.
Sahlam a kisa inpi chu adung lam tong jakhat alhingin, availam chu tong som nga alhinge.
Indan sung nungto kijopmat tong som ni laiya leibuh chu polam thutanna to kijopmat keng lampito ki-ang ngat indan thuma kitonson jotna leibuh chutoh ki-ang ngatto ahiye.
Chule indan ho maiya chun insung jotna lampi khat akisemin, availam tong soma len ahin, adunglam tong jakhat asaove, chule akotpi ho jong chu sahlam nga kisem cheh ahiuve.
Indan chung nung ho chu ajum jep jep’in ahi, ajeh chu ainpia indan noi nung ho le indan lailha ho sanga chu indan chung nung ho chu leibuh chengsen alahneo jep ahitai.

Ijeh-inem itile hiche ho chu indan thum geiya kisa ahiuvin, polam thutanna indana khom tampi apanthei banga khom pang theilou ahi; hijeh a chu indan chung nung chengse chu indan noinung chengse le indan lailha chengse sanga chu to la kona kikhojang jep ahiye.
Chule indan ho chutoh kijong jonin apolama thutanna indan lang ngan indan dangho toh kimai ngat’in inbang khat akigenin, adung tong som nga alhingin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile polam thutanna indan ho chu adung tong som nga nga alhingin, chule houin to kimaingat chengse chu adung tong jakhat khat alhingsoh keiye.
Hicheng indan noiya chun polam thutanna a kona mi hung lutna dingin niso lama chun lutna khat aumin,
hikom laiya chu polam inbang kigen pan ahiye. Lhang lama jong chun hongcha mai, inpi maiya chun indan tampi aumin,
amaiyuva chun lampi khat akilhunge; hiche indan ho chu sah lama indan ho chutoh aki limlon, adung avai jong akibang cheh-in, potdohna ding le kotpi chengse kigondol jong thakhat khat ahiuve.
Chutengle lhang lama indan ho noi, niso lama chun lutna khat aumin, hichea kona chu mi ho lampia chu hung lutji ahiuvin, chule hiche chutoh kigalsaiyin inbang kigentan khat aume.

Hichun aman kajah a aseiyin, “Hongcha to kigalsai sahlam indan chengse le lhang lam indan chengse khu indan theng jeng ahin, hikoma khu Pakai henga vahlutji thempu hon thilto atheng chung nung ho aneh dingu ahi; hikoma chu thilto theng chung nung deh ho leh chang thilto, chonset thilto chule themmo jeh a thilto ho chu akhol diu ahi, ajeh chu amun hi atheng ahi.

Thempu ho chu muntheng laiya hi alut tenguleh, hichea kona chu akinbolnau von jouse chu dalhaden louva polam thutanna indana chu hung potdoh louhel diu ahi, ajeh chu hiche thil ho chu atheng jeng ahiuve; mipi kititna mun a jot masanguva von chom dang akivon masah diu ahi,” eitipeh-e.
Aman houin kisahna gamsung alailung jouse atejou phat’in niso lam ngat’a kisem kelkot lama chun eipuidoh-in, chule houin kisahna gamsung kimvel pumpi chu aten ahi.
Thiltena chun niso lam gamkai chu aten ahileh, hiche thiltena dung chun tong ja nga alhinge.
Chujouvin akiheiyin sahlam gamkai aten ahileh, hiche thiltena chun tongja nga alhingin ahi.
Chuin akiheiyin lhanglam chu aten ahileh, hiche thiltena chun tongja nga ma alhinge.
Chujouvin nilhum lama akiheiyin aten ahileh, hiche thiltena chun tongja nga ma alhingin ahi.

Hiti chun ajet avei asah alhang aning lin ate kimvel tai. Akimvela chun inbang khat akigenin adung tong ja nga alhingin avai tongja nga ma alhinge, hiche inbang chun muntheng le mipi kititna mun chu adaltan ahi.
Amapan kelkot phunga eipuitai, hiche kelkot chun niso lam angai.
Hichun vetan, Israel Pathen loupina chu niso lamakonin ahung kitolin, ahung kitolgin pi chu twi tamtah kitolgin tobang ahi, chujongle leiset chu ama loupin asalvah jengin ahi.

Hichea kathilmu, mu kanei chu ama khopi sumang dinga kahenga ahung pet’a mu kanei chutobang-ma ma, chebar vadung panga kathilmu, mu kanei tobang chu ahi; chutah chun kei jong kamai tola kasulut jengin ahi.
Pakai loupina chu niso lam kelkot’a chun houin sunga ahung kitol lui phat’in.
Lhagaovin keima eiphong dingin, chule thutanna indan sung nunga chun eipuilut tai, hichea chun vetan, Pakai loupina chu houin sung adimset’e.
Hiche mipa chu kakoma anadin pet chun houin sunga kona chu mi khat-man kajah a thu ahinsei khajai;

thuseipa chun kajah a, “Mihem chapa, hichelai mun hi kalaltouna mun le kakengto ngapna mun ahin, hiche laiya hi Israel mite Jah a tonsot geiya kachen den ding ahi. Chutengle Israel insung miten kamin-theng asuhboh louhel diu, ama ho hiuhen, alengteu hileh, achonthang hoiyuva noti chon athonau hijongle, chule alengteu thisa athilongu hijeng jongleh

keima kotkhah bulpia akotkhah bulpiu jamu hen lang, akotpi khomu keima kotpi khom koma tungu jongleh, ama ho to kakah a inbang khat kigentan ahin, asuhboh lou diu ahi. Athilbol u thet umtah tah thil hoa chu keima mintheng anasuh bohsau ahitan, hijeh a chu keiman kalunghan pet’a kasuh ngimhel jeng ana-hiuve.
Tun achon thang hoinau noti chon athonau, alengteu thisa, athilong chengse chu keiya konin gamla tah-in tolmang jengu hen, chutile alailunguva tonsot geiya kachen jing ding ahi.
“Mihem chapa, nangman Israel insung mite jah a houin le houin lim kigondan chule athil kigondan seipeh tan, hita chu athemmona jouseu akijapi theina diuvin.

Chule athil bolset cheng-seuva kona akijapi theiyuva ahileh, houin limdan chu jihdoh-in lang, athilgon dol jouse semdoh-in, apotna jouse le alutna chengse jong vetsah-in, hiti chun apumpia alim chu gongdoh-in; chutengle amaho chu houina chondan thu chengse leh adanthu jouse abonchan hetsah soh keiyin; chujongle amitmu u mong mongin lekhan jihdoh soh keiyin, chutile danthu jouse leh chonndan thu ho chu aboncha anit’uva chule atoh molso thei dingu ahi.
Houin danthu chu hiche hi ahiye: Molsang chungvum kimvela agam pumpi hi atheng chungnung hi ding ahi. Vetan, hiche hi houin danthu chu ahi.

Maichammai jouse tong kite dungjuiya hiti ding ahi, tong kitichu tong khat’a sao le banjang tebep’a len hi ding ahi; akitunna chu tong khat’a sang, tong khat’a len hi ding, chule akimvela velkol khap khat’a kikol khat pang cheh ding ahi. Chutengle maicham asan dan hiti ding ahi:“
tola kona maicham todop kikah chu tong ni hi ding, asadan chu tong khat lhing hi ding ahi, chujongle atodop neopa a kona atodop lenpa gei chu tong li lhing hiya, asadan tong khat’a sa hi ding;
chule maichama mei kitina mun chu tong lia len ding, chutengle maicham mei kitina muna kona chu selki li chung lam nga kitungdoh a, khat cheh chu tong khat khat’a sangdoh ding ahi.
Chule maicham mei kitina mun chu aning li neiya kisema, adung tong som le tong ni, avai tong soni le tong ni ma hi ding ahi.

Maicham todop jong chu aning li neiya kisem ding, tong som le tong li adung hiya, avai tong som le tong li ma hi ding ahi; chule akimvela chu tong keh khat’a lena kivei velkol khat pang ding, akitunna jong chu akimvel tong khat lhing ding ahi. Maichama kalbi ho chun niso lam angat ding ahi,” ati.

Amapa chun kajah a aseiyin, “Mihem chapa, Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Hicheng jong hi maichama kimanchahna ding chondan ahi. Hiche maicham hi achunga pumgo thilto todoh jingna dingle thisan thekhumna dia akitundoh nikhoa chu
nangman Zadok insunga kona Levi themput dola thempua pang, keima henga kakin bolpeh dinga hung nailut ho chu bongchal khat chonset thiltoa to dinga napeh ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

Chule nangman athisan themkhat nathaldoh a maicham selki li, maicham todop li ning li chung, akimvela avelkol chunga chu nanu nat ding ahi; hita hi maicham chu nathenso ding, chule hiche dinga chu thoimatna nasem ding ahi.
Chujongle chonset jala thilto bongchal chu nakaiya, muntheng polam houin to kijopmat, lhendohsa kikoi laiya chu kigouvam ding ahi.
Ni ni alhin phat leh chonset jala thilto dinga chu nolnabei kelchal khat nato ding, bongchal khat jala akisuh theng banga chu, maicham chu suh thenga um ding ahi.
Nangman maicham chu nasuh theng jou tengleh nolnabei bongchal khat le kelngoi hon lah a kona nolnabei kelngoi chal khat jong natodoh ding ahi.
Hicheng chu Pakai angsunga nakailut’a, thempu hon achunguva chu chi athekhum diu, chule abonchauva chu Pakai henga pumgo thilto dinga atodoh diu ahi.
Ni sagi sunga nangman chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat niseh a nagonpeh jing ding, chujongle bongchal khat le kelngoi hon lah a kelngoichal khat, nolnabei cheh, gonpehsa nakoi jing ding ahiye.
Ni sagi sunga chu thempuhon maicham dinga thoimatna aboluva asuh thenguva athenso dingu ahi.

Ni sagi lhingset chu abol bulhing tenguleh, ni get alhina pat thempu hon maicham chunga chu nangho pumgo thilto chengse le chamna thilto chengse ahinto doh diu, keiman hita chu nangho kasan ding nahiuve, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye,” ati.
Amapan muntheng polam kelkot niso lam ngat’a kihoi laiya chun eihin nungpui kit’in ahileh, kelkot chu anakikhah chah-in ahi.

Chuin Pakai chun kajah a aseiyin, “Hiche kelkot hi kikhah den jing jeng ding, kihong doh louhel ding, chule mihemin jong lutna, anei louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile hiche kelkot’a hi Pakai, Israel Pathen chu hung lut’a ahitan, hichejeh a chu akelkot hi kikhah den jing jeng ding ahi.

Leng chapa beh vang chu asunga gatouva Pakai angsunga an aganeh thei bep ding ahi; ama jeng jong chu kelkot hongcha lampia chu hung lut’a apotdoh teng jongle hiche lampi ma ma chu potdoh ding ahi,” eitipeh-e.

Chujouvin aman houin mai sahlam ngat’a kihoi kelkot phung lampia chun eipuitai; hichea chun kaven ahileh vetan, Pakai loupina chu Pakai houin sung adimset jengin, ken jong tola kamai kasulut jengin ahi.

Hichun Pakaiyin kajah a thu ahinseiyin, “Mihem chapa, nalungthimin melchih jing jengin lang chule namit teni mongin ven lang, nanakhang teni mongin ngaiyin, keiman tua Pakai houin a kiman chahna ding chonnadan thu jouse leh danthu chengse aboncha athudol umchan nangma kaseipeh ding jouse hi; chujongle nalungthimin phatechan chingin, mi koitobang chu houina lutsah thei hiya chule koitobang chu munthenga kona paidoh ding ham.
Chule doumah mah bol insung, Israel insung mite jah a chun Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, tin seipeh-in: Vo Israel insung mite, nathilbol u thet umtah tah ho chu angahna nei tauvin;

nang hon kahenga kaneh ding le sathao chule athisan nahintodoh tenguleh asuboh ding bep’a keima muntheng sunga um dia gamchom mite, alungthim le tahsa cheptanlou gol nalutsah jiu chu subeiyun. Nathilbolu thet umtah tah chengse chung chonin jong nanghon keima kitepna chu nasukeh tauve.
Chujongle keima thil theng chengse nit ding jong nanit pouye; keiman nit dia kathupeh ho chu nangho dinga nanit khelpeh diuvin michomjoh napansah tauve.
“Pakai Pathenin hitin aseitai: Gamchom mite, alungthimle atahsa chep tanlou gol, Israel mite lah a cheng gamchom mite chu abonchauva koimacha keima muntheng muna lut louhel ding ahiuve.
Chujongle keiya kona gamla tah a vahmangsa, Israel jeng jong avathai laiya amilimdoi semthu chengse nunga vahmangsa Levi mite jengin jong atalen pohdiu akipoh diu ahiye.

Ama ho chu keima muntheng sunga kin bola pang diu, houin kelkot dung jousea chu avetup’a panguva, chule houin sunga lhacha pang ding ahiuve; mipi kilhaina gantha dingle pumgo thiltoa kitoh doh chengse athauva mipi kin aboluva chule mipi chu ajen diu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile ama hon amilimdoi semthu chengseu masanga chu mipi kin ana boluva chule Israel insung mite dinga themmo sah a kipalna khat’a anapang kha ahitauvin, hijeh a chu amahon atalen mat dingu chu akipoh diu ahi, tia ama ho chung chang thudola hi kihahselsa kahitai, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

Hijeh a chu kahenga hung nailut lou diu, thempun eijen banga chu abol theilou diu, chule keima thil theng khat cha jong akom anailut thei lou diu, thil theng chung nungpen koma vahlut theilou helding ahiuve; hita chu thet umtah tah thil tampi anaboldoh jeh-uva akijumso nau chu akithoh thoh mai diu ahitai.
Hita jongle keiman ama ho chu houin vetup dinga kapansah a akin bol ding jouse leh asunga toh ding chan tong dinga kakoi mai mai ding ahiye.

Ahin Zadok chapate. Levi them put dola thempua pang ho, keiya kona Israel chate anava mang pet’ a keima muntheng vetup’a anapang ho chu kei koma hung lut’uva chule keima eihung jenle diu ahinai; hita chu ama ho hin sathao le thisan ahinto doh-uva, kei henga hungkai ding ahiuve, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye;“
ama ho hi kei muntheng sunga lut’uva, keima kin bol dinga kadokhan chu ajot lut diu ahi, chule keiman nit dinga kasei ho anit cheh diu ahiye.

Thutanna indan sung nung kelkot dunga alut tenguleh tupat ponnem jeng akisil diu ahi; thutanna indan sung nung kelkot dung le asunga kin bola a pan tengule ama hon achunguva samul pon pou pou akisil louhel diu ahi.
Alu’uva jong tupat delnem chu akikop’uva, akongjang uva tupat ponnema kikhui tokachol jeng akichen diu, ulsa sosah thil imachaa kikan-gah louhel diu ahi.

Polama apotdoh-uva, thutanna indan sunga mipi henga alut tengule, kinbolna amanu akivonna chengseu chu asutlhah uva, aboncha chu indan theng sung dunga akoiden diu, chule von dang achom chom akivonjoh dingu ahi, achuti loule avon chengseuva kona mipi chu thenna apohlut khum theiyu ahi.
Ama hon alu akivotol lou diu, asam jang jong akaithang sah lou diu, alujang samu chu akisem tup jingjeng dingu ahi.
Thempu koi hijongle thutanna indan sung nung alut tengleh lengpitwi adonlou ding ahi.
Thempu ho hin meithaisa le numei kidasa akichenpi lou diu, Israel chilhah mong mong nu-ngah thengsel ho akichenpi diu, ahiloutah a meithaisa ahijongle thempu ji hisa meithai akichenpi diu ahiye.
Ama ho hin kamite hi thil thengle japi thil akibah louje ahiluva chule thilboh le thil theng kikhenna avetsah diu, akhendoh peh dingu ahi.

Kibaona aum tengleh ama ho hi thutanna panguva, hichea chu keima thutan dungjuiya thu atan diu ahi. Keima danthu jouse le kachondan thu ho chengse chu lhentum phat tepsa kut abol chanuva anit jing jeng diu, chule kacholngah nikho jouse jong chu athenga anit dingu ahi.
Mithi long koma galut’uva ama hole ama ho kisuboh louhel diu; amavang apa le anu, achapa le achanu, asopipa le asopinu jinei loulai hicheng chunga vang kisuboh jeng thei ding ahiuve.
Thempu chu akisuhboh tah a ahileh athenna dinga ni sagi sunga jechang ding, ni sagi alhin teng vangleh theng ding ahi.
Thutanna dan sung nung, munthenga alut’a, hiche muntheng muna chu kinbol dia alut ni ni le chun thempupan achonset thilto ding chu akito ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
“Thempu ho hin gou akhol lou diu ahi, keima hi ama ho gou chu kahi; chujongle nanghon ama ho chu Israel sunga goulo ding napeh lou dingu ahi, ajeh chu keima hi ama ho gou lo ding chu kahiye.
Ama hon chang thilto, chonset thilto chule themmo jala thilto chengse kivahna anei diu; Israel sunga Pathen a thil kitohdoh tapou chu ama ho ding ahitai.

Thingga masa jouse lah a aga masapen le nathilto jouse lah a thil akitohdoh chengse aboncha thempu ho chan ding ahi; chujongle na-in chunguva phattheina akikhol theina dinga nanghon thempu ho chu an lhung thah amasapen jong napeh diu ahi.
Thempu ho chun vacha hihen lang sa hijongle imacha jong ama chama thi-ah ahilou le akihehtelsa chu aneh louhel dingu ahi.

Nang hon gamsung hi gouva lo dinga nahop khen tenguleh Pakai chan dinga atumbeh a gam khat nakhendoh diu, hiche chu gambih thenga kikoi ding, adung lam tong sang som ni le sang nga hiya, avai lam tong sang som ni hi ding ahi; hichelai chu aning akah apumpia athenga um ding ahi.“
Hiche gamsunga adung tong ja nga avai tong ja nga mun khat chu muntheng dinga hoidoh a, chule akimvela chu tong som nga gam onga hoi ding ahi.

Chule nangman gambih thenga kihoilaiya kona chu adung lam tong sang som ni le sang nga, chule avai lam tong sangsom natedoh ding, hiche lai muna chu muntheng kiti, muntheng chung nung chu kisa ding ahi.

Hiche lai chu atumbeh a gamtheng hi ding, hiche mun chu thempu ho, munthenga Pakai henga vahlut’a ama kinbola pang ho, chan ding ahi; thempu hon hiche lai mun chu in muna aneiyuva, hita chu muntheng dinga athenat a um jing ding ahi.
Chujongle gamtum khat adunglam tong sang som ni le sang nga, avai lam tong sang som jong chu houin sunga kinbola pang Levi miten achenna diu khopi, agou uva anei diu ahi.
“Atheng dinga gambih kikhendoh bantah a chu khopi mun dinga gam avai lam tong sang nga, adung lam tong sang som nile sang nga natedoh diu, hiche lai chu Israel insung pumpi chan ding ahi.

Leng chapa chan ding gamsung chu gambih theng le khopi mun dinga kihoidoh teni jet le vei hi ding, gambih theng le khopi mun dinga kikhen gamsung chutoh kijompeh a, nilhum lam le niso lama kijong jonpeh ding, Israel phung khat gam chan chutoh adung lam kibang peh a, nilhum lama pat’a niso lam geiya chu kilhungdoh peh ding ahi. “

Hiche hi Israel sunga leng chapa chan ding athilkeova um ding ahi. Hijeh a chu kaleng chapaten kamite chu abolgenthei kit louhel diu ahi; ama ho joh chun Israel insung mite chu aphung phunguva gamsung achansah dingu ahiye.

“Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Vo Israel leng chapate! aphaset jengtai! Pumhat’a thil kibol jouse ngauvin lang, bolgenthei na chu ngatauvin, thu adih tah-in tanuvin lang thildih chu boljouvin, kamite nadel mang mangjiu chu haiyuvin, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Nang hon akitoh toh a thil nateuva, ephah adih lama namanuva chule bath jong adih lama naman diu ahi.“
Ephah le bath jong chu akibang banga kite ding, bath chun homer hopsoma hop khatbou adol ahin, chule homer khat chu khoche-na khodan hi ding ahi.
Shekel khat chu gerah som ni hi ding, ahekel nga chu shekel nga ma ahin, chule nangho mina khat chu shekel som nga hi ding ahiye.
“Nang hon Pathena thil nato diu chu hiche hi ahi: suhlou chang homer khat nalah-uva, sakol chang homer khat khat’a kona chu ephah dim khat hop gup’a hop khat nalah diu,
chule thaotwi jong chu atepsa jat dungjuiya cor dim khat khat’a kona chu bath dim khat hop soma hop khat nalah diu; cor kiti jong hi homer tobanga chu bath dim som khat dol ahi;

chutengle Israel insung mite kelngoi hon ja ni chenga kiloi ho lah a kona chu kelngoi khat khat nalah diu ahi. Hicheng chu chang thil toa kitoh ding, pumgo thilto dinga kitoh ding ho, chule chamna thilto dinga kitoh ding ho chu ahin, mi ho dinga chu thoimatna sempehna ding ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Gamsung miten abonchauva hiche thilto hi Israel lah a leng chapa chu apeh cheh diu ahi.

Kut kibol jouse le lhathah kut ho, cholngah nikho seh, chule Israel insung dinga lhentum kut jousea leng chapa chun pumgo thilto jouse leh chang thilto ho chule donthei thilto chengse chu alimbol ding ahi; aman Israel insung mite dinga chu chonset thilto jouse le chang thilto dingjouse, chule chamna thilto ding chengse agonpeh a thoimatna asempeh ding ahi.
Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Lha masapen chuche lha nikho masapen ni leh nangman bongnou chal nolnabei khat nakaiya muntheng suh thengna dinga nanei ding ahi.“
Thempupan chonset thilto gantha thisan chu themkhat athaldoh a houin khompi dungle maicham ning lia atodop chengse, chule thutanna indan sung nung kelkot khom dunga chu aloinat ding ahi.
Nangman chuche lha, ni sagi lhin ni le koi hijongle hetlou jeh le bol haiya chonsepa dinga chu hitobang banga chu nabolpeh ding ahi; hita chu nanghon houin thoijolna nabol diu ahiye.
“Lha masapen chuche lha, ni som le li lhin ni le nanghon kalchuh kut namanuva, ni sagi sunga cholsolou changlhah naneh diu ahi.
Hiche nikhoa chu leng chapan ama dingle gamsunga mi jouse dinga chonset thiltoa todoh dinga bongnou chal khat gonsa akoi ding ahi.

Chule ni sagi sunga kut kibol laisea chu leng chapan Pakaiya pumgo thiltoa todoh dinga aniseh a nolnabei cheh bongnou chal khat le kelngoichal khat khat atodoh ding, bongnou chal sagi le kelngoichal sagi atodoh ding ahiye; chujongle chonset thiltoa todoh dinga niseh a kelchal khat atodoh jing ding ahi.
Chang thiltoa todoh ding jong bongchal khat chunga chang ephah dim khat, kelngoichal khat chunga chang ephah dim khat, chule chang ephah dim khat dinga chu thaotwi hin khat dimset ato ding ahi.

Lha sagi lhinna chuche lha, nisom le ni nga lhin ni, chule kut kibolna ni sagi sung dinga chu lengpa chapan hiche tobang banga chu chonset thilto ding ho hihen lang pumgo thilto ding ho hihen, chang thilto ding ho hileh, thaotwi todoh ding hileh gonsa akoi jing jeng ding ahi.
Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: Thutanna indan sung nung kelkot niso lam ngat’a kihoipa chu na kitohna ni gup sunga kikhah ding, cholngah nikho le kihonga chule lhathah nikho jongle kihong ding ahi.

Lengpa chapa chu mun ong lama kona hongcha kelkot’a hung lut’ a chule kelkot khom phunga chu ding den ding, Thempu ho chun lengpa chapa pumgo thilto dingle chamna thilto ato ding chu atodoh peh-uva, chutengle aman kelkot hongcha a chu Pathen chibai aboh ding ahi. Chujoule amapa potdoh intin, akelkot vang chu nilhah geiya kikhah lou ding ahi.
Gamsung mipin cholngah nikho jouse le lhathah nikho seh a Pakai angsung jot lutna hiche kelkot phunga lutna a chu Pathen chibai aboh diu ahi.
Cholngah nikhoa lengpa chapan Pakai henga pumgo thilto ato ding chu nolnabei kelngoi gup le nolnabei ma ma kelngoichal khat hi ding;

chule kelngoi chalto kito tha ding chang thilto ding chu ephah dim khat hi ding, kelngoite toh atotha ding chang vang chu aman atojou jat jat hi jeng ding, chang ephah dim khat khat dinga chu thaotwi hin khat dim to hitha ding ahiye.
Lengpa chapan lhathah nikho le bongnou chat nolnabei khat le nolnabeima ma kelngoi gup le kelngoichal khat atodoh ding ahi;

chule chang thiltoa todoh dinga chu aman bongchal khat chunga dinga chang ephah dim khat, kelngoichal khat chunga dinga chu chang ephah dim khat agondoh a, kelngoi chengse chung changa ding vang chu aman ajochana atamto ding, chule chang ephah dim khat dinga chu thaotwi hin khat cheh to atotha ding ahi.
Lengpa chapa chu ahung lut tengleh kelkot hongcha lama kona hung lut ding, chule hiche lampima ma chu potdoh kit ding ahi.

Lhentum kut ho aboluva gamsung mipi chu Pakai angsunga ahung kitollut phat leh lengpa chapa chu chibai boh dinga sahlam kelkot’a kona hung lut’a chule lhang lam kelkot ‘a potdoh ding ahi; chuta chu lhang lam kelkot’a hung vah lutpa chu sahlam kelkot’a potdoh ding ahi; koimacha ahung lutna kelkot lampia chu kinungle kit louhel ding ahi, mijouse ma lam nga jang keiya chepai pai ding ahi.“
Lengpa chapa chu ahung lut tengle kelkot hongcha lama chu hung lut’a, chule ahung lutna lampi ma ma chu potdoh thei ding ahiye.

“Kut kibol jouse le kum kihei china phat tepsa kut’a to ding chu bongchal khat to totha ding chang thilto ding chu ephah dim khat hiya, kelngoichal khat to totha ding chu chang ephah dim khat hi ding, kelngoi dang ho toh totha ding vang chu mi khat’in atojou chan ato ding, chang ephah dim khat dinga chu thaotwi hin khat dimset to hitha ding ahi.

Lengpa chapa chun acham chama thilto ding agon tengleh, pumgo thilto hihen lang ahiloule chamna thilto hijongleh achamtah a Pakaiya thiltoa kitoh ahijeh a chu amapa dinga niso lam ngat’a kihoi kelkot chu kihonpeh ding ahi; chutengle aman cholngah nikhoa abol bang banga chu pumgo thiltoa a to ding hihen chamna thiltoa ato ding hileh atodoh ding ahi. Chujoule amapa potdoh intin, chuta apotdoh jou tengle kelkot chu kikhah ding ahitai.
Lengpa chapan niseh a Pakai henga pumgo thilto dinga kelngoi kumkhat lhingsa, nolnabei khat gonsa akot jing ding, ajingsim ajingseh a kelngoi chu agon jingjeng ding ahi.“

Chujongle hiche chutoh kilhona aman ajingsim ajingseh a chu chang thilto ding ephah dim khat hop gup’a hop khat to, chule changbongdi to kimeh balsa thaotwi hin khat dim hop thuma hop khat to, Pakai henga chang thiltoa todoh dinga chu gonsa akoi ding ahi; hiche hi tantih neilouva pumgo thilto kibolna a chondan ahiye.
Hita chu kelngoi le anneh thilto thaotwi gontohsa um ding, tantih neilou pumgo thiltoa to dinga jingkah seh leh gonsa umjing jeng ding ahi.

“Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye: Ijem tia lengpa chapan achapate lah a khatpen pen chu agou apeh a ahileh, hiche thilpeh chu achapate chang ding ahiuve, ajeh chu hiche hi ama ho dinga goulo athilkeovu ahiye.

Amavang agouva kona chu asohte khattou thilpeh apeh a ahileh, athilpeh chu sohpan chamlhat amu phat, hiche kum chan geiya dingbou ahiye; hiche nungle chun lengpa chapa nungchan kit ding ahi; ajeh chu achapaten bou ama gouva kona thilpeh chu akikoiden thei dingu ahiye.

Lengpa chapan mipi gou khat cha alah peh thei louhel ding, athilkeovu chu achulhah peh lou ding ahi; aman achapate chu ama thilkeo mong monga kona apeh doh ding, hita chu kamite khat cha jong anei kilahpeh louhel ding ahi, ati.“

Amapan insunga lutna lampi, kelkot koma kisem laiya chun sah lama thempu ho dinga indan theng kigol ho sunga chun eipuilut tai; hichea chun keiman indan ho among lam nilhum lang aning kheh kheh a mun khat kamun ahi.

Hichun aman kajah a aseiyin, “Hichelai mun hi thempu hon themmo thiltoa kitoh le chonset thiltoa kitoh sa ahon nau ahin, hikoma hi ama hon chang thiltoa kitoh jong chu changlhah a akanuva hita chu athil ho chu thutanna indan sung nunga kona pohdoh louna dingle mipi henga thenna chu akijopmat louna ding atiu ahi,” eiti.
Chujouvin amapan thutanna polam indana chun eihin puidoh paiyin, indan ning lia chun eipuilen ahi; hichea chun indan aning ninga indan chom khatma aum cheh-e,
indan ning lia chun indan nei li aumin, adung lam tong som li alhingin, availam tong somthum alhinge; adan li chun alet aneo akibang cheh-uve.
Indan neo dan li sunga chun song kikhengjol got khat cheh aumin, song kigol chengse atogola chun akimvelin thuh khuh akisemsoh keiye.
Hichun aman kajah a, “Hiche ho hi houin a kinbola pang hon mipi kilhaina gantha jouse ahon nau anhonna ho chu ahiye,” tin eiseipeh-e.

Hichepa chun houin kotpi phungbul lama einung pui kit tai; hichun vetan, houin hongcha noiya konin niso lam ngan twi ana longin ahi, ajeh chu houin jong chun niso lam angat ahiye; hiti chun houin hongcha mong lhang lam noi, maicham noiya chun twi chu analong suh-in ahi.
Chujouvin aman sahlam kelkot lampia chun eihin puidoh kit’in, polam kelkot chu eivelpin, hiche kelkot chun nisolam angai; hichea chun twi chu lhang lhang ninga konin ana longin ahi.
Mipa chun akhut’a thiltena khat akichoiyin niso lam ajonin, tong sang khat jen atedoh-in, chuin twi lah a chun eipui galkaiye, atwi chu ahkhomit chupbep bou ahi.

Chujouvin amapan tong sang khat ma atedoh kit’in, chule twi lah a chun eipui galkaiyin ahileh atwi chu khupgei bep’in athuh kit’e; aman tong sang khat atedoh kit’in twi lah a chun eipui galkaiye, atwi chu kong geiyin athuh tai.

Chujouvin jong amapan tong sang khat ma atedohin, ahin hiche chu vadung khat anahin keiman kapal galkai jou tapoi, ajeh chu ahung khangtou tan, kijapna dingin jong athuh khomset’in, pal galkai jou dol vadung ahitapoi.
Hichun aman kajah a, “Mihem chapa, nangman hiche hi namu hitam?” eiti. Chuin vadung panga chun einung pui kit tai.
Kanung che phat’in vadung pang te nia chun vetan, alang langa thingphung tampi pi kamun ahi.
Hichun aman kajah a aseiyin, “Niso lama long hiche twi hi Arabah langa long lha ahiye; atwi hi twikhanglena twi veiden lah a alon lut tengleh atwi jeng jong hi hung chim ding ahi.

Hijeh a chu vadung hi alonna chana ganhing ahon hona kilom jousen jong hinna anei diu, nga jeng jong atam a tam hing diu ahi; hiche twi hi khukoma longlut ding ahin, twikhanglen twi jeng jong khu, hung chim thei hel ding ahi; hijeh a chu vadung lonphahna chana chu ganhing jousen hinna anei theidiu ahiye.

Nga man mite jong twikhanglen panga hung dinguvin tin, En-ge’di a pat’a En-eg’laim geiya len sena thei mun jeng hung hi ding, angate jeng jong jat tam ahiuva, twikhanglen lentah a ngate tobang hi diu ahiye.
Amavang anen chengse le aneh chengse chu chimthei deh lou ding ahi; hiche ho chu chia pang dia dalhah ding ahitai.

Vadung pang teni ajet aveiya chu nga neh thei thing phungjat chom chom tampi hungkeh ding; hiche ho chu anau jong pul louhel ding, agau jong hut thei lou diu, alhaseh a athah athah a ga jing jeng ding ahiuve: ipijeh-inem itile hiche ho dinga hi munthenga kona twi hung long ahi. Agau chu damna anneh a pang ding, anau jong damna hi ding ahi,” eiti.
Pakai Pathenin hitin thu aseiye: “Hicheng hi gamgi ahin, nanghon hiche hoa hi Israel phung som le phung ni chu agam hi agoulo dinguva nahoppeh diu ahi. Joseph chu chan ni chang ding ahi.
Hita chu nanghon kibang cheh a nahop dingu ahi: napu napateu peh dinga keima kihahselsa kahitan, hijeh a chu hiche gam hi nagoulo diuva nangho chang kha nahiuve.
“Gamgi chu hiche hi hiding ahi: Sahlam twikhanglen lenpa a pat Hethlon lampi ahin jui ding, Hamath lama lutna hung lut’a, Zedah ajot ding,
Bero’thah, Sib’raim, hiche hi Damascus le Hamath kikah gamgi laiya um ahin. Hauran gamgia um Hazerhatticon geiya hung kilhung lutpeh ding ahi.
Hitobanga hi twikhanglena pat’a gamgi hung kilhunga Hazar-e’non geiya hung lut ding, Hazae’non hi Damascus sahlam gamgia umah ahin, sah lama Hamath to kigamgi ahi. Hiche hi sahlam gamgi hi ding ahi.

Niso lama chu Haza-e’nona pat’a gamgi hung kilhunga Hauran le Damascus kikah ajot ding, Jordan dung ajuipeh a Gilead le Israel gamgi kah a lut ding, niso lam twikhanglen aphah peh a Tamar geiya kilhung lutpeh ding ahi. Hiche hi niso lam gamgi hi ding ahi.“

“Sah lama chu Tamar a kona gamgi hung kilhunga Meribath-ka’desh twidung chan geiya hung lut ding, hichea kona chu Egypt vadung ajuipeh a twikhanglen alenpa a lenglha ding ahi. Hiche hi lhang lam gamgia pang ding ahi.
Nilhum lama chu twikhanglen alenpa hi gamgia pang ding, Hamath jot lutna akigalsaipi dung chan geiya hi gamgi hi ding ahiye. Hiche lai nilhum lam gamgia pang ding ahi.“
“Hita chu nanghon nangho le nang hokah a Israel phung jat dungjuiya hiche gam hi nakihop diu ahi.

Nanghon agam hi nangho le nangho goulo dinga chule nangho lah a cheng gamdang mi hiya, ahivanga nalah-uva chale nao hingsa ho goulo dinga achan channa nakihop diu ahi. Ama ho jong chu Israel mi chate tobang bang hidiu ahiye: nangho to tha khat khat’a Israel phung sunga ama ho jong chu goulo ding chan nakihoppi dingu ahi.
Koi phung pena cheng kha hita jongleh gamdang mipa chu ama chan ding goulo ding chu napeh tei tei diu ahi, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.

Phung min ho chu hicheng hi ahiye: Sahlam gamgia pat simpat’a, twikhanglena pat’a Hethlon lampia simpeh ding. Hamath jot lutna simpaiya, Hazar-e’non chan geiya sim ding. Hazare’non hi Hamath gal Damascus dinga sahlam gamgia pang ahi, chutengle niso lama pat’a nilhum geiya akisima ahileh Dan chu chankhat achange.“
Dan gamgi to kimat, niso lama pat nilhum geiyin Asher chan khat achangin ahi.
Asher gamgi to kimat niso lama pat nilhum lam geiyin Naph’tali chan khat achange.
Naph’tali gamgito kimat niso lama pat nilhum lam gei chu Manas’seh chan khat achange.
Manas’seh gamgi to kimat niso gamkaiya pat nilhum lam geiyin E’phraim chan khat achange.
E’phraim gamgito kimat niso lam gamkaiya pat nilhum geiyin Reuben chan khat achange.
Reuben gamgito kijongjon niso lam gamkaiya pat nilhum lam geiyin Judah chan khat achangin ahi.

“Judah gamgi to kijong jon niso lam gamkaiya pat nilhum lam geiya chu nanghon atumbeh a natedoh dingu kitilai chu ahin, availam tong sang som nile sang nga lhing ding, adunglam chu phung khat chan chutoh kibang ding, niso lama pat nilhum lam geiya kibang peh ding ahi, chutengle hiche gam lailunga chu muntheng um ding ahiye.
Nang hon Pakai ding atumbeh a natedoh diu gam chu adung lam tong sang som ni le sang nga lhing ding, avai lam tong sang som ni lhing ding ahi.

Hitebep chu muntheng dia kihoidoh ding mun chu hiding; thempu hon jong chan khat anei dingu ahin, aletdan ding chu sahlam gamkai tong sang som ni le sang nga hi ding, nilhum lam gamkai availam chu tong sang som hi ding, avai lang khat niso lam gamkai chu tong sang som lhing ding, chule lhanglam gamkaiya chu adung lam tong sang som ni le sang nga hi ding, chule alailung tah a chu Pakai muntheng um ding ahi.
Hichelai chu thensosa thempu ho, Zadok chapate, keiman nit dia kasei chengse nit jing ho, Israel chate avamang uva jong anavah mang lou ho, Levi mite um banga anaum det jing ho chan ding ahi.
Hita chu hiche laiya hi ama ho chenguva. gamsunga chan theng beh a a ma ho atumbeh a chang diu, muntheng chung nung hiya, Levi mite gamgi chutoh kijong jon ding ahi.

Chule thempu ho gamgi chutoh kijuipeh a Levi miten chan khat anei diu, adung lam tong sang som ni le sang nga hiya, avai lam tong sang som hi ding ahi. Adung lhung keiya chu apumpia tong sang som ni le sang nga lhing hiya. avai lam tong sang som ni lhing ding ahi.
Ama hon agam chu ahalsi chajong ajoh thei lou diu. thilto jong alhet theilou diu ahi. Ama hon hiche lhentum gamtum lai chu adalhah louhel diu ahi, ajeh chu hiche lai hi Pakai dinga atheng ahiye.

Amoh chengse gam avai lam tong sang nga, adung lam tong sang som ni le sang nga chu khopi manchah nom noma manchah ding, mi chenna ding, chujongle gam onga um ding ahi. Hiche lailung lai tah a chu khopi kisem ding ahin;“

akigon ding dan jouse chu hiti ding ahi; sahlam gamkai chu tong sang li le tong ja.nga hi ding, lhang lam gamkai chu tong sang li le tong ja nga hi ding, chule nilhum lam gamkai jong chu tong sang li le tong ja nga hi ding ahi.

Chuta chu khopi chun gam ong lai jong anei ding; sahlam tong ja ni le tong som nga hi ding, lhanglam tong ja ni le tong som nga hi ding, niso lam tong ja ni le tong som nga hi ding, chule nilhum lam tong ja ni le tong som nga hi ding ahi.

Amoh chengse chu adung lam, gambih atheng lai chutoh kijong jona niso lama tong sang som hi ding, nilhum lam tong sang som ma hi ding, chule hiche lai chu gambih atheng lai chutoh kijompeh ding ahi. Hichelai gamga soh chu khopia natong hon kivahna anei diu ahi.
Chule khopi sunga natong ho chu, Israel phung tina kidong khoma hichelai mun chu louva abol diu ahi.
Nang hon atumbeh a nakhendoh diu gambih chu akimvela tong sang som ni le tong sang nga hi ding, hiche chu gambih atheng lai hiya, khopi dinga achan ding chutoh kigop tha ding ahi.

Gambih atheng lai le khopi chan ding ajet le aveiya avaldoh chengse chu lengpa chapa chang ding ahi. Gambih athenglai tong sang som ni le sang nga a kona hung kilhungdoh pai paiya niso lam gamgi chan gei le nilhum lama chuche tong sang som ni le sang nga a kona hung kilhungdoh pai paiya nilhum lam gamgi chan gei, aphung phunga chan kihomto hung kibang tou peh chu lengpa chapa chang ding ahi. Gambih theng lai, alailunga houin muntheng kisemna,
chule Levi mite channa lai le khopi channa ding chu lengpa chapa channa ding alailung lai tah a um ding ahi. Lengpa chapa chan ding chu Judah gam le Benjamin gam kikah lah hi ding ahi.
“Phung dang ho ding vang chu; niso lama pat nilhum lam gei chu Benjamin chan khat achangin.
Benjamin gamgi to kijong jon pai pai niso lama pat nilhum gei chu Simeon chan khat achange.
Simeon gamgi to kijop pai pai lai niso lama pat nilhum lam gei chu Is’sachar chan khat achangin ahi.
Is’sachar gamgi to kijop pai pai lai, niso lama pat nilhum lam gei chu Zeb’ulun chan khat achangin ahi.
Zeh:uiun gamgi to kijop pai pailai niso lama pat nilhum lam gei chu Gad chan khat achange.

Gad gamgito kijop pai pai lai lhanglam chengse chu Tamar a pat’ a gamgi hung kilhungpeh a Meribathka’desh twidung geiya hung kilhung lut ding, hichea kona chu Egypt vadung ajuipeh a twikhanglen alenpa a lenglha ding ahi.
Hiche gam hi ahi nanghon Israel phung jouse agoulo dinguva nahop peh dingu chu, chule hichengse chu ama ho chan ding cheh chu ahiye, tin Pakai Pathenin aseiye.
Khopi sunga kona potdohna ding chu hicheng hi hi ding ahi; sahlam gamkai chu, akitena dungjuiya tong sang li le ja nga ahin,“
kelkot thum kihong ding, Reuben kelkot, Judah kelkot chule Levi kelkot kitia, khopi kelkot jouse chu Israelte phung min kiputsah cheh ding ahi.
Niso lam gamkaiya ding chu, agamkai tong sang li le tong ja nga hi ding ahin, kelkot thuma kihong ding, Joseph kelkot, Benjamin kelkot chule Dan kelkot kiti ding ahi.
Lhanglam gamkaiya ding ahileh, agamkai dungjuiya chu tong sang li le tongja nga hi ding ahin, kelkot thum kihong ding, Simeon kelkot, ls’sachar kelkot, chule Zeb’ulun kelkot kiti ding ahi.
Nilhum lam gamkaiya ding chu, agamkai tong sang li le tong ja nga hi ding ahin, kelkot thuma kihong ding, Gad kelkot, Asher kelkot, chule Naph’tali kelkot kiti ding ahi.
Khopi chu akimvel lhung keiya tong sang som le tong sang get hi ding, chule khopi chu amin tua pat, ‘Hikom hi Pakai umna ahi’, kiti ding ahi,” ati.
